body:

This is serious, team: Three presidents are calling out the _incredible_ damage Trump is doing to our country, our people, and our values -- but they're also calling on US to fight back!

**President Obama urged that "it is up to all of us to fix this"** \-- and he's absolutely right.

We're launching a Live Petition to answer our Democratic leaders' calls and confirm Democrats DEFINITELY oppose Trump, but as of 11/27, _we're still missing your signature!_ **Please, don't delay:**

**[Stand with Democrats: Confirm you definitely OPPOSE Trump and his destructive agenda!>>](http://go.dscc.org/go/22224?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20251127-PetitionAlert-3PresidentsDefOpposeTrump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20251127-PetitionAlert-3PresidentsDefOpposeTrump-Pros-sl1&akid=21833%2E9716520%2EX_mWN0)**

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
body:
Grateful for your unwavering dedication and the abundant blessings we share.
[](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org/1/0100019ac7cf9963-d5139c42-b4be-4428-b597-e394bb7e9120-000000/gZAuHJ_FQKJI6P6PvHJ5sh86JMwDfXhdXMFZeHdYT6w=433)Patriot–We have so much to be grateful for this Thanksgiving.I particularly wish to express my profound gratitude to you—the steadfast patriots who stand by our cause and labor endlessly for it. Your unwavering commitment and love for America motivate me without fail. It's because of people like you that our nation can—and will—rise to greatness once more.As you come together with loved ones, I hope you find peace and cherish the abundance God provides. The road ahead demands diligence and resolve to make the most of this American renewal, but this Thanksgiving is for renewal itself. I hope we will all embrace this time to bond with family and rejoice in the enduring freedom of our great land.After you finish the festivities with those you love, take a moment to watch [_**this fascinating episode of the Jenny Beth Show**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv=M4PMbVchGgQ/1/0100019ac7cf9963-d5139c42-b4be-4428-b597-e394bb7e9120-000000/y7PgsjvQ1fIp3pgKpchrJMMPl4_oDK92easvkYTW59E=433), where we dive into the true story of the first Thanksgiving.Wishing you and your family a wonderful Thanksgiving!Jenny Beth Martin _This email list is a joint venture of the following separate organizations: Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc., Tea Party Patriots Foundation, and Tea Party Patriots Citizens Fund. All rights reserved.__Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes._ To donate by mail, send your check made payable to:[_**Tea Party Patriots Action**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org%2Fdonate%2F/1/0100019ac7cf9963-d5139c42-b4be-4428-b597-e394bb7e9120-000000/PA32bn4YQ5DhFJiY7KMC_bQHFvvBQucaiGmJUcRj46o=433)
2295 Towne Lake Pkwy Ste 116-314
Woodstock, GA 30189Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [unsubscribe](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Ftpot.teapartypatriots.org%2Fcontact-preferences%2F01jp3rk1m05jb3jy5xyw9vqr5t%3Fct=1ebd6a5833cd%26et=a8fe34ad85d9/1/0100019ac7cf9963-d5139c42-b4be-4428-b597-e394bb7e9120-000000/BRROE_m4uAPl1DEEZtZCNogC4VczMzE426YedBGUmAc=433) or [update your preferences](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Ftpot.teapartypatriots.org%2Fcontact-preferences%2F01jp3rk1m05jb3jy5xyw9vqr5t%3Fct=1ebd6a5833cd%26et=a8fe34ad85d9/2/0100019ac7cf9963-d5139c42-b4be-4428-b597-e394bb7e9120-000000/Tl-yVpB2YobumknFEOIPIXpkY8wTnLewncfWVT1YFok=433).

name: The PreBorn! Team
subject: She came in scared and left with hope
body:
A mother in crisis walked into a PreBorn! Network Clinic scared and alone, ready to end her pregnancy.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztagrv2fqm5q9tr8n3g9gjehs7tjou9fpiuoo2t8_rp22sh2s8i6eor1cph6eor1cph2bs)
---
Advocate for Life, A mother in crisis walked into a PreBorn! Network Clinic scared and alone, ready to end her pregnancy. But then she heard her baby’s heartbeat and saw his tiny form on the ultrasound screen.

Tears filled her eyes and in one moment, her fear gave way to faith. **That’s what your gift does.** PreBorn!’s Network Clinics across the nation provide **free ultrasounds** and **gospel-centered compassionate care** to women in crisis. Your **$28 gift provides one life-saving ultrasound** and gives a mother the chance to see her baby and hear about the love of Jesus Christ. As our thank-you, we’ll send you the [**_Tiny Miracles, Mighty Futures 2026 Calendar_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4o3b75j99jl1l0knfvg2vmqoh4hji7lrih24tf0_rp22sh2s8i6eor1cph6eor1cph2bs) that’s filled with **Scripture and a monthly prayer guide** to help you lift up this ministry of life all year long.
---
Supplies are limited during this busy end of year season, so please give now to help reach the next mother before it’s too late!
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zet8bq23q7tcp5l947dojmkkktl5qp9qk9vim0a8_rp22sh2s8i6eor1cph6eor1cph2bs)
---
[**Give $28 + Get Your Calendar**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zne781sj1i4tr8vr0rklk08mf1qveo7s2lchfrco_rp22sh2s8i6eor1cph6eor1cph2bs)
---
We hope to hear from you soon! Gratefully, The PreBorn! Team
---

name: The Liberty Ledger
subject: Pope Leo shares 'secret of Christian charity' with Little Sisters of the Poor
body:
Pope Leo XIV visits a care home for the elderly run by a community of the Little Sisters of the Poor in Istanbul, Turkey, on Nov. 28, 2025. / Credit: Vatican Media. Istanbul, Turkey, Nov 28, 2025 / 03:00 am (CNA). Pope Leo XIV visited the Nursing Home of the Little Sisters of the Poor in Istanbul on Friday, telling the community that Christian charity begins not with doing, but with being, i.e., living a real communion with those one serves.“The secret of Christian charity is that before being for others, we must first be with others in a communion based on fraternity,” he said during the encounter on Nov. 28, the second day of his apostolic trip to Turkey, where he is marking the 1700th anniversary of the First Council of Nicaea. | [](http://trk.libertyledger._ZD01In0/yU44l58caRob7wGoEJr_yA)

name: Trisha Calvarese
subject: Boebert wants to replace nurses with robots
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-T2qaOtX_8nt2YMsH1fTZRQg0N_08OmgXbuFEramtL0gDb3w3SvPkalwbjviimH_FoJwUly5aK88uqAO__mtaBdeCdPwZCeqT9esKTOyKcDcRL_YJpm5PyYrq26Wk--xS_gWtJS9xr8yfkACGXxVR7WjFvv9erTnWfqgREXB385JTVTiXdlX2OkbxZNfaD2s4OPTiR8XM7J7gQuKwa164fzHqEMkEgDl&c=9ORoPHWFMeNDs2G43NAOVBNPKO7MTBbqXPWgavnfzCj77ViKaeTb1w==&ch=JGQgtsTD5gYlQa--c0KZUOWsCYAledLLNCn866GZ1QE785l3CoqE3w==)
---
|

Peter,
Nurses are "not professionals."
That is the official declaration from the Department of Education this week. And it happened because of a bill Lauren Boebert backed.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-T2qaOtX_8nt2YMsH1fTZRQg0N_08OmgXbuFEramtL0gDb3w3SvPkalwbjviimH_FoJwUly5aK88uqAO__mtaBdeCdPwZCeqT9esKTOyKcDcRL_YJpm5PyYrq26Wk--xS_gWtJS9xr8yfkACGXxVR7WjFvv9erTnWfqgREXB385JTVTiXdlX2OkbxZNfaD2s4OPTiR8XM7LFNBQF5w9zTJTGmqcViZZM&c=9ORoPHWFMeNDs2G43NAOVBNPKO7MTBbqXPWgavnfzCj77ViKaeTb1w==&ch=JGQgtsTD5gYlQa--c0KZUOWsCYAledLLNCn866GZ1QE785l3CoqE3w==)
---
This is a slap in the face.
This new rule cuts the student loans nurses need. It makes advanced degrees too expensive for regular people. If they can't pay for school, they can't become nurse practitioners or teachers.
The most professional people I've ever known were the hospice nurses who got my parents and me through their final days. They provided dignity and care that no machine can replicate.
Let's not forget that teaching and nursing are female-dominated fields that have been historically devalued and seen as "women's work."
So why make it harder for nurses and teachers? Because Boebert's donors are betting on robots replacing people.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-T2qaOtX_8nt2YMsH1fTZRQg0N_08OmgXbuFEramtL0gDb3w3SvPkalwbjviimH_FoJwUly5aK88uqAO__mtaBdeCdPwZCeqT9esKTOyKcDcRL_YJpm5PyYrq26Wk--xS_gWtJS9xr8yfkACGXxVR7WjFvv9erTnWfqgREXB385JTVTiXdlX2OkbxZNfaD2s4OPTiR8XM7KdAb20oEQGfk9Upoi_-Qny&c=9ORoPHWFMeNDs2G43NAOVBNPKO7MTBbqXPWgavnfzCj77ViKaeTb1w==&ch=JGQgtsTD5gYlQa--c0KZUOWsCYAledLLNCn866GZ1QE785l3CoqE3w==)
---
They are rewriting the rules to devalue human work, so they can automate it.
I'm Trisha Calvarese. I'm a former labor leader and public servant running to fire Lauren Boebert and fight for working people in Congress.
And Lauren Boebert is terrified of our campaign.
She is only in Congress because of just 546 votes. When I ran against her in 2024, our campaign had the best performance of any Democrat in this district's history--outperforming Kamala Harris by 6 points in a red wave election. [We have the momentum. But we are up against the MAGA machine hellbent on erasing our dignity for a quick buck. We need to stand up and fight back right now before it's too late. That's why I am asking you today: Will you rush a contribution of $50, $25, or whatever is meaningful to you, to fire Lauren Boebert and replace her with a champion for working people?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-T2qaOtX_8nt2YMsH1fTZRQg0N_08OmgXbuFEramtL0gDb3w3SvPkalwbjviimH_Wwh_RMHrTh09Hw4IZiAGkC0SlRcRnFTuNprd5-wacAMBFuWdgCCxz_1MmK8MWsmQI64eECW0reH-pyic-49sVhFq96LYQ--e5VZEtMbnBNqjrZUYhpQOjza_gbyPLC3FFbs7pLj5Y1GvZORHOHw4WWtdD6shHdMwRsf9pEWZBPc=&c=9ORoPHWFMeNDs2G43NAOVBNPKO7MTBbqXPWgavnfzCj77ViKaeTb1w==&ch=JGQgtsTD5gYlQa--c0KZUOWsCYAledLLNCn866GZ1QE785l3CoqE3w==)

name: Trisha Calvarese
subject: Boebert wants to replace nurses with robots
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kheONnAg4W2mtO7bavoGBVqJwyYS2didxdnX2tsI1PpI1wwnePkroRYcw15xlb7KlcirotmSUmd7Y7-b3r_1jUE5pz6usCKwX5H2RaCoF899lSHwZ7DmLDNnl1yljcGLOg8qclPtgMOmlZh--oU65oA90P0nD6X-4ZV272Smmz4akPMUqjxKpCfcWAqOAAhRpEin31T3eL43vCUghTSxVY9s1adsu_ql&c=NSOrOctK500W56WrFhVHsMVfh5CtgJDF68pOdySPmRkVoulgJnxZQQ==&ch=vVIdiiJRnQ__tvK6hb-SL67W3Epp9eH56XJRFeGSdd2EJ4NIb7qczQ==)
---
|

Peter,
Nurses are "not professionals."
That is the official declaration from the Department of Education this week. And it happened because of a bill Lauren Boebert backed.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kheONnAg4W2mtO7bavoGBVqJwyYS2didxdnX2tsI1PpI1wwnePkroRYcw15xlb7KlcirotmSUmd7Y7-b3r_1jUE5pz6usCKwX5H2RaCoF899lSHwZ7DmLDNnl1yljcGLOg8qclPtgMOmlZh--oU65oA90P0nD6X-4ZV272Smmz4akPMUqjxKpCfcWAqOAAhRpEin31T3eL6J55e44X8l5o815GZ3VR7H&c=NSOrOctK500W56WrFhVHsMVfh5CtgJDF68pOdySPmRkVoulgJnxZQQ==&ch=vVIdiiJRnQ__tvK6hb-SL67W3Epp9eH56XJRFeGSdd2EJ4NIb7qczQ==)
---
This is a slap in the face.
This new rule cuts the student loans nurses need. It makes advanced degrees too expensive for regular people. If they can't pay for school, they can't become nurse practitioners or teachers.
The most professional people I've ever known were the hospice nurses who got my parents and me through their final days. They provided dignity and care that no machine can replicate.
Let's not forget that teaching and nursing are female-dominated fields that have been historically devalued and seen as "women's work."
So why make it harder for nurses and teachers? Because Boebert's donors are betting on robots replacing people.
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kheONnAg4W2mtO7bavoGBVqJwyYS2didxdnX2tsI1PpI1wwnePkroRYcw15xlb7KlcirotmSUmd7Y7-b3r_1jUE5pz6usCKwX5H2RaCoF899lSHwZ7DmLDNnl1yljcGLOg8qclPtgMOmlZh--oU65oA90P0nD6X-4ZV272Smmz4akPMUqjxKpCfcWAqOAAhRpEin31T3eL6JBkskvvP3QA9ByPWNcWiD&c=NSOrOctK500W56WrFhVHsMVfh5CtgJDF68pOdySPmRkVoulgJnxZQQ==&ch=vVIdiiJRnQ__tvK6hb-SL67W3Epp9eH56XJRFeGSdd2EJ4NIb7qczQ==)
---
They are rewriting the rules to devalue human work, so they can automate it.
I'm Trisha Calvarese. I'm a former labor leader and public servant running to fire Lauren Boebert and fight for working people in Congress.
And Lauren Boebert is terrified of our campaign.
She is only in Congress because of just 546 votes. When I ran against her in 2024, our campaign had the best performance of any Democrat in this district's history--outperforming Kamala Harris by 6 points in a red wave election.
[We have the momentum. But we are up against the MAGA machine hellbent on erasing our dignity for a quick buck. We need to stand up and fight back right now before it's too late. That's why I am asking you today: Will you rush a contribution of $50, $25, or whatever is meaningful to you, to fire Lauren Boebert and replace her with a champion for working people?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kheONnAg4W2mtO7bavoGBVqJwyYS2didxdnX2tsI1PpI1wwnePkroRYcw15xlb7KRHcGQuG4aPoc3wzM2rnYBxhuIBAFqvNgIx9j1dDvB7j6BXQJv74idHxVnuFM_9-m7JXD8bqRK4eP6Xm7K0n-lryU0lNNZpltA72hD7WAUVSnz_5GGJBA2wNlpfFQDp_Mg1zU_5lOw49389YBAAkiYgsRz5vHe8on6wWVAZw535w=&c=NSOrOctK500W56WrFhVHsMVfh5CtgJDF68pOdySPmRkVoulgJnxZQQ==&ch=vVIdiiJRnQ__tvK6hb-SL67W3Epp9eH56XJRFeGSdd2EJ4NIb7qczQ==)
---

name: The Maine Wire
subject: Taxpayer Funded UMaine-Farmington Prof Frustrated Hotline Meant to Help Illegals Evade ICE Not Fast Enough
body:
Here's the latest breaking news at The Maine Wire

** Taxpayer Funded UMaine-Farmington Prof Frustrated Hotline Meant to Help Illegals Evade ICE Not Fast Enough (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=0d5bc57fc6&e=f093fa355c)
------------------------------------------------------------
By Seamus Othot on Nov 27, 2025 06:55 pm
ICE agents were allegedly spotted on the University of Maine Farmington Campus last week, inspiring taxpayer-funded professors to attempt recording their whereabouts and to call a hotline intended to help illegal immigrants evade law enforcement, according to internal UMaine Farmington communications obtained by The Maine Wire. name: Kristan Hawkins, Students for Life
subject: this only lasts for the next hour
body:
I have good news and bad news.

Dear Pro-Life Friend,

I have good news and bad news.

The bad news is, we’re still short of reaching our $165,000 #GivingTuesday Matching Challenge goal.

Now the good news . . .

I just got off the phone with one of our most generous supporters and they’ve agreed to DOUBLE-MATCH all gifts that come in to Students for Life up to our **$165,000 #GivingTuesday Matching Challenge** goal.

But there’s just one catch.

This opportunity to TRIPLE your impact expires in ONE HOUR!
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp0p5cjk2srdpoi7160ut03ucd4cfeck3pr6m62g_rp22sh2s8i6eor1cpgm9oj2cth2bs) _**Here’s what that means:**_ [**Give $50 → becomes $150**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd2a47qfriuok2uhse3lm57lcojtu60p1jkt0dao_rp22sh2s8i6eor1cpgm9oj2cth2bs) [**Give $100 → becomes $300**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh6j36s74g1vbc2vtv3b3lr102l6vjjn35g5a3do_rp22sh2s8i6eor1cpgm9oj2cth2bs) [**Give $250 → becomes $500**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zacu0ki9l7i53a46u0j6242180336ubq757o1rc8_rp22sh2s8i6eor1cpgm9oj2cth2bs) [**Give $500 → becomes $1,500**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7kaoepe0pstt7qkhddp10uhn3bmcgpbrd20joq8_rp22sh2s8i6eor1cpgm9oj2cth2bs) [**Give $1,000 → becomes $3,000**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9bu1lb6b16d5g79vq22pc0jftssj1p6708eo5qo_rp22sh2s8i6eor1cpgm9oj2cth2bs)
This is Kristan Hawkins, President of Students for Life – the largest & most effective pro-life youth organization in America, with over 1,600 active groups.

Pro-life friend, this donor specifically asked to do this because of what we accomplished together this year, including:
**> >>** Reaching over 1,600 campus groups nationwide; **> >>** Converting up to 19% of pro-abortion students during our campus tours; **> >>** Celebrating _Planned Parenthood_ closing over 44 facilities this year; and **> >>** DEFUNDING PLANNED PARENTHOOD of their taxpayer funding for a whole year _(something that has never been done before)!_
And this generous donor is also excited for what we have to come in 2026 – including our effort to Debar _Planned Parenthood_ for THREE years, as well as gearing up our critical election programs heading into the 2026 Midterms.

**_This Power Hour opportunity has the potential to send us into the new year with our best foot forward_.**

But only if you give in the next 60 MINUTES!

So, pro-life friend, will you please click one of the links or buttons in this email right away to rush your most generous gift while it will be TRIPLED?

Remember:

**[>>> $50 becomes $150](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpf95gj1sb2gmbnoh33e6h4uoaqgisd6kpthsrn0_rp22sh2s8i6eor1cpgm9oj2cth2bs)!**

**[>>> $100 becomes $300](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zno21eviu5g6c5ntb7nn1qeuesruqs9srbenilbo_rp22sh2s8i6eor1cpgm9oj2cth2bs)!**

**[>>> $250 becomes $750](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk2aofhnrcd9p9nkehaqau9cip66gpqci5h396o0_rp22sh2s8i6eor1cpgm9oj2cth2bs)!**

**[Even if you can only give $25 right now, it becomes $75](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zaor2m9vlpl3m7mu25ln86k8cirtntno6gp3b5jo_rp22sh2s8i6eor1cpgm9oj2cth2bs)** – _and every dollar matters._

This expires in less than 1 hour.

Please don’t wait.

For Life,

Kristan Hawkins
President, _Students for Life of America_

Students for Life of America (SFLA) is a 501(c)3 organization. All donations are 100% tax-deductible.
Students for Life of America
1000 Winchester St., Suite 301, Fredericksburg, VA 22401
Office: 540.834.4600

Here’s what that means: This is Kristan Hawkins, President of Students for Life – the largest & most effective pro-life youth organization in America, with over 1,600 active groups. Pro-life friend, this donor specifically asked to do this because of what we accomplished together this year, including: >> Reaching over 1,600 campus groups nationwide; > >> Converting up to 19% of pro-abortion students during our campus tours; > >> Celebrating Planned Parenthood closing over 44 facilities this year; and > >> DEFUNDING PLANNED PARENTHOOD of their taxpayer funding for a whole year (something that has never been done before)! And this generous donor is also excited for what we have to come in 2026 – including our effort to Debar Planned Parenthood for THREE years, as well as gearing up our critical election programs heading into the 2026 Midterms. This Power Hour opportunity has the potential to send us into the new year with our best foot forward. But only if you give in the next 60 MINUTES! So, pro-life friend, will you please click one of the links or buttons in this email right away to rush your most generous gift while it will be TRIPLED? Remember: ! ! ! – and every dollar matters. This expires in less than 1 hour. Please don’t wait. For Life, Kristan Hawkins President, Students for Life of America Students for Life of America (SFLA) is a 501(c)3 organization. All donations are 100% tax-deductible. Students for Life of America 1000 Winchester St., Suite 301, Fredericksburg, VA 22401 Office: 540.834.4600 Pop Acta Media | American Action News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: James Carville
subject: If anyone can flip Ohio’s Senate seat, it’s Sherrod Brown!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action
body:
Believe me when I tell you
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6945e797-0004-4270-a2ce-e780400c8f19/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T951685e1-b686-4cfd-a359-c79893940f04/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
Friend, it’s James Carville. I’ve worked on a heck of a lot of campaigns. Over the past 50 years, I’ve won – and I’ve lost – tough elections across the country. So believe me when I tell you: Sherrod Brown’s Senate race in Ohio is SO DAMN IMPORTANT, and the only way he can win it is with YOUR support – right here, right now. [Please chip in every dollar you can spare to Sherrod's campaign and Blue Amp Action ahead of our end-of-month deadline. He just got back in the fight, and they need folks like you by his side ASAP.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcdf2515f-957a-4e76-8321-9d0876b890c7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) We’re at a critical moment in American history. It’s like nothing I’ve ever seen before. Politicians in D.C. are raising costs, cutting veterans' benefits, closing rural hospitals, adding $3 trillion to our national debt – the list goes on. We’re moving further and further away from being anything close to democracy. It’s freakin’ absurd! We have to get our country back on track – and that starts by helping Sherrod Brown win in Ohio. Sherrod has spent his life fighting for workers and families, and he’s got the moral courage to stand up to the powerful special interests that are making life harder and more expensive for everyday people. But outside spending groups will pour an UNGODLY amount of money into this race to defeat Sherrod (I’m talking hundreds of millions of dollars) – and it’s on us to give him the resources to fight back and win. [Folks, if anyone can flip Ohio’s Senate seat, it’s Sherrod Brown. But he can’t do it alone – nobody can: Will you chip in $5 or even $25 right now, split between Sherrod Brown and Blue Amp Action before the end-of-month deadline to power his campaign forward and send him to the Senate?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta088166b-6089-4be7-9d5d-0a7434c7f754/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

---
| | [CONTRIBUTE $25](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6de21e41-d322-4cd2-9cde-ccf5244e595b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T71175eda-b256-4e8b-886e-64ffabff9ed3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

subject: A child vanishes every 40 seconds – can you help today?
body:
Today a child is waiting to be found—will you answer the call?| | | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=59df4a7ef128494e934b5471da778145&_e=h6tNYqbkOpir3JvF3dAhpLNIXVhhOfftgZ6RkpYX1wZUKkBAzvIuIv3EIkdPNQp89SLx2l8zEZq1Z8Exsnql4Rx1T9zXCRNKfamSzxITT_hPjT5_PeFVoccIPoV5zBAusJjeD2iyCUyuiySfamFvQoepjNeQUHhXgU4I0aOZ6ms_HowyboivrHBmGQA-WougqlowpXsN_gekl2SJQoISYvhgq37Zdw9mvj4uE7okw_yTGwch6bEgzj78rrnSIBnPbtsSlRT9ZIRWO9NPSbN2BXlLgHYyT-bz_9ZEFhWOwDwiEJxpG9AmVYNxNKqqXJJlX3V8WJ4D4pURt515Lm-9gBQxnmBz8EldiSm4kDlaQ0DgYtIu_I7MCHXol_cN-vU_d_eIu0Tpprtf-4LL195KJN-E-F08mZLiHF11sUqe0zj1qPgK-qb-yvPO6nbGMCl0lOMvED34XTknsSHFF78mTpXnAk9-b4mccfAIOUFgywDB-MOBglMkF0LXikX2AJNHSy0ToXW6Ieh0Q6MXvRXr38XY8bZZDcMn4WOaJWVadfMWkf84V3VDE-mEd7QxVDcBuu87O4FzVUvmHXumsV8zNtWkdeOhnmqR2lMnxiuIeTa2uiYK-wrIB52ExcMGMZIQ3S-QE-_5s_bvZ0sxS-P9cHn-hSTm9dQ2EK2xrEJ1KDQ7f-zFLwZVBmLeiAUMj8MKrVea6zelzC1Q58IilgxxYgcZ6ps4IQAXpyjFOP49WDlYAnHpgvit-gQVGVsXvU-UvXXNR6zdj9nLtLOAycBZ4MN9lQJ575x4KSBQRAq2necDn38OJ0yAyXuXNnHylpdK0oX38FlRB9A8YmY0rmhc2w%3D%3D)
---
Friend,
---
Every 40 seconds a child goes missing in America.* Many are lured in when they are on Snapchat or TikTok by predators who confine these children to traffic them for sex.Today, a child is waiting to be found. **[For just $25, $50, or $100, you can help reunite a child with their parents before midnight.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=59df4a7ef128494e934b5471da778145&_e=h6tNYqbkOpir3JvF3dAhpLNIXVhhOfftgZ6RkpYX1wZUKkBAzvIuIv3EIkdPNQp89SLx2l8zEZq1Z8Exsnql4Rx1T9zXCRNKfamSzxITT_hPjT5_PeFVoccIPoV5zBAusJjeD2iyCUyuiySfamFvQoepjNeQUHhXgU4I0aOZ6ms_HowyboivrHBmGQA-WougqlowpXsN_gekl2SJQoISYvhgq37Zdw9mvj4uE7okw_yTGwch6bEgzj78rrnSIBnPbtsSlRT9ZIRWO9NPSbN2BXlLgHYyT-bz_9ZEFhWOwDwiEJxpG9AmVYNxNKqqXJJluC9DXSyMU2qTF2A1TIT3kawRloDM9eYQItYurTE5aSxpYgjqEc5uA_twUpq6fXx2hOwbxa5BpeheVANHJT1k81ttyA5kmpOwatbfSLiul8vxemLeojk5RI96oWHNrK3nVo41_wSx4rupCoSzhxXZjvZMW0t8YN2gjDpwe4D9uGqzIOIlCwGqOTdcN0SWSqduXbYek_jB6I6zNq5JK6wbP5b6SKXBk2UypwRw6qI7LHkehVui8wucQgh3vbcXHT-fO7EW6L6W_UJlfXxKjDB_VkRJYbYtUelOhRujPAB4YjNWoXkaplNuE7Wwp9EVbzD9dADXK0gKFtTpgoG24UVvH_8tPstTSTT7RYlakWWC2Gjlh7pLu8_dxA7jzJixLHr-2U7_KTquiJwClJJA-YSy9Lu9WSpmu7Zcc5_rOj_3YJwQB0lQVSPbItAuki9x3u8LxHQy4oY4uoBF1zW11F_HcKY6uUazirm7ZD6Bh1FQjCduGxlbXHhdwUVf0swOQCuu_JwQqbMULVDYUWDsUrkJLg%3D%3D)** My name is Eduardo Verastegui. I produced the movie Sound of Freedom because I couldn't stay silent anymore. I've seen these children after raids -- shaking, crying, whispering "Please don't let them take me again." They look just like my nieces and nephews. Their eyes haunt me every single night.Can you help me put an end to the nightmare for these children?
---
[ YES EDUARDO — I’LL STAND WITH YOU TODAY](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=59df4a7ef128494e934b5471da778145&_e=h6tNYqbkOpir3JvF3dAhpLNIXVhhOfftgZ6RkpYX1wZUKkBAzvIuIv3EIkdPNQp89SLx2l8zEZq1Z8Exsnql4Rx1T9zXCRNKfamSzxITT_hPjT5_PeFVoccIPoV5zBAusJjeD2iyCUyuiySfamFvQoepjNeQUHhXgU4I0aOZ6ms_HowyboivrHBmGQA-WougqlowpXsN_gekl2SJQoISYvhgq37Zdw9mvj4uE7okw_yTGwch6bEgzj78rrnSIBnPbtsSlRT9ZIRWO9NPSbN2BXlLgHYyT-bz_9ZEFhWOwDwiEJxpG9AmVYNxNKqqXJJltSW544yiB9b30FvGwBY6jxBLzDUjqnUhlypIeakOouD3ScPTEg6aoOVPhePXaRre928V0y8nUuzuFcC4zRj_sBd6Gw2SVmA2uHzDNnqCHZUFOnF2Bs__qNQ2qiVQ8UuGVda2UaVR2VKbNXg3-5BC44ybmOsnaerbzJCUu998zLzJh5L7H3WNgiuwUH7h6-L5CKoEoy6NoOZjbhw4v1KAzfbpVM23kkp4xQ61ubgktWZVpuWEMT9yQAmuktThHH0Jzn5_BtbyPlcZfWpk9h6-jkArCfV_oND-0vX2u0OEQge_kNm5ccTYd0nT0NWlPjhJmgB0URhFu9J2VRaQiaCYBWcEV8W_PhohRlCdpDQGSP8QfhRepn-SBn3xeveClTRanec0kF9lqCb9ZkKpHPqaW-coLYjA09gga_SQerwiV88zQEVzxAy2umo_34ogb346JAgolAnqgg_lT2791fQRyrIpZ8SeuC8HGwCGa_5jNmUPKbqXVp8Q-pRDMd3Ia76c3gpSPQHKA2Hm-WrgSa9l6Q%3D%3D)
---
I'm reaching out to you from the **Sound of Freedom Foundation** -- the organization that funds real-time rescue operations in partnership with law enforcement and former special forces to find and extract children from traffickers -- fast.When a tip comes in, the teams made up of former Navy SEALs, undercover investigators, and cyber-intelligence analysts move within hours, sometimes minutes.In partnership with local law enforcement, we pull these children out of hotels, vehicles moving across the country, and brothels.The **Sound of Freedom Foundation** team works tirelessly to protect youth from the ravages of human trafficking and exploitation. Our mission is clear - to create a world where no child ever has to live in fear of being trafficked or exploited. We don't wait.Today -- a child is waiting to be found.I'm personally asking you: will you help me rescue one before midnight?
---
[ GIVE NOW — RESCUE A CHILD WITH ME TODAY](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=59df4a7ef128494e934b5471da778145&_e=h6tNYqbkOpir3JvF3dAhpLNIXVhhOfftgZ6RkpYX1wZUKkBAzvIuIv3EIkdPNQp89SLx2l8zEZq1Z8Exsnql4Rx1T9zXCRNKfamSzxITT_hPjT5_PeFVoccIPoV5zBAusJjeD2iyCUyuiySfamFvQoepjNeQUHhXgU4I0aOZ6ms_HowyboivrHBmGQA-WougqlowpXsN_gekl2SJQoISYvhgq37Zdw9mvj4uE7okw_yTGwch6bEgzj78rrnSIBnPbtsSlRT9ZIRWO9NPSbN2BXlLgHYyT-bz_9ZEFhWOwDwiEJxpG9AmVYNxNKqqXJJld3F_oMBQbtGWv54PC3how5tXaVlIi7QOud8cBjtbnjbMG3CTaPVlcHDdz4Fkp-vJl7btTjvEnUAH7QTWqyNumJQrwtpxOnxewdKz0-LoTqP2WOAxIC_FYZLSZyP4gGjHkDJ5lK-r7Vxq717wdVKwxculuFucrhAwE3tfmfNrycs-ERkSzfrPuUkZfllrgTeMnFt7670ruTp0HvNHZrLXIShmIcpA9EMUa-HIVhBnI6SY9kJcrVFA6bQ4_5pmr6lKnL8XAnsPHdiVvr5fQAuHwsWWXkp5iy2-XYhPNK4SEA10i6wIShX1_6A07xS-Z58hjGJdEkJApICrs5D6PoxGGG5mQOZ1CLzgDMzuNZe0U52suYo9t4IAS_laj-48sRryOHwK__0QBXp_TZrDL9TVQNGFp-RbOuYGOV7mqM3kCzilOfOII5uUPzddzrXDqEkRN2d7BS82qvY1cUILfHsoZ1dOyG2Yb10ZidxMHY5qV3TckD32IWJxyvvtCN-a8f6JQyFOUKhOYP82_wKw4j1Yew%3D%3D)
---
Friend, the facts continue to haunt me and tear me apart every day:
---
* Most victims are only 12 years old
* 35-40 million suffer in sex trafficking worldwide every single day
* Less than 0.04% are ever found - but we can change that

---
We can't continue to stand by and let these children live in fear and terror.Your gift today goes straight to the next rescue:
---
* $25 keeps our 24/7 rescue hotline open one more shift
* $50 provides transportation to a safe house
* $100 gives one rescued child 72 hours in a safe house with a warm bed, food, and someone to hold them while they cry

---
I wish I could do this alone, but I can't.I need you with me today. Please don't close this email without helping. One child's future -- one little boy or girl who still believes someone is coming -- is hanging on what we do in the next few hours.Click below to give today - Every single dollar lands instantly where seconds save lives.
---
[ YES EDUARDO — I’LL STAND WITH YOU TODAY](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=59df4a7ef128494e934b5471da778145&_e=h6tNYqbkOpir3JvF3dAhpLNIXVhhOfftgZ6RkpYX1wZUKkBAzvIuIv3EIkdPNQp89SLx2l8zEZq1Z8Exsnql4Rx1T9zXCRNKfamSzxITT_hPjT5_PeFVoccIPoV5zBAusJjeD2iyCUyuiySfamFvQoepjNeQUHhXgU4I0aOZ6ms_HowyboivrHBmGQA-WougqlowpXsN_gekl2SJQoISYvhgq37Zdw9mvj4uE7okw_yTGwch6bEgzj78rrnSIBnPbtsSlRT9ZIRWO9NPSbN2BXlLgHYyT-bz_9ZEFhWOwDwiEJxpG9AmVYNxNKqqXJJlD9-qqKEJvI4yt1t-3Wwo0yIHDOJpNKnloYwpgHvncd-2OYTzXROA9fMK1OKb6sDMqaZLS35swKD9TSGwUyHKeKEjvzT9yCh4-yHT3XqLMD5D56KxU4HSI_mTBLujMCLJSw3JLKOiVDASJrATLoPdp5mEoy3Rrs2tpL6edlEJSLsjwf-DK3I09IPf9IAbd_6NBIUcJ5QIJH00r8XQdKTwPuZvxaSs6mdl6Pv4mvSeA0Yj4PdI9IGcO0Q42PoCjJ81Tx7pIlROPCqPh3F-qeNFaNYJghJEm6nWFOTjc6xKhJNS2tfXyF6sn1v9AeAkwQltPz4Sy395uHalg1Hie1biI06VceE3A78jikYJVeKqIPgnSCqbPZJ9_Xx1q7xE85bspcRRZC2CcWpuYt8IP_Tjn1bt_1PNj9Y-UhicVydOq0GKHGcqnHphUQVaeS1nEniUc92l-4EL7q3YmRm0kz0d8SAbMDODOwAQugFpCAyFqywnZfPh7SNu1Mcg2hFWRTrfSoRDFiw4CaAf5u7x-XX1XA%3D%3D)
---

clean_body: Today a child is waiting to be found—will you answer the call?| | | Friend, Every 40 seconds a child goes missing in America. Many are lured in when they are on Snapchat or TikTok by predators who confine these children to traffic them for sex.Today, a child is waiting to be found. My name is Eduardo Verastegui. I produced the movie Sound of Freedom because I couldn't stay silent anymore. I've seen these children after raids -- shaking, crying, whispering "Please don't let them take me again." They look just like my nieces and nephews. Their eyes haunt me every single night.Can you help me put an end to the nightmare for these children? I'm reaching out to you from the Sound of Freedom Foundation -- the organization that funds real-time rescue operations in partnership with law enforcement and former special forces to find and extract children from traffickers -- fast.When a tip comes in, the teams made up of former Navy SEALs, undercover investigators, and cyber-intelligence analysts move within hours, sometimes minutes.In partnership with local law enforcement, we pull these children out of hotels, vehicles moving across the country, and brothels.The Sound of Freedom Foundation team works tirelessly to protect youth from the ravages of human trafficking and exploitation. Our mission is clear - to create a world where no child ever has to live in fear of being trafficked or exploited. We don't wait.Today -- a child is waiting to be found.I'm personally asking you: will you help me rescue one before midnight? Friend, the facts continue to haunt me and tear me apart every day: Most victims are only 12 years old 35-40 million suffer in sex trafficking worldwide every single day Less than 0.04% are ever found - but we can change that We can't continue to stand by and let these children live in fear and terror.Your gift today goes straight to the next rescue: $25 keeps our 24/7 rescue hotline open one more shift $50 provides transportation to a safe house $100 gives one rescued child 72 hours in a safe house with a warm bed, food, and someone to hold them while they cry I wish I could do this alone, but I can't.I need you with me today. Please don't close this email without helping. One child's future -- one little boy or girl who still believes someone is coming -- is hanging on what we do in the next few hours.Click below to give today - Every single dollar lands instantly where seconds save lives. From the bottom of my heart, thank you. Eduardo Verastegui Sound of Freedom, Producer For the Sound of Freedom Foundation "Let the little children come to me." -- Jesus 2024 National Center for Missing & Exploited Children 6671 Southwest Freeway, Suite 700, Houston TX 77074

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: WATCH: New Elise For Governor Ad
body:
I want to get this new ad to every voter

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/byDX/?__vbtrk=MzM2MTk2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM2MTk2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Friend, we are on pace for a historic victory!
I am so thankful for all of the support I have already received from across the Empire State and the nation from patriots like you that are committed to saving America from Radical Leftists like Zohran Mamdani and Kathy Hochul.
Thanks to you this race in a traditionally Democrat stronghold is already within the margin of error.
**New York is now a toss-up state!**
Our message of delivering a safer and more affordable state for all is resonating with New Yorkers who are tired of nearly two decades of single party Democrat rule currently led by the embattled and deeply unpopular Governor Kathy Hochul.
**[Kathy Hochul is the _WORST_ governor in America.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/byDX/?__vbtrk=MzM2MTk2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM2MTk2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**

[SAVE NEW YORK](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/byDX/?__vbtrk=MzM2MTk2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM2MTk2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Under her abysmal leadership New York has implemented** _failed bail reform_** and was** _cemented as a sanctuary state_**. The results of these decisions have been devastating as violent criminals are routinely put back on our streets to recommit violent crimes and we are seeing a rise in crime from illegal immigrants.
Her record on handling the state’s economy is even worse. She has** _raised taxes_** and pushed failed policies that** _raised the cost of living_**. With Kathy Hochul at the helm New York has some of the highest taxes, rent, energy prices, utility bills, and cost of groceries in the country.
And when New Yorkers looked to Governor Hochul to rein in the extremism emerging from her own party she decided to bend the knee. She** _helped elect Zohran Mamdani_** , who is a communist and jihadist sympathizer, as Mayor of NYC.
To borrow a phrase from Governor Hochul herself:**"This bullsh*t has to stop"**.
It is clear that Hochul is out of touch and New Yorkers are ready for new leadership. But now it is up to us to lay the groundwork for victory next year.
Every major Democrat donor in the country is being called upon to save Kathy Hochul from her coming reckoning at the ballot box in a last-ditch effort to keep New York blue.
**Firing Hochul and flipping New York red is going to be a team effort** and I need every one of my patriotic supporters right now to help me deliver my message to every voter across the Empire State.

[FIRE KATHY HOCHUL](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/byDX/?__vbtrk=MzM2MTk2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM2MTk2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Friend, here is how you can help today.
My team just dropped a new ad that I want every New Yorker to see:

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/byDX/?__vbtrk=MzM2MTk2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM2MTk2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
_NEW AD: Kathy’s Own Words: This Bullsh*t has to stop._

[WATCH ELISE’S NEW AD](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/byDX/?__vbtrk=MzM2MTk2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM2MTk2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
To defeat Hochul we need to expose her failed record and provide voters with an alternative vision for the state. This ad helps with that mission.
**_[So please, take a minute to watch my new ad, send it to every New Yorker you know, and make a contribution of whatever you can so we can keep it running](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/byDX/?__vbtrk=MzM2MTk2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM2MTk2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_****.**
This is our opportunity to SAVE NEW YORK!
I am grateful for all of the support I am receiving to win this fight. Thank you for continuing to stand by my side.
**Let’s finish the fight to make New York affordable and safe again.**

_Your fellow patriot,_
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/byDX/?__vbtrk=MzM2MTk2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM2MTk2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**Elise Stefanik**
Proud New Yorker
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/byDX/?__vbtrk=MzM2MTk2OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM2MTk2OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

Powered by AI chips from a company you’ve probably never heard of. | | | Don't want to receive our publications? | | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | | NASA deployed | Powered by AI chips from a company you’ve probably never heard of. Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. $10. That’s the donation I’m asking you to split between me and NV Dems before our End of Month Deadline, friend. | | | |
---
$10.
That’s the donation I’m asking you to split between me and NV Dems before our End of Month Deadline, friend. That’s not a typo – **just $10.**
$10 to **COUNTER** the GOP’s scheme to rig the midterm election.
$10 to **EXPOSE** Donald Trump’s plan to ban mail-in voting and suppress our voices.
$10 to **ENSURE** voters know Republicans refused to fix the healthcare crisis they caused.
I know a $10 donation might seem small compared to Team Extreme’s piles of cash, but $10 from each of our grassroots supporters will allow us to:
→ compete with extreme MAGA Republican fraudsters
→ ensure our message reaches every critical voter
→ end this national nightmare once and for all
[**_If you – and everyone else reading this – give before our End of Month Deadline, we can make Trump’s reckless plans backfire, rush resources to must-win districts and flip the THREE seats we need to reclaim the House. Friend, the Wannabe King and his billionaire GOP donors are willing to steal Democratic seats to grow the GOP’s weak majority. Please, friend: Can I count on you to contribute just $10 to me and NV Dems so we can ensure every voter understands the stakes? >>_**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtEEjhuOfSZtU0xhsJqEpvPG0rEXu649JixhdNJbg_58Sor_gFhEEX1sL_K2qyfmiZYVYy5R5VbK8r-7iXyGUFgZEUJ7iIv4rFTgqbH4Bm4Cv_qzmYpO4mayl7ZtHmAB65WvxeSE8clL3gjEHg-WNUZqtBcecUaKjyf0fqHf1JO8-hcPYU3QCou0Gca9L13rOv67ZkvPffgml4V1h2Y7wz5JeM3phgrRowrYXv0kfCK29_J8SQ0aeDlw1v9BUjYwHk-I4hhV349M8cf_yLWynQtEvvxYCFbzm5KvidfaKASs0CQcHzzWUeGnWI6RWdoqXkSBCXLsX1SDIWWqiHzRgvB9gCVLMLcqOMtzJlC9b3njg/4lz/H67l3w4uQxG-62L6PHmc4w/h0/h001.KbF6sHjQyshwMVlPj8AqaxXCtLj6h9n4lBDQicMHv0g)

name: Ryan Busse
subject: I worked in the firearms industry for more than 25 years. Now, I’m working with Gabby to fight for decency and responsibility.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q42025.UDsFRy&refcode=em251128-1-b&t=1&akid=11066%2E3935704%2Ep8BB5g)
---
My name is Ryan Busse. For more than 25 years, I worked as a firearms executive who helped build one of the world’s most iconic gun companies.
When I first started, the gun industry was a different place. It was a place where people like me could still advocate for responsibility and decency.
But over time, I saw firsthand how the gun lobby changed. It gave up its values to stoke fear and extremism. The NRA entertained dangerous conspiracy theories — including attempts to undermine our democracy.
**I had enough. Now, I am working alongside GIFFORDS to hold the gun industry accountable and help save our country.**
[**Before I share more, can you make a donation to help GIFFORDS PAC continue their fight? Their November fundraising deadline is just two days away >>**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q42025.UDsFRy&refcode=em251128-1-b&t=2&akid=11066%2E3935704%2Ep8BB5g)
**[DONATE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q42025.UDsFRy&refcode=em251128-1-b&t=3&akid=11066%2E3935704%2Ep8BB5g)**
Growing up on a ranch, my dad taught me to shoot at a young age. He instilled in me both a love of shooting and a deep sense of responsibility. I still shoot and hunt with my own boys any chance I get and I believe in our rights.
The way I use guns hasn’t changed. What _has_ changed is the NRA.
The NRA was founded to teach firearm safety and promote hunter education. It’s given all that up.
Now, it’s a tool for extremists to push their agenda and undermine even the most basic and common sense regulations like background checks.
They spend millions of dollars every year lobbying lawmakers to bend to their will, even though a majority of gun-owning Americans support these same commonsense solutions.
This isn’t okay. And it doesn’t have to be this way.
**Since leaving the industry, I have joined forces with Gabby Giffords to continue our fight back against the radicalization of the gun lobby.**
GIFFORDS is working to build a national coalition of grassroots supporters committed to advancing commonsense gun safety laws. With your support, we can continue countering the NRA’s lies.
[**If you’re able, please contribute $10 or more to power GIFFORDS PAC’s work. Grassroots support makes a big difference in this work, and our fight cannot wait.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q42025.UDsFRy&refcode=em251128-1-b&t=4&akid=11066%2E3935704%2Ep8BB5g)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $10](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-q42025.mpFqoL&amount=10&refcode=em251128-1-b&t=5&akid=11066%2E3935704%2Ep8BB5g)**

Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.
clean_body: My name is Ryan Busse. For more than 25 years, I worked as a firearms executive who helped build one of the world’s most iconic gun companies. When I first started, the gun industry was a different place. It was a place where people like me could still advocate for responsibility and decency. But over time, I saw firsthand how the gun lobby changed. It gave up its values to stoke fear and extremism. The NRA entertained dangerous conspiracy theories — including attempts to undermine our democracy. I had enough. Now, I am working alongside GIFFORDS to hold the gun industry accountable and help save our country. Growing up on a ranch, my dad taught me to shoot at a young age. He instilled in me both a love of shooting and a deep sense of responsibility. I still shoot and hunt with my own boys any chance I get and I believe in our rights. The way I use guns hasn’t changed. What has changed is the NRA. The NRA was founded to teach firearm safety and promote hunter education. It’s given all that up. Now, it’s a tool for extremists to push their agenda and undermine even the most basic and common sense regulations like background checks. They spend millions of dollars every year lobbying lawmakers to bend to their will, even though a majority of gun-owning Americans support these same commonsense solutions. This isn’t okay. And it doesn’t have to be this way. Since leaving the industry, I have joined forces with Gabby Giffords to continue our fight back against the radicalization of the gun lobby. GIFFORDS is working to build a national coalition of grassroots supporters committed to advancing commonsense gun safety laws. With your support, we can continue countering the NRA’s lies. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you for fighting alongside GIFFORDS. — Ryan Busse Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org

subject: They Called It a “Facade” – Tribal Elders Break Silence on $100M Government Fraud We Just Exposed
body:
I’ve spent my life going undercover to shine light on corruption most journalists are afraid to touch.
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1220933/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvRGpTRHl2cEZGYw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTExMjg/LbmNsQjcwSTdrWA/qP2hpZHM9bmN5Z0JTOVpMQzZyTTBscw/gaSmwSg/s1i5f235968)

| | | | [****](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
[****](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) Dear Patriot,

I’ve spent my life going undercover to shine light on corruption most journalists are afraid to touch.

But nothing prepared me for the raw pain I witnessed on the Susanville Indian Rancheria.

Tribal elders – proud Native Americans – sat across from my hidden camera and **fought back tears** as they learned outsiders had used their tribe’s name to pocket **over $100 million** in no-bid federal contracts... while their own people lived without basic insulation in their homes or proper healthcare for their elders.

One grandmother told us:

**“We don’t benefit a single dime from any of that. Why do our elders have to suffer with no healthcare? ...They just ripped us off. They need to be in jail.”**

Another elder called it straight: **“All a facade... They’re using us as rented Indians.”**

These are not paid actors. These are real tribal members who discovered – because of **OMG’s undercover investigation** – that their sacred sovereignty was being sold out from under them.

[**Watch the heartbreaking footage for yourself right now**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

What you’re seeing is the human cost of a broken federal program that was supposed to help disadvantaged tribes... but instead lined the pockets of connected insiders.

We didn’t just expose the scheme – tribal members stood up at their council meeting and **thanked OMG by name** for finally giving them a voice.

But exposing corruption is only step one.

Step two is **holding them accountable** – and that fight is just beginning.

We’re already digging deeper, filing records requests, and preparing follow-ups that will force answers from the Small Business Administration and the contractors involved.

None of this happens without courageous patriots like you.

Will you stand with the Susanville tribal members today and help us demand justice?

**_[**Donate $25, $50, $100 or whatever you can right now to fuel this investigation**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)_**.

Every dollar you give goes directly to boots-on-the-ground journalism that the mainstream media refuses to do.

Because of supporters like you, real Native voices are finally being heard – and real change is coming.

Thank you for having the courage to fight with us.

In Truth,
James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

P.S. One elder looked straight into our hidden camera and pleaded: **“Please help us. Please give us a voice.”** You can answer that plea today to [**help OMG keep going**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.).

---
[****](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1220933/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTExMjg/LbmNsQjcwSTdrWA/qP2hpZHM9bmN5Z0JTOVpMQzZyTTBscw/gaSmwSg/seia67fe49c)

_**Socialism has failed everywhere it has been tried.**_
This isn't a new social experiment; Socialism has been tried for over 100 years and always ends in dismal failure.

clean_body: I'm not one for sugarcoating. This race is razor-thin, and I need your immediate support to build back the momentum we need heading into the election year. polling just dropped: we're trailing our Democrat opponent. I'm not one for sugarcoating. is on the line, and that's not an exaggeration. If we want to revive this nation, we start at the state level: with unapologetic, America First governors who stare down the administrative state and actually deliver results. The Democrat Machine has already thrown its weight behind Amy Acton - they'll spend whatever it takes to flip Ohio. And if she wins, we know exactly what's coming: Dr. Amy Acton - Ohio's Chief Lockdown Officer - ordered businesses to close, banned in-person worship, and shut down our schools during COVID-19, causing lasting harm to kids, families, and communities. She was wrong then. She's wrong now. But she still defends every decision. If she becomes Governor, she'll be a roadblock to everything we're fighting for - tax cuts, deregulation, parental rights, election integrity - and she'll do it with the backing of the national Democrat Machine. ONLY thing we ask is for every America First patriot to chip in SOMETHING - whether you live in Ohio or not. Hi null,

I hope you had a wonderful Thanksgiving filled with rest, loved ones, and plenty of home-cooked food. 🥧
Today’s Black Friday, and I’m sure your inbox is filled with emails. But while you’re hopefully relaxing and enjoying some delicious leftovers, I want to ask you to consider spending in a different way this year:
👉 I’m asking you to **[chip in $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9531?t=3&akid=1491%2E49239%2ESowUIv)** on one of the biggest days for the U.S. economy – so I can keep fighting in the Senate to make sure our economic growth benefits everyone, not just billionaires, politicians in D.C., or talking heads on T.V.
👉 I’m asking you to **[chip in $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9531?t=4&akid=1491%2E49239%2ESowUIv)** to help us fight back against Republican Mike Rogers and his MAGA billionaire donors – who will do anything to win this race.
👉 I’m asking you to **[chip in $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9531?t=5&akid=1491%2E49239%2ESowUIv)** to my grassroots campaign for Senate – to ensure Democrats can flip the Senate and pave the way for a brighter future for all.
We’ve set a $15,000 midnight goal to stay on track – and every grassroots donation gets us closer.
__[Null, I hope you’ll consider donating $5 to keep Michigan blue, flip the Senate, and help build a stronger, fairer economy for working Americans.](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9531?t=6&akid=1491%2E49239%2ESowUIv)
| | [Donate](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9489?t=7&akid=1491%2E49239%2ESowUIv)

With grit and gratitude,
Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9490?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=8&akid=1491%2E49239%2ESowUIv) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9488?t=9&akid=1491%2E49239%2ESowUIv)

Thank you,
Haley

name: Jim Jordan
subject: It ALL comes to a head on December 2nd
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Van Epps for Congress
body:
December 2nd is a CRITICAL House Special Election in TN
Protect the House majority
| Fellow Patriot,
Look, I’m not gonna sugarcoat it – we’re barely clinging to our majority in the House and there's a razor-thin line between forward progress, and watching the radical Left torch everything we fought for...

_**CLOSING Biden's open border.
DE-FANGING the Deep State.

clean_body: | | | = Derek, A new Washington Post analysis just revealed something stunning: the top 20 billionaires in America have spent nearly $5 BILLION influencing our elections over the past decade. Their impact? They’ve elected Republican politicians who cast votes that increase their wealth even more while hardworking families struggle to make ends meet. This is exactly why taking back the Senate is so critical. We need more leaders in Washington who will fight for everyday folks, not rubber stamp an agenda that lets the ultra-wealthy rig the system in their favor at the taxpayers’ expense. The trouble is that we're falling short of our end-of-month goal, with just a few days left until our deadline. If we don't close this gap, we'll be at a serious disadvantage against the Republican billionaire money that could flood into Mark’s race at any moment. The only thing standing in the way of the billionaires that want to defeat Senator Warner and expand Republican control in the Senate is you and the thousands of other grassroots supporters reading this email. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: = = = = = = Thank you, Team Warner Before you go: Republicans will spend whatever it takes to hold onto power, no matter how unpopular their agenda is with voters. This weekend, we’re shopping small and local. | | | Peter, The administration has spent the last several months attacking working families, immigrants, and people of color. Meanwhile, corporations have funded this agenda so they can secure more tax giveaways and rake in higher profits. **Enough is enough. If they profit off our pain, they don’t deserve our dollars.** This holiday season, we are investing in the people, where the real power lies. We won’t spend our money at corporations that choose greed — like Target, Home Depot, and Amazon — and we’re redirecting our support to our own communities. _Our collective action can move things forward._ **[We are taking our power back by choosing where to invest our funds. name: Team Taylor
subject: NEWS: Elon Musk is back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20251128-850&t=1&akid=850%2E294397%2EJO75Yd)
Did you see this news? ⬇️
[](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251128_1_ak.n8_oRm&amount=10&refcode=em20251128-850&t=3&akid=850%2E294397%2EJO75Yd)
**Elon Musk is planning to re-enter politics just in time for 2026.** And if history is any guide, he’s going to spend millions of dollars to boost right-wing extremists like our opponent.
[**Before we say more, can you rush a $10 to support Judge Chris Taylor’s campaign?**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251128_1_ak.n8_oRm&amount=10&refcode=em20251128-850&t=4&akid=850%2E294397%2EJO75Yd)
**[Donate $10 ››](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251128_1_ak.n8_oRm&amount=10&refcode=em20251128-850&t=5&akid=850%2E294397%2EJO75Yd)**
We’ve seen this playbook before. When Elon Musk meddled in a past Wisconsin judicial race, he poured massive sums of money into attack ads and dark-money efforts trying to buy a court seat.
But through an energized grassroots effort, Wisconsinites were able to defeat his preferred candidate.
Folks like you stood up, chipped in, and stopped right-wing billionaires from flipping the balance of power.
**Now, Elon Musk is signaling he’s ready for revenge, and if he dumps millions into Wisconsin to boost our extreme opponent, Maria Lazar, we need to be ready.**
The Wisconsin Supreme Court race could decide the future of abortion access, workers’ rights, and fair state legislative maps in our state. We can’t let dark-money billionaires drown out Wisconsin voters.
[**Can you chip in $10 to help us prepare for whatever Elon Musk throws at us?**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251128_1_ak.n8_oRm&amount=10&refcode=em20251128-850&t=6&akid=850%2E294397%2EJO75Yd)
**[Donate $10 ››](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251128_1_ak.n8_oRm&amount=10&refcode=em20251128-850&t=25&akid=850%2E294397%2EJO75Yd)**
Thanks for standing with us,
Team Taylor
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_footer?refcode=em20251128-850&t=26&refcode2=850_294397_JO75Yd&akid=850%2E294397%2EJO75Yd)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=27&akid=850%2E294397%2EJO75Yd)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=850%2E294397%2EJO75Yd)

Email us: [info@chrisforjustice.com](info@chrisforjustice.com)
Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
PO Box 1921
Madison, WI 53701
