| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/aaronregunberg/p/i-know-what-big-oils-thankful-for?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

I don't have access to Big Oil's internal emails about this. But they sure look wildly desperate to dodge the growing array of lawsuits over the damage caused by their decades-long scheme to deceive the public about climate change. Oil companies are doing [whatever](https://substack.com/redirect/3d03c7c8-e563-4061-8108-430fe2632633?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) they possibly can to keep the plaintiffs in these suits (cities, counties, states, and Native American tribes) from having their day in court--and as some of the most powerful corporations in the world, there's a lot they can do. They're [pushing](https://substack.com/redirect/924c47c1-0a8a-40f4-9573-44f6a0a43e08?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Congress to pass a blanket waiver of liability for climate-related damages. They've [deputized](https://substack.com/redirect/ebaa6da3-1162-4b4b-990b-00d0e1afe7ba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the Trump administration to threaten states that are bringing suits. And they have tried--[again](https://substack.com/redirect/fdb882d4-ffde-4367-b548-29719fc898d2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and [again](https://substack.com/redirect/838a64c9-17bd-4037-969d-24b0f5a61684?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and [again](https://substack.com/redirect/93c028f7-0b6d-4d97-8177-82b05564aa5c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and [again](https://substack.com/redirect/55af6610-93d6-4dda-a166-997817d60ed7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and [again](https://substack.com/redirect/dfdf4fba-01c8-4448-ae64-a502d231dbf8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and [again](https://substack.com/redirect/e9981e47-4453-419a-a481-283fb67b8bfe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--to get the Supreme Court to step in and dismiss the cases against them, based on an often contradictory set of legal theories claiming that the state laws they're being sued under are preempted--i.e., nullified by federal law.
Big Oil has tried five times since 2021 to get the Supreme Court to step in and dismiss these lower court cases, and so far the court has rejected them all. But now the industry is trying once again, petitioning the justices to take up a case filed by the City and County of Boulder against ExxonMobil and Suncor. Last spring, the Colorado Supreme Court [ruled](https://substack.com/redirect/4b11e4aa-f47d-4d01-a1c2-9000fdb1eeb0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that, after seven long years of delay tactics by the industry, this case could finally advance to discovery and trial.
There's not much that differentiates this latest petition for a writ of certiorari from all the prior ones that the U.S. Supreme Court has already rejected. Legally, the fossil fuel industry's claims are laughable. Whereas the Supreme Court generally takes cases that can resolve a conflict between different circuit courts, the defendants here are pushing a new theory: They're claiming that the suit is preempted, not by any particular federal law, or even by federal common law, but rather by the "structure of our constitutional system." The argument is just as vague and meaningless as it sounds, and to date no appellate court has accepted it.
The Supreme Court is also required to limit its review to final judgments in state cases, versus interlocutory--i.e., nondefinitive--decisions. But in this case, the oil industry is asking SCOTUS to overturn the Colorado Supreme Court's rejection of the fossil fuel industry's motion to dismiss Boulder's complaint--a decision that doesn't decide the case, just lets it move forward. As Boulder [argues](https://substack.com/redirect/7b38d7ab-d0b1-4567-8ce6-b8f8da5478f4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), intervening at this early point would require SCOTUS to "wade into a thicket of preliminary questions that promise nothing but rabbit holes and dead ends."
So why doesn't the oil industry want to wait for a final judgment? Presumably, because allowing the case to proceed would mean the plaintiffs can, in a phase called discovery, compel the companies to release various materials that they don't want released--like documents revealing their deceptive conduct. So they're asking the Supreme Court to step in. And they seem to be betting that, this time, their allies on the court will throw ethical considerations to the wind to grant them the review they've been so furiously pursuing.
What do judicial ethics codes have to do with climate deception? It all comes down to simple math. Every year, the Supreme Court receives many thousands of cert petitions. To grant a writ of certiorari, four of the nine justices must agree to take one of these cases. Given that lower threshold, any time a justice recuses themselves based on conflicts of interest it reduces the likelihood that a case will be heard. In this case, multiple justices have conflicts of interest that should take them out of the running to consider these suits--if such principles matter to the Supreme Court's Republican majority.
One of these conflicted justices is Amy Coney Barrett. Barrett's father, Michael Coney, worked for nearly three decades as one of Shell's top attorneys, during which time he was also a "[major participant](https://substack.com/redirect/567ab547-6246-47a9-b6d3-0a8b635508f1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)" in the American Petroleum Institute. Coney was at Shell in 1988, when the company issued a "confidential" [report](https://substack.com/redirect/c330130a-3083-42f5-a3a5-a92385d92b69?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) projecting that the continued burning of fossil fuels would cause "fast and dramatic" increases in global temperatures that "could have major social, economic, and political consequences." He was at Shell a year later, when the company produced another "confidential group planning" [document](https://substack.com/redirect/112d73ab-e844-4a5c-adcf-cc7a963ba463?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) predicting that, if fossil fuels were not phased out, climate change would cause "more violent weather--more storms, more droughts, more deluges" that would create so much chaos that "civilization could prove a fragile thing." He was still there as Shell began [redesigning](https://substack.com/redirect/45263fae-2b70-4f60-87c7-5ed3ad1ae922?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) its own infrastructure to prepare for that "violent weather" the company knew was coming. And Coney remained at Shell over the following decade, while the company played a lead role in Big Oil's fraudulent campaign to lock us into those nightmare climate scenarios it predicted.
While Boulder's case does not include Shell as a defendant, most of the other climate deception suits--which the Supreme Court's ruling, if it chooses to take up Boulder, would invariably affect--absolutely do. Given Coney's highly relevant role at Shell, it's entirely possible that he could end up being deposed in these proceedings. So Justice Barrett's decision in Boulder is essentially a choice about whether to subject her own father to potentially significant embarrassment and reputational harm. Clearly, she has a conflict of interest on this topic. In fact, she is so clearly conflicted that during her time on the Seventh Circuit--when she was actually bound by a [code of ethics](https://substack.com/redirect/40dbb000-9d23-467d-9bd2-ffff7c236b72?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--she regularly recused from cases involving Shell. And yet, since reaching the Supreme Court--which, unlike every other federal court, is not subject to any [binding](https://substack.com/redirect/c29974dc-72b0-4a63-b815-918b099ab28c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) code of ethics--Barrett has regularly participated in cert conferences on climate deception cases. Because why not? Who's going to stop her?
Another justice, Samuel Alito, has a more traditional conflict of interest: He [owns](https://substack.com/redirect/a906385d-18aa-4651-91a9-7647b68e5595?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) thousands of dollars of stock in the oil giants ConocoPhillips and Phillips 66. Unlike Barrett, Alito has recused himself from considering most, though not all, of the fossil fuel industry's previous climate deception cert petitions. This includes a 2023 attempt by Big Oil on a prior ruling in Boulder's case, in which ExxonMobil specifically urged Alito not to recuse himself, arguing in its brief that the case was "an ideal vehicle for resolving the questions presented" because "it involves a smaller set of defendants than those cases and is thus less likely to present recusal issues." (Never mind that Alito also has up to $100,000 invested in a [high dividend yield fund](https://substack.com/redirect/493b7cee-c2e9-4bd0-8eed-c3cc9043dd83?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that maintains ExxonMobil as its third-largest holding.)
Thankfully, Alito did not take Exxon's directive, recusing himself from Boulder in 2023 and from several other climate deception cases afterward, including a petition this past January for the Supreme Court to take up Honolulu's climate suit, which was virtually identical to the current Boulder petition. And let's give credit where it's due--it's [not often](https://substack.com/redirect/7fec94c9-cb02-4dbe-b20a-2cf6c8b75ef8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) we have reason to celebrate Samuel Alito's integrity.
Unfortunately, Alito has not been consistent in this stance. He joined a dissent authored by Justice Clarence Thomas in the _[Alabama v. California](https://substack.com/redirect/9e5825e0-2e83-47cc-9e3c-f2c9eeb26035?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ request, in which Republican attorneys general asked the court to stop climate deception lawsuits from California, Connecticut, Minnesota, New Jersey, and Rhode Island. And he did not recuse himself from considering a petition to review an Eighth Circuit ruling about Minnesota's climate deception case, which--like Boulder's--does not include ConocoPhillips as a defendant.
But if Alito has a conflict of interest in one of these cases because he's invested in ConocoPhillips, then he has a conflict of interest in all of them--even the ones that don't have ConocoPhillips as a named defendant. That's because the Supreme Court's actions in one case will affect all of the others. Indeed, it would be particularly outrageous if Alito--after recusing from Boulder on a different issue and recusing from Honolulu on the same issue--were to help decide whether the Supreme Court should grant Exxon's wish to take up Boulder's case.
But that may be exactly what happens. We are, after all, living in an age of [elite impunity](https://substack.com/redirect/1a3fe645-a540-4833-942b-4af1e94ee382?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). More and more Americans are asking whether the wealthy and powerful can do whatever they want--even participate in [underage sex trafficking](https://substack.com/redirect/d17588dc-7e28-49c7-9d2f-12f1a31693aa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--and get away with it. That's the same question at the center of these climate deception cases: Can Big Oil knowingly destroy the livability of our one and only planet, yet face zero consequences for exposing untold numbers to [financial ruin](https://substack.com/redirect/310aa9fb-781d-4389-a185-4c53560eb66f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [death](https://substack.com/redirect/74a90bf6-66a8-4801-b886-d713f1eeaebb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and the chaos of [increasingly likely](https://substack.com/redirect/6c859bf1-5c46-4414-a22c-9117b18d12b1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) [civilizational collapse](https://substack.com/redirect/0dbef5b4-5558-42e8-9d3e-1d38a26ddf8c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)?
The fossil fuel industry desperately wants the answer to be yes, which is why these companies are working so furiously to get the Supreme Court to step in and, as Exxon's assistant general counsel for litigation [put it](https://substack.com/redirect/be08c265-539d-4151-8fbe-bdabe6f252af?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) during a recent Federalist Society talk, crush these climate suits "once and for all." Luckily for Big Oil, its conflicted allies--or, perhaps more accurately, its investors and family members--on the court don't have a binding ethics code to stop them from weighing in.
But they do have to face public disapprobation. Indeed, it seems likely that Alito's past recusals may have been motivated in part by the [negative attention](https://substack.com/redirect/d6c52e12-bd69-414e-9395-f04ae6643b26?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) he was receiving at the time for his previous conflicts of interest. So we must keep making as much of a racket as we possibly can on this. And we must hope that Exxon's lawyer was right when he [complained](https://substack.com/redirect/be08c265-539d-4151-8fbe-bdabe6f252af?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) at that Federalist Society event that communities seeking climate accountability will just "keep trying." Big Oil wants us to succumb to nihilism when it comes to climate change. Disappoint them: Don't give in.
* * *
This essay appeared in _[The New Republic](https://substack.com/redirect/21ff927f-7e81-41e4-9686-2e392a0589ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_. They're great, check them out!

name: Powered by People
subject: Adopt a college campus today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
Powered by People has been hard at work organizing on college campuses across Texas. But to maximize our impact in 2026, we need to greatly scale up our campus program. This will allow us to register more Texans to vote, stay in touch with more students to ensure they turn out, and engage more campuses in key areas. **That’s why we’re officially launching our Adopt a Campus Program.**
**Your campus is: Baylor University**
By chipping in to adopt a college campus, you’ll fuel on-the-ground organizing that meets students where they are, builds lasting connections, and wins more votes up and down the ballot. Every campus we organize on brings us closer to winning the key races that will shape the future of Texas and our country.
[**So, can you chip in $3 today to officially adopt Baylor University as your campus? Your support directly powers the volunteers and organizers who will register, turn out, and stay in touch with students throughout Texas.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20251128.BCZTiP&refcode=ema20251128-240489&t=2&akid=240489%2E444211%2EOXwJ-R)

clean_body: Powered by People has been hard at work organizing on college campuses across Texas. But to maximize our impact in 2026, we need to greatly scale up our campus program. This will allow us to register more Texans to vote, stay in touch with more students to ensure they turn out, and engage more campuses in key areas. That’s why we’re officially launching our Adopt a Campus Program. Your campus is: Baylor University By chipping in to adopt a college campus, you’ll fuel on-the-ground organizing that meets students where they are, builds lasting connections, and wins more votes up and down the ballot. Every campus we organize on brings us closer to winning the key races that will shape the future of Texas and our country. Thank you, Powered by People Paid for by Powered by People, , not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Abdul El-Sayed
subject: Family
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
I’m grateful for my family at home, and I’m grateful for you, Peter.
# [ ](https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/29?refcode=&t=1&akid=1378%2E251025%2ECeFhHB)
Peter,
I hope you had a relaxing Thanksgiving.
Ours was full of small moments that remind me what really matters — my family, my girls, and the future I want them to inherit.
[](https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251128-1-ak.UrODYq&amount=10&refcode=em20251128-1359&t=3&akid=1378%2E251025%2ECeFhHB)
I also found myself thinking about the family we’re building together through this campaign.
Just like a biological family, we’re not all the same. We come from different backgrounds and have unique experiences. But we all look out for each other like family members do.
[](https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251128-1-ak.UrODYq&amount=10&refcode=em20251128-1359&t=4&akid=1378%2E251025%2ECeFhHB)
We show our care about each other’s health by advocating for Medicare for All.
We work together to make a positive impact by standing up to corporate greed.
And we’re there for one another during the tough moments, because that’s what family does.
I’m grateful for my family at home, and I’m grateful for you, Peter.
**Thank you for being a part of this journey. Knowing we’re in this together gives me the strength to keep going every day.**
Your friend in the fight,
Abdul

**[Donate ››](https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251128-1-ak.UrODYq&amount=10&refcode=em20251128-1359&t=5&akid=1378%2E251025%2ECeFhHB)**
* * *
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-footer?refcode=email-footer&amount=&t=6&refcode2=1378_251025_CeFhHB&akid=1378%2E251025%2ECeFhHB)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you, so thank you for reading this message. To contribute via check, please address it to Abdul for U.S. Senate, PO Box 126, St. Clair Shores, MI 48080.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails?t=8&akid=1378%2E251025%2ECeFhHB)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.abdulformichigan.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=9&akid=1378%2E251025%2ECeFhHB)

Email us: [info@abdulformichigan.com](info@abdulformichigan.com)
Paid for by Abdul for U.S. Senate.

* * *
# **Trump vows to "permanently pause" Third World migration**
President Donald Trump announced in a late Thanksgiving Thursday Truth Social post that he intends **[to"permanently pause migration from all Third World Countries"](https://substack.com/redirect/e59d2a79-60f8-4ec4-9920-08e976a6ff35?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to allow the U.S. system to "fully recover," terminate Biden's illegal admissions, end all federal benefits for noncitizens, and "denaturalize migrants who undermine domestic tranquility" while deporting anyone who is "a public charge, security risk, or non-compatible with Western Civilization."
* **Statement follows deadly DC ambush by Afghan refugee:** Trump's comments came after a Wednesday attack near the White House that killed 20-year-old West Virginia National Guard member Sarah Beckstrom and critically wounded Guardsman Andrew Wolfe, 24, allegedly carried out by 29-year-old Afghan national Rahmanullah Lakanwal, who entered the U.S. in 2021 under Biden's "Operation Allies Welcome" program after serving in an elite CIA-backed counterterrorism unit in Afghanistan.
* **Administration pursues sweeping immigration review:** In response to the shooting, the Trump administration announced a "full-scale, rigorous reexamination" of every green card holder from at least 19 countries "of concern" and immediately suspended "processing of all immigration requests relating to Afghan nationals" indefinitely pending review of vetting protocols, with USCIS Director Joseph Edlow stating Trump requested the gargantuan review.

* * *
# **CIA director admits Afghan terrorist "should never have been allowed" into U.S.**
CIA Director John Ratcliffe said Rahmanullah Lakanwal, 29, who allegedly killed 20-year-old National Guard member Sarah Beckstrom and critically wounded Andrew Wolfe, 24, near the White House, **["should have never been allowed to come here" ](https://substack.com/redirect/f7aca050-8ded-48f9-a5ac-cc9b01887937?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**despite serving in a CIA-backed elite Afghan commando "Zero Unit" and being vetted by the CIA and National Counterterrorism Center, with a senior official saying "he was clean on all checks."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f7aca050-8ded-48f9-a5ac-cc9b01887937?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Rahmanullah Lakanwal, Source: FBI
* **Suspect admitted under Biden 's Operation Allies Welcome program:** Lakanwal was welcomed into the U.S. in 2021 under Biden's "Operation Allies Welcome" program after serving in Afghanistan, settling in Bellingham, Washington with his wife and five children in a $2,000-per-month apartment and reportedly working as an Amazon Flex contractor, with a childhood friend telling The New York Times that Lakanwal suffered mental problems from what he saw in Afghanistan, saying "when he saw blood, bodies, and the wounded, he could not tolerate it."
* **Program faced scrutiny over flawed vetting process:** Operation Allies Welcome, which admitted roughly 76,000 Afghans into the U.S., previously faced criticism over alarming vetting flaws highlighted in two DHS Inspector General reports, with one 2022 report finding that DHS officers "did not always have critical data to properly screen, vet, or inspect the evacuees," prompting Trump to halt all Afghan refugee resettlement and indefinitely stop "processing of all immigration requests relating to Afghan nationals."
* **Trump orders sweeping immigration reviews and additional troops:** Following the attack, Trump directed a comprehensive review of green card holders from 19 countries of concern and ordered an additional 500 National Guard troops to defend DC on top of the existing 2,100+ troops, while prosecutors will pursue the death penalty against Lakanwal according to Trump administration officials, with U.S. Attorney Jeanine Pirro saying "this is what happens in this country when people are allowed in who are not properly vetted."

* * *

name: Matt Van Epps
subject: You probably don’t know me yet. That's okay
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Van Epps for Congress
body:
True leadership emerges in the heat of battle
| | | | https://secure.winred.com/matt-van-epps-for-congress/night-stalkers-dont-quit-short_p-pdg?&utm;_term=SDA
---
|
---
Hey, Matt Van Epps here.

You probably don’t know me yet. No worries, it's okay.

**What matters is the motto I lived by in the 160th Special Operations Aviation Regiment:_Night Stalkers Don’t Quit._**

We fly low and fast in the black of night so the best shooters on the planet can do their job. Over the course of nine combat tours, including deployments in Afghanistan and Iraq, I piloted the Apache attack helicopter, and then MH-47 Chinooks.

What I learned was this: **true leadership emerges in the heat of battle.** Decisions must be made to save lives and complete the mission – _no matter the odds._

**Right now, I have a new mission. The stakes are very different, but the future of the nation hangs in the balance.**

**On December 2nd, the House Special Election in TN-07 decides whether the Trump agenda moves forward, or is put on life support. House Republicans are barely clinging to their majority, and it's my job to hold the line. If we fail, things will get real ugly, real fast.[_Will you rush in a donation now?_](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=397cc82dd7ad402ba4c71edc31982c1e&_e=1tSVYnB7Aji0lBaOGyYY38bFMOF0RLbHfnQMBVuCQvwi5Tz2FTA2j863-46LNKm_WYf0xB8vI6qShnluInZgX4kLW3B0PcfwtwcgpPRPyU4HaYcFEsbW7A-dXboxElyTLRvuJ_k2pwVL2N6tPQnKv2f88MZ6SwVSEWaEYX1ou9kggDQhbOrmBKE3SGVXLxAPWESeZsM4aqu3eo_ZPcDX-wy6BLma-798Gldzd1m8vXJjttbwxH4JG3eVXocNFQQ0zmWFMNPELNKpHWNGk2p18bT0VzNfMH7NZ8P7CjiNmcZxbg28HaPgs3-02kShFxrTL4-ejphSrHQeRrCMejIIP-liHuD3KJ8oNOsrDu1p1K1h_-99u5cTZY3zeUNBw0wMvd1TwGRmsQ99Q8ue4AyZLRTm_BEAa0P5eqD6Mb2xoUrupcXWqb7i6tNbsbxO0JK8g42rnBe9XBNN107jEB1X65Iwg93lZmdebky_tsQG140JhHmz0IF1wtPL7zbc9XdWh2Lm9pRA7jqVViznFJuXrg%3D%3D)**

The Democrats are all-in on a radical who's campaigning alongside **Jasmine Crockett** , was previously **endorsed by the Democratic Socialists of America** , and brags and laughs hysterically on video about her personal **bullying of ICE agents and law enforcement.** She's already being called "_**the AOC of Tennessee**_ " and is gunning to be the **newest member of "The Squad."** _No thank you._

**I didn’t raise my right hand at West Point in 2001 as a member of the "Class of 9/11" and serve nine combat tours so America Last politicians could open our borders, fund endless wars, and crush the middle class under the weight of Big Government.**

**President Trump offered me his Complete and Total Endorsement, telling the people of my district: “Matt Van Epps is a WARRIOR who will never let you down.”**

_I’m running to prove him right._

Remember – this is not just some race. Next year, every single member of Congress will be running. **This race, right now, is the firewall._And it's the only game in town._**

**[I’m not asking for much – just your endorsement and whatever you can pitch in right now. $5 keeps a door-knocker on the street. $25 fuels a mail piece. $100 runs digital ads that could flip undecideds.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=397cc82dd7ad402ba4c71edc31982c1e&_e=1tSVYnB7Aji0lBaOGyYY38bFMOF0RLbHfnQMBVuCQvwi5Tz2FTA2j863-46LNKm_WYf0xB8vI6qShnluInZgX4kLW3B0PcfwtwcgpPRPyU4HaYcFEsbW7A-dXboxElyTLRvuJ_k2pwVL2N6tPQnKv1IDsB9e9B-NUEAgdXHDLQmEsySAXg-Z0rI4tI9snxB7IA3jOv95C8FfRZmpZ_Bhp7P2oVA1Rter9hkIAFoCjgEXUHTNr-g3Zwp6p6Dr082POSm8R3BzlF1__YoAwbdzXU62D9khKLWBGThRSC6f8uRciqeEAhF1llQJtL74rpDY7X2GkBZ9LqjjHBUNqGY8QCU7uWppsWNDSNcHLKk7FRQBtyt11YjP-AD2FxTbZ27N8UF9suBQ0fHbIoX5VIsPyidrdPtqb0ZgXV5GbKs4935_COxapeSq0a3qmUDeL2djGeeq9lKE3u-22l8q22TLX6KpCN-l04aLyfaz3myZqYDB6t0EUNgeJmlTojdvc6agj4FDUL-dg7U9gdJnr6V-xw%3D%3D)**

_**Night Stalkers Don’t Quit.**_

**But I can’t hold this line alone. Lock in with me before December 2nd comes and goes. Let’s bring the thunder one more time.**

Thank you for your commitment.
Sincerely,
Matt Van Epps

clean_body: True leadership emerges in the heat of battle | | | | | Hey, Matt Van Epps here. You probably don’t know me yet. No worries, it's okay. What matters is the motto I lived by in the 160th Special Operations Aviation Regiment:Night Stalkers Don’t Quit. We fly low and fast in the black of night so the best shooters on the planet can do their job. Over the course of nine combat tours, including deployments in Afghanistan and Iraq, I piloted the Apache attack helicopter, and then MH-47 Chinooks. What I learned was this: true leadership emerges in the heat of battle. Decisions must be made to save lives and complete the mission – no matter the odds. Right now, I have a new mission. The stakes are very different, but the future of the nation hangs in the balance. On December 2nd, the House Special Election in TN-07 decides whether the Trump agenda moves forward, or is put on life support. House Republicans are barely clinging to their majority, and it's my job to hold the line. If we fail, things will get real ugly, real fast. | | The Democrats are all-in on a radical who's campaigning alongside Jasmine Crockett , was previously endorsed by the Democratic Socialists of America , and brags and laughs hysterically on video about her personal bullying of ICE agents and law enforcement. She's already being called "the AOC of Tennessee " and is gunning to be the newest member of "The Squad." No thank you. name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: From diaper banks to food pantries, we’re making sure no one goes without this winter
body:
Here are members of our campaign team helping the Metropolitan Detroit Diaper Bank package up pajamas and school supplies for kids in Metro Detroit: | | |
---
Friend, This Black Friday, instead of bargain shopping on Amazon, I hope you’ll consider supporting families in need. When we created our Rooted in Community Leadership PAC (RIC PAC), it was always about much more than training young people and candidates to run for office and give back to their communities. **It was also about direct community support.** This year alone, RIC PAC has donated nearly $100,000, mostly to nonprofits providing critical services to our communities. **Members of our campaign are in the community every week, whether it’s supporting diaper drives, collecting canned food, or helping out at community dinners.** Here are members of our campaign team helping the Metropolitan Detroit Diaper Bank package up pajamas and school supplies for kids in Metro Detroit:[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtiu64DAa6R6mEIlUl6sWbtsvPhtry74smccu5zEUdPpMD2ijS4G5qWYmkZPcf3KSLyRwc0lNAjXIm2GbrJrFEBdlIOgJ1IKatoiC0hJ-sqGnv0MvV01IhBbMpqrSJCtfzOS5qJyDWFOUOP7rDGdS2hxtZTiQ_0Q2NmxoYFVyXcMcPatTCnmCA67JFdtCC6peZ4Fg2uTX8auUYGZyZJp2jyqprOm2OVpPHY-LXjbVXkp1lCIE2lL3jPMt2jOClK6jHhHnzRdRVi9UCbQLbP8zh-AZAhUID8dxRkSubf57_TGVgnIEwgsSwL5gQ5WMT0XBNwTNCbU0BBLQzqKfVkTcebCs5WeP-bwlVsyZMq21LKHBu_PE1iq3XSsP9EWrbS4oIp5vz-1kKK-0FoVSkrP357flqINMAck1niEjsBIP22UFVbC8emr5WxXbMr3TKzwCpMl2TvT5SjgzY62YCUcGt-/4lz/ZqB-ALjqSRuZNwtigxW2pw/h0/h001.Wi4mDWbdMMdw-oKwhxuawBoIX4Uyjhfw8pmLVo8wpXI)[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtiu64DAa6R6mEIlUl6sWbtsvPhtry74smccu5zEUdPpFdHFKfSC2elv8uU6puK1p11BODc_BsSgaCrepussvW7v3h6J3W6Uks-fzZZqvTUCvGh0tPTj-98tc43hR_CQvGgtjWp2pYTs5GsAtUfgPseYqWgnWDPEPLSIwyP-QIGwvGLdv3ou6q2BgqJ7wRjPciaK4sUGpRlac1ZBrF-OKIt2kFt8IF1hYcyflnxiVPtCQOzx3HsD9WF1HFjh88N4j4nGlJkbRvM2q2u8Tkwk3snMP930LbIuy3ayncVftUloaEaSR6thiI8tW3dQMcF93giEJ0buA5RYYxECX6er0cMpJG-M_6TROQx9BWlFdylM4oq37o6bOsV72RBTGmMIiioTlz_2u6gBRN3Tj8SmJ7Qm0E74ECElakEx4RNQ12ZxRrmMuvJlAL4pQs0ltyL5liZ8Z8Zfd4sgybKgqL-sQ3y/4lz/ZqB-ALjqSRuZNwtigxW2pw/h1/h001.4qnJgI5CZXrFLe3UJLP40TxVEUwQNL4axbqVZ6ry1sw) name: Katie Porter HQ
subject: Proactive, not reactive
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
We set this ambitious $45,000 goal to make sure we have the financial resources to keep up with billionaire spending and a crowded field of candidates.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40495%2E3422442%2EFk75Q_)
Peter,
With a billionaire running against us, and another backed by one, this race is now more competitive than ever. That’s why we’re setting a $45,000 end-of-month fundraising goal.
Our opponents can spend nearly unlimited money against us, so we are counting on our grassroots supporters to make up the financial difference. **[Can you help us reach our $45,000 goal before Sunday’s deadline?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251128_1_ak.CH0CJf&refcode=em20251128-40495&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=40495%2E3422442%2EFk75Q_)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251128_1_ak.CH0CJf&refcode=em20251128-40495&t=22&akid=40495%2E3422442%2EFk75Q_)
We’re getting to the point in this race where all the campaigns kick into gear. They’ll start buying more ads, taking swipes at other candidates, and mobilizing their resources to win over undecided voters.
We have to act first and be proactive, not reactive. We set this ambitious $45,000 goal to make sure we have the financial resources to keep up with billionaire spending and a crowded field of candidates.
**[We will only win this race if people reading emails like this donate what they can. That’s why we’re asking: can you donate $5 to our campaign today?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251128_1_ak.CH0CJf&refcode=em20251128-40495&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=40495%2E3422442%2EFk75Q_)**
Thank you,
Katie Porter HQ

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20251128-40495&amounts=&t=24&refcode2=40495_3422442_Fk75Q_&akid=40495%2E3422442%2EFk75Q_)**
---

* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=40495&t=25&akid=40495%2E3422442%2EFk75Q_)

Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

clean_body: | | = = Here’s the deal, folks... Donald Trump and his super PAC pals are sending millions into battleground states to support their slate of hand-picked, nutjob candidates — like my opponent, Gina Swoboda. Unlike the MAGA machine, I don’t have $600 million sitting around. I don’t have super PACs and conservative billionaire donors on my side. What I do have is you. If we’re going to fight back and FLIP Arizona’s 1st district blue after years of failed GOP leadership, we need all hands on deck right now. Our end-of-month deadline is just days away, and we’re still $11,467 short of our goal. = | = My race for Congress is one of Democrats’ TOP pickup opportunities — and if we’re going to flip the House blue, we can’t let it slip through our fingers. But when we miss our fundraising goals, things start to fall apart. We can’t respond to Republican attack ads, we can’t reach new voters, and we can’t get our message out far and wide across AZ-01. I’ll be blunt: We need grassroots Democrats like you to dig deep and chip in $3 or more, because without you, we don’t have a shot at winning this seat. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks for everything, – Marlene Galán-Woods | To learn more about Marlene, visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to PAID FOR BY MARLENE FOR CONGRESS Marlene for Congress 7904 E. Chaparral Road, Suite A110-472 Scottsdale, AZ 85250 United States

name: Cliff Schecter with Blue Amp
subject: 💙 It’s Blue Friday — Not Black Friday. Join the Fight to Turn 2026 Solid Blue.
body:
Skip the cheap junk. Join the movement. 75% off our best deal ever, to change the future.

| |
---|---|---
|
# 💙 It's Blue Friday -- Not Black Friday. Join the Fight to Turn 2026 Solid Blue.
### Skip the cheap junk. Join the movement. 75% off our best deal ever, to change the future.
| | | [Cliff Schecter](https://substack.com/@cliffsedge) and [Blue Amp](https://substack.com/@blueamp)
---
| Nov 28
---
| [](https://substack.com/@cliffsedge)| | [](https://substack.com/@blueamp)
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9869caf4-7f54-4d72-9680-83648a4d6a33?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Hey friends,
Cliff here.
It's ~~Black~~ Friday -- the day every corporation on Earth begs you to buy more cheap crap you don't need, made in places that don't pay workers or respect them.
We're not doing that.
We're doing the opposite.
🟦 **[Welcome to Blue Friday.](https://substack.com/redirect/9869caf4-7f54-4d72-9680-83648a4d6a33?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
A day where, instead of blowing money on stuff you'll forget by January, you can help build the movement that's going to turn the map **solid blue** in 2026.
Yesterday -- on Thanksgiving, the worst email day of the year -- tens of thousands of you opened my note. That tells me everything I need to know:
* **You 're paying attention.**
* **You care.**
* **You 're with us.**
[Invest In Us For Just $19.99 - 75% Off!](https://substack.com/redirect/9869caf4-7f54-4d72-9680-83648a4d6a33?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

And if we want to expose the liars, beat the fascists, and build a real pro-democracy media powerhouse heading into 2026, we need your support _now_ , while it actually moves the needle.
So for **Blue Friday** , we're giving you our biggest offer ever:
🔥 **[75% off an annual membership-- just $19.99.](https://substack.com/redirect/9869caf4-7f54-4d72-9680-83648a4d6a33?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Not a marketing gimmick.
Not "buy two, get a waffle-maker free."
This is about power -- _our_ power -- to tell the truth without billionaires or party bosses breathing down our necks.
If you've ever thought, _" I should join BAM someday,"_ I'm telling you:
👉 **[Make someday today.](https://substack.com/redirect/9869caf4-7f54-4d72-9680-83648a4d6a33?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
👉 **[Join us for $19.99.](https://substack.com/redirect/9869caf4-7f54-4d72-9680-83648a4d6a33?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Let's use **Blue Friday** to build the coalition that refuses to bend, refuses to bow, and refuses to let the same old authoritarians strip this country down to the studs.
2026 is coming.
They're organizing.
_We have to out-organize them._
**Blue Friday** isn't about shopping.
It's about showing up.
See you inside,
**Cliff**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9869caf4-7f54-4d72-9680-83648a4d6a33?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
(C) 2025 Cliff Schecter
PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208

Because I know from experience that unless you listen to people, you won’t be prepared to stand up and deliver for them. **[That's why I'd love to call you! If you chip in any amount before November 30th, you could be one of the three donors randomly selected to receive a personal thank you call from me. What do you say, friend, can I give you a call?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120162271/585436818/109727453?refcode=em_WEI_FR_EOM1_112825&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjUxNjljZS03ZGNjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=thkDyc32qWXnG6dTYWNlDDAxHTtJ5m4TeaNDJxWjGSY=)** | | [CHIP IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120162272/585436819/109727453?refcode=em_WEI_FR_EOM1_112825&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjUxNjljZS03ZGNjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=thkDyc32qWXnG6dTYWNlDDAxHTtJ5m4TeaNDJxWjGSY=)

This is important to me. It’s more than just a verbal thank-you note. One of my goals with this movement we’re building is to _always_ listen deeply to you about your needs and priorities. And that’s a value we’ve lived out in a few ways so far:
💬 The conversations we had with you on the Fight for Colorado tour helped shape our Colorado Blueprint — my detailed plan for everything from affordability to protecting our democracy to rural development.
💬 Every time you share a suggestion with our campaign, I read it. Yes, every single one.
💬 I’ve shown up to every in-person assembly, forum, and town hall I can... and I’m often the only Democratic gubernatorial candidate in attendance.
**[Out-of-state billionaires and special interest groups don’t drive this campaign — YOU do. If you donate any amount, I’ll give you a call myself to say thanks and have a quick chat about the issues that are on your mind. Are you in?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120162273/585436820/109727453?refcode=em_WEI_FR_EOM1_112825&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjUxNjljZS03ZGNjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=thkDyc32qWXnG6dTYWNlDDAxHTtJ5m4TeaNDJxWjGSY=)**

body:
Can you pitch in $1 to help boost our Flip the House Fund so we can build off of Democrats victories in states like NY, NJ, VA, and CA this month? » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_ndaf_q42025_df?amount=1]
CHIP IN $1 NOW » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_ndaf_q42025_df?amount=1]
Democrats’ victories last week are a testament to people-power. When we work together, we win.
They also show that the path to victory runs through the middle majority — pragmatic, forward-looking Democrats with the vision and determination to get our country back on track.

| | | [Brian Lenney](https://substack.com/@brianlenney)
---
| Nov 28
---
| [](https://substack.com/@brianlenney)
---
Real quick...
While you're out and about today (or while you're sitting at home dodging the chaos), might I suggest something?
I recently listened to [this podcast episode](https://substack.com/redirect/f484e968-1948-4c05-9a75-5a3330556f79?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and found it rather timely, especially given Trump's message from last night saying he plans to halt third world migration:

Brian

clean_body: Help us unlock a REAL 600% MATCH... | Patriot, In just a few short days, my grassroots campaign to FIRE Kathy Hochul will be forced to close the books once and for all on our very FIRST month of fundraising. But this is no ordinary deadline... It’s a golden opportunity to deal the FINAL BLOW to the most vulnerable governor in America’s struggling reelection campaign! You see, the State of New York unlocks matching funds at a rate of 6-to-1 once a candidate hits the fundraising benchmarks written into state law. By CRUSHING this goal, we can take a massive step towards unlocking the LEGAL MAXIMUM amount of matching funds to FIRE Hochul from office. I can’t overstate how critical these matching funds are. Kathy Hochul’s whole campaign strategy revolves around massively outspending us on the airwaves with her and her Democrat allies’ multimillion-dollar ad buys. If we unlock these matching funds, we’ll have the resources we need to cut straight through her lying attacks and put our winning message in front of every New Yorker. With Hochul’s approval rating already at a RECORD LOW and the polls showing the governor’s race is already within the margin of error, that would be nothing short of catastrophic for the worst governor in America! Our path to victory has never been clearer, Patriot. But it all depends on unlocking these vital matching funds. Thank you, Elise Stefanik Paid for by Elise for Governor PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801

name: Sarah McBride
subject: Don’t be shy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
I’ll make sure to read every message and answer a few soon.
#
Hey — it’s Sarah.
This past weekend, I hosted a town hall with Majority Democrats in Wilmington, where I gave our neighbors the chance to ask me _anything_ that was on their minds.
[](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/survey/mcb-em-20251128-1/?source=em20251128-2534&t=1&akid=2534%2E21716%2EbdcSOk)There’s nothing I love more than the chance to connect with my constituents and supporters.
And I want to make sure you have an opportunity to ask me questions too.
**That’s why I’m blocking off some time in my schedule to respond to questions from this grassroots team in an upcoming email — and I’d love to include yours.**
[**Click here to submit a question >>**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/survey/mcb-em-20251128-1/?source=em20251128-2534&t=2&akid=2534%2E21716%2EbdcSOk)
If you’re unsure about what to ask or whether your question is worth submitting, let me just say what I told everyone at our town hall:
**Don’t be shy.**
Ask about the fights happening in Congress or about the politics that matter to your family. Ask about how we stand up to rising authoritarianism or what gives me hope right now. Or ask me about how I take my coffee, my favorite history fact (there are many), or my favorite song on Taylor Swift's latest album.**
**
[**Whatever it is, I’d love to hear it. Just click here to submit your question, and I’ll answer as many as I can.** ](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/survey/mcb-em-20251128-1/?source=em20251128-2534&t=3&akid=2534%2E21716%2EbdcSOk)
**[Submit a question](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/survey/mcb-em-20251128-1/?source=em20251128-2534&t=4&akid=2534%2E21716%2EbdcSOk)**
To me, listening and engaging in conversation are the foundation of good public service, so thank you in advance for the opportunity to hear from you— and keep an eye on your inbox. I’ll be responding to your questions soon!
With gratitude,
— Sarah
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20251128-1&t=5&refcode2=2534_21716_bdcSOk&akid=2534%2E21716%2EbdcSOk)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=6&akid=2534%2E21716%2EbdcSOk)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=7&akid=2534%2E21716%2EbdcSOk)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=2534%2E21716%2EbdcSOk)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

name: George Latimer
subject: My promise to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by George Latimer for Congress
body:
In the past few months, we’ve seen firsthand what happens when our leadership decides to prioritize rhetoric and personal agendas over results and progress.

George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by serving as your Congressman, representing New York's 16th District. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/-Phg2RhDIEGJVPbb5vK87g2?unsubscribedata=2X62HKXhiSR9IVFjtDgVO0Wo1Ak3qMlzduqC5QX2fujzDtWbXOMpEP63rIOttMlXwbFa2KiBJot7hh2ZPxTdyLsAOAN9NIzjhGm%2BJ%2BngeI4EdPN1nlOKmJNLDckw6mtIWFi2ovt3%2BxPeiw5KSFfqJaYo%2BjPqAu33Dr0E4NqYoTzZ0KDRYd2bGibJ5KYJbiMp1bG%2FpRDCDDlC6n8tcgVItdhgOKXPR19%2FpH6BxZ2nFUoouS2oY%2BfWLnuF2YOEI%2Bu1AZCApQJyRhf57YcneI1WRDLNnACkl35VeVeJmiY6GPpImcj83PTb0w5Vs9DgFv7EEhyYK2rCGg940rozR9ZJkXeOO12NIucDChzbFb33Q%2BZIsXlIj8ZTA6yNS74xsCGH5j%2F1W9Ll0EZpE4j%2FEcr4NgskYnNqC089IGC2qZ3xhdX10HZolFMwEUTQlHXG%2FN%2Bk)

| |
---
Peter — I think I speak for many of us here in NY-16 when I say that I’m concerned about the current state of our democracy. In the past few months, we’ve seen firsthand what happens when our leadership decides to prioritize rhetoric and personal agendas over results and progress. We’ve seen how it threatens the integrity and stability of the systems we rely on to protect and guide our nation. Despite the constant chaos, my Democratic colleagues and I have been working across the aisle to deliver for the American people, but House Republicans would rather play partisan politics than work with us to find solutions. We were sent to Congress to govern, not play political games. That’s why I’m asking for your support today. We can’t afford to sit on the sidelines while chaos and division take the place of good governance. Every contribution — no matter the size — helps us keep fighting for what really matters: affordable healthcare, good jobs, safe communities, and a government that actually works for the people it represents. **[If you’re with me, will you chip in $10 to help keep our campaign strong and focused on delivering results, not rhetoric?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120164371/585440154/1087608061?amount=10&source=SBD_GL_EM_FR_112825_EOM01_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQwMzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGVmM2RmZTAtODBjYy1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xsrl-PjPmu02vDw7auLWKiH_vxIs0RiDU9N9HQiW8xQ=)** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

clean_body: In the past few months, we’ve seen firsthand what happens when our leadership decides to prioritize rhetoric and personal agendas over results and progress. George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by serving as your Congressman, representing New York's 16th District. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Peter — I think I speak for many of us here in NY-16 when I say that I’m concerned about the current state of our democracy. In the past few months, we’ve seen firsthand what happens when our leadership decides to prioritize rhetoric and personal agendas over results and progress. We’ve seen how it threatens the integrity and stability of the systems we rely on to protect and guide our nation. Despite the constant chaos, my Democratic colleagues and I have been working across the aisle to deliver for the American people, but House Republicans would rather play partisan politics than work with us to find solutions. We were sent to Congress to govern, not play political games. That’s why I’m asking for your support today. We can’t afford to sit on the sidelines while chaos and division take the place of good governance. Every contribution — no matter the size — helps us keep fighting for what really matters: affordable healthcare, good jobs, safe communities, and a government that actually works for the people it represents. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Lack of trust and transparency in our leaders must become a thing of the past. body:
This Black Friday, invest in something bigger.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20251128-5663-footer&t=1&akid=5663%2E420207%2ELIhUrz)
Hey Peter,
We hope you had a restful Thanksgiving! After a day of gratitude, we’re turning to what comes next: building a better future _together._
That work starts right now, with one urgent task: **raising the final $10,000 by Sunday night to hit our end-of-month goal** and power Pramila’s leadership through the end of this year and into 2026.
While corporations and billionaires are pumping resources into defending their power, fueling Trump’s authoritarian agenda, and raising prices on working families, we’re building something else entirely: **a grassroots movement to take on greed, defend health care, and deliver real relief to people who need it most.**
And on a day when Americans will spend billions on Black Friday — most of it padding corporate profits — we’re inviting you to chip in to something bigger.
[**Can you pitch in $3 right now to help us close the gap on our end-of-month goal and fuel our people-powered movement?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251128-1.sVtNWw&refcode=em20251128-5663&amount=3&t=2&akid=5663%2E420207%2ELIhUrz)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251128-1.sVtNWw&amount=3&refcode=em20251128-5663&t=3&akid=5663%2E420207%2ELIhUrz)**
Here’s what your donation powers:
* Organizing to **defend health care** for millions
* Holding the line as MAGA extremists attack **democracy**
* Fighting to **make corporations pay their fair share**
* Standing with **working families** crushed by rising costs
* Demanding **accountability for ICE** and **justice for immigrant communities**

Congress returns next week. Republicans are already planning to let ACA subsidies expire by the end of December. And this is our first major grassroots test since progressives delivered big wins at the ballot box earlier this month.
MAGA extremists are watching to see if we’ll keep up the fight or fall asleep at the wheel. Let’s show them we _refuse_ to back down.
With so many folks offline today, spending time with family or shopping Black Friday sales, [**we’re relying on everyone who does see this email to step up and chip in $3 to help us reach our goal before Sunday night.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251128-1.sVtNWw&refcode=em20251128-5663&amount=3&t=4&akid=5663%2E420207%2ELIhUrz)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251128-1.sVtNWw&amount=3&refcode=em20251128-5663&t=23&akid=5663%2E420207%2ELIhUrz)**
Thank you for helping us build a future that works for all of us.
In gratitude and solidarity,
— Jayapal HQ
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20251128-5663-footer&t=24&refcode2=5663_420207_LIhUrz&akid=5663%2E420207%2ELIhUrz)**
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Save the Redwoods League
subject: Bringing the redwoods to you.
body:
View in browser [View in browser]
https://www.savetheredwoods.org [https://www.savetheredwoods.org]
Dear Peter,
Time in the forest is a gift, but we can’t hit the trails every day. Whether you’re outside or spending the day watching movies, there are countless ways to connect with the redwood forests.
We wanted to share some great ways to enjoy the redwoods, both in real life and in your living room. Our staff have some personal favorite hikes to share, and we can’t help but promote our podcast! Have a look at our recommendations:
Watch [https://www.giantsrising.com/]
The film Giants Rising [https://www.giantsrising.com/] tells the story of our most iconic redwood forest—and the mission to secure their future.
https://www.giantsrising.com/ [https://www.giantsrising.com/]
Read [https://www.savetheredwoods.org/learning-center/reading-list/]

[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/STRWL/STRWL/1/89574/images/Frame%2022.png]

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=69bab843a8dc4a33bbe81f56535767c0&_e=8IXmD61WbcX0Epj_22oH_aCiclzPq7IYYKJJaSpL2q7YeSRSfHkIOIw4e2aED8yV52IaCzao3uXvcjbJx-Ui3X6j2-bdkaNW61pG9RwFPygnUvzMJesNCrE_PJUATlk8_ynfffrJLdoRnV9aY6AzLHHMiO9MRIBYrsaN8JrrSJZ-Vm-Yzs_wJgGrciL8hmKHQLvjKpAJB1crf6fb1PMcFGLdBXBhaHGx1_hpPnzluOg-PIrAghVEOe67xVI4R5HWz71T4aIfBgR4KuTzOdcJv4jI2uSJNHhVlpwbWyRWRHys525xAG-RmGJIE9YGfrJz30I6EMReO4YDJzN10fODiaz7C-pd1mS_Q9U9moO7hayOpicN_4jqJCaRH33dVA8JHWAlnPc01uhiX1DplkS7TX748wuinMX5aCvy0ksCp_hOLsQwnPZ59C79Fea7tJfEf4EDdxHiPQGvcNWScFSDe93H0cssVs7iqDygE4ggSxO0GeArwKJM76FkKVCG7fwgehrnQlaBycG1CUInVYtm-9iKMQul5oU-pG91ljfud3xea5OOCZWTXQ59ZoFp9xkR)

clean_body: Team, our November end-of-month fundraising deadline is just days away. Grassroots donations from folks like you power our work to elect Jocelyn as the next Governor of Michigan. They give us the resources we need to: 🤝 Hire the best team in the nation to elect Jocelyn. 💻 Run ads to persuade voters and get people to the polls. 📋 Talk with voters on the ground (early and often!). 📘 Train volunteers who will help reach out to folks all across Michigan. ⛽ Pay for gas so Jocelyn can get her message to every corner of the state. Elections aren’t won on Election Day. They’re won in the weeks and months leading up to it. And in a battleground state like Michigan, it’s never too early to start preparing. Jocelyn’s race could come down to just a few voters — really, elections are won on the thinnest of margins here in Michigan. So we’re really counting on grassroots supporters like you to give us the resources we need to set Jocelyn up for success. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | Jocelyn is running to make the government truly work for everyone. Your support today plays an important role in that work. Thank you. — Team Benson

name: Dark Money Update via Our Revolution
subject: 20 billionaires dropped a shocking $5 BILLION into our political system
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ]Our Revolution Logo

Peter Willis,

A jaw-dropping new report reveals the truth: just 20 billionaire donors
flooded our political system with nearly $5 BILLION between 2015 and 2024.
These ultra-rich powerbrokers are quite literally buying our democracy –
and we HAVE to do something to stop it.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34721?source=email-20251128&t=1011&akid=9914%2E5885482%2E-DW5ba ]Headline: 'We must overturn Citizens United,' says Sanders as analysis
details billionaire takeover of US politics

Bernie Sanders is sounding the alarm, saying we must overturn Citizens
United and replace billionaire-funded elections with public financing. And
while that’s the long-game, there’s also something we can do TODAY: get
dark money OUT of Democratic primaries to stop billionaires from rigging
our elections.

We already won a DNC resolution to ban dark money banned from the 2028
presidential primary – but we’re not done yet.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34721?source=email-20251128&t=1012&akid=9914%2E5885482%2E-DW5ba ]Add your name now to demand Democratic Party leaders in every single
state BAN Dark Money from Democratic primaries starting in 2026!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34721?source=email-20251128&t=1013&akid=9914%2E5885482%2E-DW5ba ]ADD YOUR NAME

Across the country, billionaire PACs, anonymous Super PACs, and shadowy
front groups are spending MILLIONS to defeat progressives in local
primaries. We saw it with Mamdani and SO many other races.

But here's the secret the media won’t tell you: the Democratic Party’s
state and county officials hold the real power over primary rules. Across
all 50 states, party officials act as the gatekeepers – choosing whether
to open the door to billionaire money or to shut it tight.

That’s why we need Democratic officials in every state and county to say
they won’t allow dark money spending in the 2026 primaries. So right now
we’re mobilizing our Citizen Action Team state by state, city by city to
make it happen.

Our movement already won a huge step forward when, earlier this year, we
pushed the Democratic National Committee to pass a resolution to get Dark
Money out of the 2028 presidential primary. And now it’s our job to make
every state and county do the same for 2026.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34721?source=email-20251128&t=1014&akid=9914%2E5885482%2E-DW5ba ]Headline: '10 years in the making': DNC passes resolution to limit dark
money in primaries

Our Revolution organizers are already on the ground – mobilizing
volunteers, gathering signatures, and presenting petitions to party
leaders. In several states, grassroots pressure is already starting to
move the needle. Now, we’re ramping up nationwide.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34721?source=email-20251128&t=1015&akid=9914%2E5885482%2E-DW5ba ]Add your name now to demand a ban on Dark Money in ALL Democratic
primaries in 2026. Let’s finish what we started and win a Democratic Party
that belongs to US – not the billionaire class.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34721?source=email-20251128&t=1016&akid=9914%2E5885482%2E-DW5ba ]ADD YOUR NAME

Every name counts. The more supporters we have in each state, the stronger
our demands. When you sign, your name joins a growing list that we’ll put
directly in front of local party officials – showing them this is a
movement they cannot ignore.

When we organize, we win,

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=9914%2E5885482%2E-DW5ba ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=9914%2E5885482%2E-DW5ba ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=9914%2E5885482%2E-DW5ba ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=9914%2E5885482%2E-DW5ba ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=9914%2E5885482%2E-DW5ba ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=9914%2E5885482%2E-DW5ba ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26879?c0=email-20251128.tEoO60&t=1007&akid=9914%2E5885482%2E-DW5ba ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26880?c0=email-20251128.oQEjfC&t=1008&akid=9914%2E5885482%2E-DW5ba ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a Movement Builder with a recurring
donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26881?c0=email-20251128.9LJhw8&t=1009&akid=9914%2E5885482%2E-DW5ba ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26882?c0=email-20251128.36wEnz&t=1010&akid=9914%2E5885482%2E-DW5ba ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=9914%2E5885482%2E-DW5ba

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a

name: Greg Landsman
subject: Support Cincinnati small businesses this holiday season
body:
| | |
---
| | , Small Business Saturday is this weekend, and it's the perfect time to talk about how we can support the local businesses that make Cincinnati special.Every time you shop at a local business instead of a big box store or Amazon, you're keeping money in our community. You're supporting your neighbor who took a risk to follow their dream. You're creating jobs for Cincinnati families. This holiday season, before you click "add to cart" on a website, think about checking out: **-** The locally-owned bookstore in your neighborhood **-** The family-run restaurant you've been meaning to try **-** The small shop downtown with unique gifts you won't find anywhere elseI know money is tight for a lot of families right now, especially with tariffs driving up prices on imported goods. But even small purchases at local businesses make a real difference. Small businesses are the backbone of our economy. They employ our neighbors, sponsor our kids' sports teams, and make Cincinnati feel like home.This Small Business Saturday, let's show Cincinnati's small business owners that we've got their backs.Appreciate you, _Greg_ 💙🙏
---
| | Landsman for Congress
PO Box 413
Cincinnati, OH 45201
United States
---
---
| | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/BDj7DbXBBEyfq2oKIRdzRg2?unsubscribedata=U7EHjr4Xg98jdC3QgKLiPcnqzku4iOz%2FOJh4qpU%2Fzz7yGSiGJlSO8xd2YnOZGZGBnbrpYuXzyi0K6dHkh68GiEZTMG6sjgHj1pecPoWPpfjhxL6KQnpuTl5z1YWtkr37eDku23JP5DDezMrTvsci8T6ctgBy3rhvyDsG%2BylLSlk1eJBfo5O062ZP3V%2Fh5sjR%2Fw9M1YSXnPpibf0KlycUDZ2y8bdTjmLHkm2RMdCV29PbH0Qvt0FRRCDUTYJKcD9iIBZznsnIRZJhu3kZGK5A7ZtG7rm9AjrJV8ln1JUnA1%2Bx9QZ4SaZWfkZHl79bl5saBdAQk%2BDNbtuhFTnd6a9bBken5cSAHeEH7qwrb8kORCEt1mLWyKClW5ZdkfXeBKQn7enN4kJEcApzGOogP72KeDKJeG3Q9hCREIoOH6pBUyKnFcYNJfp3Fnl9Qt1Ugooy).

This holiday season, before you click "add to cart" on a website, think about checking out: - The locally-owned bookstore in your neighborhood - The family-run restaurant you've been meaning to try - The small shop downtown with unique gifts you won't find anywhere elseI know money is tight for a lot of families right now, especially with tariffs driving up prices on imported goods. But even small purchases at local businesses make a real difference. Small businesses are the backbone of our economy. They employ our neighbors, sponsor our kids' sports teams, and make Cincinnati feel like home.This Small Business Saturday, let's show Cincinnati's small business owners that we've got their backs.Appreciate you, Greg 💙🙏 | | Landsman for Congress PO Box 413 Cincinnati, OH 45201 United States | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

subject: Before the deals disappear…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
Black Friday prices aren’t the only thing rising.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120166807/585446285/-793144256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzJhZWExNy04NGNjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lKyyYXRPC6SLnbuW9Y5l-Uonlt3As_kTOsD6lQ8kMQY=&emci=9f75f698-2aca-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=532aea17-84cc-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=31008101)
---
Peter, it’s Black Friday, a day when everything is supposedly on sale, except the things Virginians actually need. Because while shoppers across the country are hunting for deals, families here in Virginia are facing **higher grocery bills, higher energy costs,** and **higher insurance premiums** , driven in large part by the same forces trying to drag our Commonwealth backward. [**And that’s why your donation today matters.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120166808/585446287/688982926?&refcode=E16386-20251128-EOM2-SL-DeadlineEOM&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzJhZWExNy04NGNjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lKyyYXRPC6SLnbuW9Y5l-Uonlt3As_kTOsD6lQ8kMQY=) | **************[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120166809/585446313/688982926?&refcode=E16386-20251128-EOM2-SB-DeadlineEOM&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzJhZWExNy04NGNjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lKyyYXRPC6SLnbuW9Y5l-Uonlt3As_kTOsD6lQ8kMQY=)**************
---
This Black Friday, while corporations slash prices for 24 hours, Republicans in Washington are pushing tariffs and policies that will raise costs for years, on food, on household goods, on gas, and on basic essentials that Virginians rely on every day.
**Here’s what the latest data in Virginia shows:**
* Turkey prices are up again this year, more than 8 percent in some regions.
* Grocery costs across the Commonwealth remain near historic highs.
* Trump’s tariffs are already raising the cost of everyday goods, and economists warn holiday prices will climb even higher if they continue.
* Virginia small businesses estimate they’ll pay thousands more in import costs before the end of the year.

So while the country obsesses over discounts, Virginians are feeling the squeeze, and the people responsible aren’t retailers. They’re the extremists pushing Project 2025 and the economic agenda that comes with it.
That’s why DPVA’s post-election work matters so much. We have a Democratic trifecta. Now we need the resources to:
* Pass real cost-of-living relief in the upcoming legislative session
* Hold the line against Trump’s tariff agenda and its impact on VA families
* Strengthen our grassroots network before the 2026 midterms
* Keep pressure on corporate price-gouging that’s hurting families statewide

This month’s fundraising goal determines what we can build between now and January. [**If you can, chip in before the end-of-month deadline to power our fight for a more affordable, more secure Virginia.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120166810/585446316/688982926?&refcode=E16386-20251128-EOM2-SL-DeadlineEOM&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MzJhZWExNy04NGNjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lKyyYXRPC6SLnbuW9Y5l-Uonlt3As_kTOsD6lQ8kMQY=)

clean_body: Black Friday prices aren’t the only thing rising. | Peter, it’s Black Friday, a day when everything is supposedly on sale, except the things Virginians actually need. Because while shoppers across the country are hunting for deals, families here in Virginia are facing higher grocery bills, higher energy costs, and higher insurance premiums , driven in large part by the same forces trying to drag our Commonwealth backward. = | ************=********** This Black Friday, while corporations slash prices for 24 hours, Republicans in Washington are pushing tariffs and policies that will raise costs for years, on food, on household goods, on gas, and on basic essentials that Virginians rely on every day. Here’s what the latest data in Virginia shows: Turkey prices are up again this year, more than 8 percent in some regions. Grocery costs across the Commonwealth remain near historic highs. Trump’s tariffs are already raising the cost of everyday goods, and economists warn holiday prices will climb even higher if they continue. Virginia small businesses estimate they’ll pay thousands more in import costs before the end of the year. So while the country obsesses over discounts, Virginians are feeling the squeeze, and the people responsible aren’t retailers. They’re the extremists pushing Project 2025 and the economic agenda that comes with it. That’s why DPVA’s post-election work matters so much. We have a Democratic trifecta. Now we need the resources to: Pass real cost-of-living relief in the upcoming legislative session Hold the line against Trump’s tariff agenda and its impact on VA families Strengthen our grassroots network before the 2026 midterms * Keep pressure on corporate price-gouging that’s hurting families statewide This month’s fundraising goal determines what we can build between now and January. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = This is how we turn wins into progress, and progress into lasting change. While the sales end tonight, you can make sure the fight for Virginia’s future doesn’t. — Virginia Democrats [content goes here] Forwarded this email? body:
The Left is REELING and pulling out every nasty move they can think of

As a proud Air Force veteran and Congresswoman, I've got my sights set on the 2026 elections, and I'm not backing down. E[very single one of the 2026 Democrat Targets on our list has three things in common](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/by8y/?__vbtrk=MzM1ODM5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1ODM5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct):

* [They support America Last policies that hurt our great nation and its people](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/by8y/?__vbtrk=MzM1ODM5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1ODM5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct).

**
**
* [They support installing Nancy Pelosi's puppet, Hakeem Jeffries, as Speaker](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/by8y/?__vbtrk=MzM1ODM5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1ODM5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct).

**
**
* [They're trembling in their boots because they know they could lose BIG in 2026 if patriots like you step up to help us take them down](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/by8y/?__vbtrk=MzM1ODM5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1ODM5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct).

[Will you join me in the fight to defeat these 26 House Democrats in 2026 and grow our House Majority?](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/by8y/?__vbtrk=MzM1ODM5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1ODM5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct) With a Majority this strong, our conservative values will be unstoppable – and the Radical Left won't know what hit them!But we need to move fast. I've got intel that the Democrats are pouring millions into these campaigns as we speak.
If we don't fuel our war chest ASAP, we risk losing these seats before we even get off the ground.
[So, I'm counting on you to chip in and help us take the fight to the Democrats. Will you:](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/by8y/?__vbtrk=MzM1ODM5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1ODM5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)[DONATE $26 TO WIN 26 SEATS

](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/by8A/?__vbtrk=MzM1ODM5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1ODM5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)[DONATE $78 TO TRIPLE YOUR IMPACT
](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/by8B/?__vbtrk=MzM1ODM5OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM1ODM5OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)[CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT >>

Do you depend on your job to stay afloat?

AI isn’t “creating opportunity.” It’s **erasing livelihoods** — fast.

Just in the U.S. alone, [over 45 million Americans](https://links.research.firstinvestmentupdates.com/u/click?_t=6c5e8d0087884bb7b7cd2e3abb0e6b5f&_m=81bd6bf8930144d0a2bfde8fd159be65&_e=pSHGGPv2784D9qzki-Fci1kf1u9ndXiJbsCzCq6ViN7PE4hLoChHE91FW47xebi6WVOvL6-z8NfFYBbchGL7E9BnhOk-hJg0AdigpiDyUt07De8DIu2XPcCIv9FyppaF3jQPdd3-aat0ksHi-O7SxBdSZD2KvyilFQr4okg5o4-rglMXWCo93NdAMcQr0S9RJB7H0M3Pyn-JOBzMtcE4SDPmVuBDNFna456y0s5NIKGRJOdXyLJcAW3AaF0QxIgMx0t92aU0izUNN4RmOVx_2jHmI6jE1pHbkoCHItDYiZfGqp1gdbb8-XVYPCyoys0uf3aAsM6NLHXdVPBFZGU3KO5xmuGr3DFF7WYyPTmLKHj8QVWNBtrk1QlZzLGpzmTM8sOudF0hByiueUlITSkQ0H80mTvbhwaxm8hopTbiyYFBsLozXx58xRym_MwfKV3uJXBudpbQuyxzq2LhaR9MOo3ZBlJ5HGitPN3s9dX_08V1A-P-JwmDrcw1mUytEAsa6l7k9IV-8gXJwIYw4ZJ4nbb9W2b5z4n96SR139B6KEO2hD4LNXaRTpbaXfbouHV2bprXEqKL7t7CmQdTqFsrvQ7_yrAyj_HnWcv-X1Ak_dzRYz7U7HE9_dQJLuHJRL8b) could lose their jobs to AI.
