Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

name: Roy Cooper
subject: An investment now can go even further.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
Is there any amount you can give?

Peter, I know better than anyone how difficult it is to win as a Democrat in North Carolina, and how hard we’ll have to work to succeed in this toss-up U.S. Senate race.
I also know that _early investment goes further._ That’s one rule of campaigning that never seems to change.
**With my opponent gaining in the polls, it’s more important than ever that we can stay competitive.** The earlier funds come in, the earlier we can plan our campaign expenses for the months ahead. That makes our efforts all the more effective, so I’m asking for your help today, so please don’t put it off.
[_**Any contribution you could split between our campaign and Abigail Spanberger would go a long way to meeting our fundraising goal. Just click here to give.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120167481/585448399/2016987577?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-11-28_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTk1YzcyYjctODRjYy1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Ebrcf-0gilfQMj91Ua8jEU7v-C2ir4IrK4y6xFKJKlg=)

It’s no secret that national Republicans see me as the greatest threat to their control in Washington, plus that GOP lawmakers in Raleigh have taken steps to make it harder for Democrats to win here.
We can overcome far-right radicalism. We’ve done it before. And to secure this nation’s future, we have to do it again. But every day and every single cent will count in an election this competitive.
Right now, my MAGA opponent is attracting major investment from far-right donors. Experts even think this could become the first Senate race in history to cost more than a _billion_ dollars. We have to increase our grassroots fundraising efforts to stay competitive, and the earlier your donation comes in, the more effectively we can put it to use.
[_**Winning this toss-up race won’t be easy, but I know that we can do it — especially if we’re able to make the most of these early days. If you’re able to split a contribution between our campaign and Abigail Spanberger, I would deeply appreciate it. Any amount will help.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120167487/585448434/2016987577?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-11-28_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTk1YzcyYjctODRjYy1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Ebrcf-0gilfQMj91Ua8jEU7v-C2ir4IrK4y6xFKJKlg=)

clean_body: Is there any amount you can give? Peter, I know better than anyone how difficult it is to win as a Democrat in North Carolina, and how hard we’ll have to work to succeed in this toss-up U.S. Senate race. I also know that early investment goes further. That’s one rule of campaigning that never seems to change. With my opponent gaining in the polls, it’s more important than ever that we can stay competitive. The earlier funds come in, the earlier we can plan our campaign expenses for the months ahead. That makes our efforts all the more effective, so I’m asking for your help today, so please don’t put it off. = If you are signed up for ActBlue Express, your contribution to Roy Cooper and Abigail Spanberger will be processed immediately: = = = = It’s no secret that national Republicans see me as the greatest threat to their control in Washington, plus that GOP lawmakers in Raleigh have taken steps to make it harder for Democrats to win here. We can overcome far-right radicalism. We’ve done it before. And to secure this nation’s future, we have to do it again. But every day and every single cent will count in an election this competitive. Right now, my MAGA opponent is attracting major investment from far-right donors. Experts even think this could become the first Senate race in history to cost more than a billion dollars. We have to increase our grassroots fundraising efforts to stay competitive, and the earlier your donation comes in, the more effectively we can put it to use. = If you are signed up for ActBlue Express, your contribution to Roy Cooper and Abigail Spanberger will be processed immediately: = = = = = = Thank you, Roy Cooper By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. Message & data rates may apply. Text HELP for more info. Text STOP to stop receiving messages. . Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States

I'm not one for sugarcoating. This race is razor-thin, and I need your immediate support to build back the momentum we need heading into the election year.

But I want to cut through the noise for a moment.
[I’d like to tell you a quick story.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6020760e0bcf48988659c69644f07aeb&_e=DphLojunN5AfVZO_iv13SGgx8dbPfhOqCfhHC-Y93u091S7zPQhr6H7_K81MOAV2zS9ZQzyiS277rnmpWnIpDB6ZxgEJ46XfWsG4tpyLMhhqBovR8_1k4oTbshzVKNIlQ7IDcCxUJ-f2HXRisPgsHfPqvcBQ_dHENgggeIPi7kFoH0IQDho8gFn0VDqXVKtGJqqv2UP6cpfEeNFS3p_luL5-r1AIqVw1hedHkCfhUcS4N1GQoGpU839XCpMCkbYIeoT9RRqgrthbnR8fesTyyAPNug0xSb6pz1DeAsL8OS28yQk8bnCZPOrhwBOuxzB2I4mF89HR113I9KbcWHxEksVQsMtSJLwv5jlKneU3TFenXqzo_HT2KsSjC3y-r2kr1MnI5ya4STB46A89lwiRsUMjW777dEvsldnmHy90iC9ksxV_DpmyqBUSBMFiOlFIA72JuolHH7ovaa9fEXcbcDsa03JU3kHr-wZp5iUHgiLXZ9dKNSOnuj5G6zZ5WbTMQWcU2aH_-kfVAC3QNfaEL76ll-tXghLbINfO-W6apjUd0Wjz7D2rVk65AyGgL6kUno7rhZyntKZXL4gi6utOzQKYZ8vUlZBgNWDveH-Lu_M8WE-Sh0ACFtsREFKWO_XvOBu0Iv8hHgNZndJ_K6x74pk4WZyKyM4BcqgNIl7ZIZxiaFO0F4loRKdZOc9vL0_va9M8JdHs7PWWSZaYwCIDFRMhwQGltljVGjJqoxx9rFbcArlnT0PNeKvKyBycUPamske4obKRpkaYTToZrp2C0-idkRF_j4OpCb9PuRC-YgTjzffYaz8AcjEWdu13gtzxqd_-EFcsNeRjWf6foQHim0qfpnUYpl4zlBcHkappvmIKcOXeUKxRq9rdvRlVboOmmB-UrC4M1U-Ix5-I2v3zE6KA-12o06dWf8W6TbOdjjE%3D)
I grew up right here in Ohio. My parents worked hard to give me a chance at the American Dream, and I know what sacrifice looks like. Every opportunity I've had was built on the back of that sacrifice.[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6020760e0bcf48988659c69644f07aeb&_e=DphLojunN5AfVZO_iv13SGgx8dbPfhOqCfhHC-Y93u091S7zPQhr6H7_K81MOAV2zS9ZQzyiS277rnmpWnIpDB6ZxgEJ46XfWsG4tpyLMhhqBovR8_1k4oTbshzVKNIlQ7IDcCxUJ-f2HXRisPgsHfPqvcBQ_dHENgggeIPi7kFoH0IQDho8gFn0VDqXVKtGJqqv2UP6cpfEeNFS3p_luL5-r1AIqVw1hedHkCfhUcS4N1GQoGpU839XCpMCkbYIeoT9RRqgrthbnR8fesTyyAPNug0xSb6pz1DeAsL8OS28yQk8bnCZPOrhwBOuxzB2I4mF89HR113I9KbcWHxEksVQsMtSJLwv5jlKneU3TFdLNQoF28HJ3JAvthr_qOfoyNiTCXg457gBPGy72YOvLuTToJdevWcLG39lQrPttm0qQe9ARPNwfjuReR8K3YXax7dHF-sqsMTfO5hyyVe8nn6w677CHWlNHLueh7RMwrP_x8FmpvSgtTc2sPLsOm-JRKRFd9V9gY5EHol-a1T2bnCwddNn20XcoNNeoUlca9T505WNdz7KjR3b6W9iNbxk4kqULgcrQQEG_oedErYL79ACI8oxiBGDWBerZ9mS_QPyqv-Q07O9M3hFykoYKkQ_EwD2UMQfYXWawJyvFy2Dt99wzSPDbug-PNqQZvViMUewNnDp1ft09ZWV3Xj_UU32StOD3ltRJXKpC7xcm1AeIGCYycIDiR0ZYV3PI9MaxqOLjEqX7IOMtn926zXd94TFWz7L8QOqHS1Zmb3NyZxS4sv3oiP5rxftVjD7WkVU8XWzC7Eb6BBoc3R-nyAkJnT-WCbnjcFXSw3v2E3Vl6XcJe7h_fI-7LAd4aLN_HrboCEk1VEQy0cUKJoTEzK2FySPVW4HxCXaMkBBMOyZ1_U8DOgqhugk0ESjnnGH0SbdZLo%3D)That's why I never forget what it means when someone like you chips in a few dollars. It isn't "just money." **
**It 's trust. It's belief. It's a vote of confidence in the movement we're building in Ohio and beyond. **
**So whether you 've already donated or you're considering it today, let me say this clearly: **
**[THANK YOU, Fellow American!](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6020760e0bcf48988659c69644f07aeb&_e=DphLojunN5AfVZO_iv13SGgx8dbPfhOqCfhHC-Y93u091S7zPQhr6H7_K81MOAV2zS9ZQzyiS277rnmpWnIpDB6ZxgEJ46XfWsG4tpyLMhhqBovR8_1k4oTbshzVKNIlQ7IDcCxUJ-f2HXRisPgsHfPqvcBQ_dHENgggeIPi7kFoH0IQDho8gFn0VDqXVKtGJqqv2UP6cpfEeNFS3p_luL5-r1AIqVw1hedHkCfhUcS4N1GQoGpU839XCpMCkbYIeoT9RRqgrthbnR8fesTyyAPNug0xSb6pz1DeAsL8OS28yQk8bnCZPOrhwBOuxzB2I4mF89HR113I9KbcWHxEksVQsMtSJLwv5jlKneU3TFdu-mdLJg3TmH1fpexTKkPy83z8NKmRSnH2UPnXS8SeCytQ7hh3cQtjo7_-tZ6r8D8xRa_7qiePBKTE6vZ-_bt0KUWJYrEP0kQ5ZTZsZWRwabdzKwqfa3DmD-eaV-wV_jroGALfBgwpOY1dxCGS5moSUNyxFEAbJ019aVKcBaIs7Qn4b8bu1QQmLEQpFbO66cZD_jNGHettjne7OFh9mBP7ryYRfzgjmKXGpzuU9UJOQmPnXPU3YKVf61alCDCXJ5N_t4zNrB_iAsW6WhNNEb_jzvPKksrSz1S--7UAtpYyTxtWXYoRayC_YSISLSsi2V-cQHtFRHF3gBSK_eFwn2iWo-Z5yGc1LRT0kuwGRFwutVXYa71FV-qsglBfdZL_ZjjmFPRHPdhkDehZXH_EQ3p41T0eZFPJtdUfzs_a-pdRJaGnQ0DDjf2xW6UmRvuatMxgpOA6UceSLXG84jDbSZpmRuF45OxBs3qYj7JkeeDOFIGqvdqy_10PTRypu4emN0NUzBgL9jqO_S6Dug0pgaWp7hiTsahXQG-OJs7X6zP2l_pkZwlNgKvrOVrhuL_9qsE%3D)**
**We 're in an extremely tough fight. And this isn't just any race - it's shaping up to be one of the most important in the country.**
**I threw my hat in the ring now because we have a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to save our country. I mean that. We were[ ONE ELECTION AWAY](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6020760e0bcf48988659c69644f07aeb&_e=DphLojunN5AfVZO_iv13SGgx8dbPfhOqCfhHC-Y93u091S7zPQhr6H7_K81MOAV2zS9ZQzyiS277rnmpWnIpDB6ZxgEJ46XfWsG4tpyLMhhqBovR8_1k4oTbshzVKNIlQ7IDcCxUJ-f2HXRisPgsHfPqvcBQ_dHENgggeIPi7kFoH0IQDho8gFn0VDqXVKtGJqqv2UP6cpfEeNFS3p_luL5-r1AIqVw1hedHkCfhUcS4N1GQoGpU839XCpMCkbYIeoT9RRqgrthbnR8fesTyyAPNug0xSb6pz1DeAsL8OS28yQk8bnCZPOrhwBOuxzB2I4mF89HR113I9KbcWHxEksVQsMtSJLwv5jlKneU3TFeUkb9lqzTII7Y5kev7XIqdqi_GgoDmYcDrBlk_gx0BprAaCvbXiql61To4XAd7d5Bz6-2ftkSd7_AQDHBvIGorO01I3boYLQ9bKX-fsTfoB1V0lQqRYaqWYFGA0KtpKvJRVFO92-D5heQL8xXJplqMkyHNX1XDbjGLwTuE-fRM8dsaDjzGRQZqhyI7PauJtluxmogcgPCNqA5omdUFfXHAeBaU6VcTMZ6x5i4GB4n23OjGL3t2XnMmiIX0wtCf63oUT4JdcGsLwQq4WAuZH27ULAfXSxKfMveTJ-MPsaWxUx9YIxx10u_jeI9b4B32doMoWESchkBwzz8jhq1pz87WR81cfg1o41AX5xldmPFXT_F2ujLxllViBZJg-A7e4fr3CgjG8RFkSr8eUmkYSKZx58ppJGow2gWIKLeruf3t5w6ipI-nJViX4qa6aFwtC95KJkKlGvOIJ0H3Qxj1L3S0dNF4yZNP9yj7H-unF2InRd0wcp7pVctbQXDZG6It2DMhUc6Ny2GU2TGgpFwk_TRdfOJoAwyDe_P8EyKnvSebjwOypmss7_3jmUeXwFXJ1yc%3D) from a country you and I wouldn't recognize anymore.**
**President Trump saved us - with the help of folks like you - from that dire outcome. With that said, he needs loyal partners at the state level to help him succeed. **
**That 's why this race means so much. **
**So if you 've given before (even just once, even just a buck) know this: you've already made a difference, and I will never take your sacrifice for granted. **
**And if you haven 't given yet - [and you’re able to spare even $1 today](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6020760e0bcf48988659c69644f07aeb&_e=DphLojunN5AfVZO_iv13SGgx8dbPfhOqCfhHC-Y93u091S7zPQhr6H7_K81MOAV2zS9ZQzyiS277rnmpWnIpDB6ZxgEJ46XfWsG4tpyLMhhqBovR8_1k4oTbshzVKNIlQ7IDcCxUJ-f2HXRisPgsHfPqvcBQ_dHENgggeIPi7kFoH0IQDho8gFn0VDqXVKtGJqqv2UP6cpfEeNFS3p_luL5-r1AIqVw1hedHkCfhUcS4N1GQoGpU839XCpMCkbYIeoT9RRqgrthbnR8fesTyyAPNug0xSb6pz1DeAsL8OS28yQk8bnCZPOrhwBOuxzB2I4mF89HR113I9KbcWHxEksVQsMtSJLwv5jlKneU3TFfOiuCFV8qP4ohEspJTSg9Dan8bLhD3nD96d5YgnW-KDIXn5Rowl4ziiZWyT9KEb31xg5fkNFmZ1sUXf5CyPT7aIvVgM2W5afMk_PSl5XTvLlEbW0zuxAk6xz6uVf0SNvzK5Zwy3mMO8p045c2ekOFqRrr8hO_mrbBIB0ImWZc5YJkghsCnigoYIEMmNQ2F3VMmUSltPiyP0W4a2npIct9BJUHxsQhTW6KOM8Zu0sfQvVxNd5CVR3_HQsvqFcKAvc4i684odNmy3I3al1ygeBG9dCvYzO-qMJ1K4o9OtvzbXNGp4ylpFigZyHVLovKWYiARKfitFjzirxKwQqyuUPQi-H8xAf493QtR3JmtiHx8TRUqVeXTeNU4u-mgEVD5l2p6s-BK6c0WLnH6spucsB0QhsMB_n04A1fx4xSAaYJnUnXVU5Bgl0jdYVDDHrB76o_bKDBlLgPGeqUdrmdBUDyNRt2wCP6Xdr1cG2IymQsYcF8UzKqa0l9p6TRkTFNuz2neRaCimizMi-vUAOkIJQmqJoziQpNrW7dznYyiNI7T_CHNebscnKJPt5EeoJsX4n0%3D) - I'd be honored to have you on my team.

clean_body: I'm not one for sugarcoating. This race is razor-thin, and I need your immediate support to build back the momentum we need heading into the election year. today is full of noise - phony deadlines, scare tactics, and cheap gimmicks. But I want to cut through the noise for a moment. I grew up right here in Ohio. My parents worked hard to give me a chance at the American Dream, and I know what sacrifice looks like. Every opportunity I've had was built on the back of that sacrifice. why I never forget what it means when someone like you chips in a few dollars. It isn't "just money." It 's trust. It's belief. It's a vote of confidence in the movement we're building in Ohio and beyond. So whether you 've already donated or you're considering it today, let me say this clearly: We 're in an extremely tough fight. And this isn't just any race - it's shaping up to be one of the most important in the country. I threw my hat in the ring now because we have a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to save our country. I mean that. We were from a country you and I wouldn't recognize anymore. President Trump saved us - with the help of folks like you - from that dire outcome. With that said, he needs loyal partners at the state level to help him succeed. That 's why this race means so much. So if you 've given before (even just once, even just a buck) know this: you've already made a difference, and I will never take your sacrifice for granted. And if you haven 't given yet - - I'd be honored to have you on my team. Every single gift, no matter the size, fuels this must-win fight. grateful,Vivek Ramaswamy the election were held today, we 'd come up just short.We can't afford to lose this ground -- not now, not after everything we've built.Your support right now makes the difference between a comeback and a collapse.**| | | | PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO 350 E 1st Ave Ste 100 Columbus, OH 43201

Peter, the latest revelations about this administration’s corruption make it impossible to ignore. Former Border Czar Tom Homan allegedly accepted **$50,000** from undercover FBI agents with the promise to sell business contracts under the Trump administration. And now, Kristi Noem, Secretary of Homeland Security, is reported to have funneled **$220 million** in DHS ad contracts to a firm she has deep ties with. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120167866/585449596/205119699?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251128_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjg2NmE3ZC04NWNjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rVfZK7wbhjJH2TuvPO0uCxDuFuxfPDpE7T2VcjbRxcw=) _Via ProPublica, 11/14/25_ **Trump’s administration treats public office like a private ATM** , and this corruption is happening inside the very department charged with keeping our country safe. Every dollar that should be used to protect our communities is being diverted by insiders to line their pockets and bring their allies more business. This is a gross betrayal of public trust and ethics. _I’m not standing for it._ As someone who served as lead counsel for the impeachment investigation of President Trump, and who spent a decade as an Assistant United States Attorney holding powerful actors accountable, I will keep shining a light on corruption and using every tool to protect our institutions and our people. **[There have never been greater threats to our democracy. Can you chip in to help us fight back and demand accountability today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120167867/585449597/205119699?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251128_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjg2NmE3ZC04NWNjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rVfZK7wbhjJH2TuvPO0uCxDuFuxfPDpE7T2VcjbRxcw=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120167868/585449598/205119699?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251128_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjg2NmE3ZC04NWNjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rVfZK7wbhjJH2TuvPO0uCxDuFuxfPDpE7T2VcjbRxcw=)

clean_body: | Peter, the latest revelations about this administration’s corruption make it impossible to ignore. Former Border Czar Tom Homan allegedly accepted $50,000 from undercover FBI agents with the promise to sell business contracts under the Trump administration. And now, Kristi Noem, Secretary of Homeland Security, is reported to have funneled $220 million in DHS ad contracts to a firm she has deep ties with. = Via ProPublica, 11/14/25 Trump’s administration treats public office like a private ATM , and this corruption is happening inside the very department charged with keeping our country safe. Every dollar that should be used to protect our communities is being diverted by insiders to line their pockets and bring their allies more business. This is a gross betrayal of public trust and ethics. I’m not standing for it. As someone who served as lead counsel for the impeachment investigation of President Trump, and who spent a decade as an Assistant United States Attorney holding powerful actors accountable, I will keep shining a light on corruption and using every tool to protect our institutions and our people. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = I am committed to rooting out corruption, wherever it appears. Thank you for standing with me, Dan Dan Goldman for New York PO BOX 3306 New York, NY 10008 United States | mailto:info@dangoldmanforny.com | Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York

name: Team Jon Ossoff via The Long Run PAC
subject: That video? It’s fake.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
#
Friends,
We told you that MAGA would use every lie and dirty trick in the book to try to replace Jon with a far-right loyalist who will just do whatever Trump says.
Well, here’s Exhibit A:
[](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/3522?c0=lrp-em-spl-ossoff.nOOY2R&refcode=SBD_LRP_EM_FR_Tier1_112825_D1_S1_Ossoff&t=1&akid=5675%2E196590%2Ei31fNj)
Jon’s MAGA opponent created an AI deepfake of Jon with fake information and words he **_never_** said. We’ll explain more in a moment, but first: [**Can you split $25 to help Jon and The Long Run PAC fight back and set the record straight?**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/3522?c0=lrp-em-spl-ossoff.nOOY2R&refcode=SBD_LRP_EM_FR_Tier1_112825_D1_S1_Ossoff&t=2&akid=5675%2E196590%2Ei31fNj)
_This is what we’re up against.._ They know that they can’t attack Jon on his record, so they resort to literally making things up and hoping people don’t realize it’s fake.
**It’s pathetic and creepy.**
_Friends, MAGA is stooping to these depths because _they view Jon Ossoff as a threat._ They want him defeated and gone and replaced with a far-right lackey who will not only allow but actually _support_ Trump’s corruption._
That’s why they’ve already spent $10 MILLION on this race alone, and it’s why they’re resorting to lies and deception like this fake video.
**We can fight back and win, just like we did in 2021. But Jon can’t do it alone.**
[**Will you please make a donation to Jon’s reelection campaign today? Even a $5 or $10 donation split between The Long Run PAC and Jon’s campaign will go a long way toward helping us fight back against this AI deepfake and set the record straight.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/3522?c0=lrp-em-spl-ossoff.nOOY2R&refcode=SBD_LRP_EM_FR_Tier1_112825_D1_S1_Ossoff&t=3&akid=5675%2E196590%2Ei31fNj)

I’m proud that over the last six years, we’ve fought back against far-right extremism by passing laws to protect reproductive freedom, public services, public safety, and more. And right now, at a time when Donald Trump is hurting our workers, families, and so many more in our state, it’s more important than ever that Illinoisans have the right leadership to fight back in Washington, too. [**That’s why I’m asking you to support Eric Sorensen, my ally in Congress, with a donation today. Every dollar given will go toward keeping IL-17 blue and stopping MAGA Republicans' war on our freedoms.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120168146/585450362/795475316?refcode=em-11.28.25-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWE2OGQ1OC04NmNjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MDRu_YOmdUhJsdoe_rBLRm0Xk4zpqzIDKxV02RtI-lY=) | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120168147/585450365/795475316?refcode=em-11.28.25-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWE2OGQ1OC04NmNjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MDRu_YOmdUhJsdoe_rBLRm0Xk4zpqzIDKxV02RtI-lY=)

Right now, Donald Trump is threatening Chicago and doing all that he can to hurt Illinois families.
We can’t back down, or bend to the knee. Not when the threats are so close to home.
That makes it even more important that our representatives in Washington will stand up, defend the Constitution, and their oath to their citizens.
I know Eric, and I know he has never been afraid to stand up for himself, his district, or the freedoms of others.
The big outside spending hasn’t and won’t deter Eric. But during this ongoing war on our freedoms, we can’t risk him taking on the fight for IL-17 alone.

name: John Padora
subject: The story of where I come from – and why I’m running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Padora for Colorado
body:
I want to tell you a story that is not manufactured, not scripted, and not written by political insiders

| [|
---](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/Pd0zaPVq2jze5jXZPj4gbw~~/AAUS1hA~/sZOaZgpltjM7dM5-tFO-4CtWFi3PAD5Ly2kKKtCy3YcRGsZyy_hoGANCDxff3ZAwMsj3kHR54kbmMKGQ5TLFFZjM1q_T_Xgm9Bru-cuW_3p4YlTOWNFH8jeQe7G5wDdX)
| | Friend, I want to tell you a story that is not manufactured, not scripted, and not written by political insiders.
It is **the story of where I come from** – and **why I am in this fight**. I was born in January of 1989 in Allentown, Pennsylvania, right in the heart of working-class America. My dad was a carpenter. My mom was a nurse. We did not have much, but we had everything we needed. It was simple. It was honest. **It was the American Dream** – the dream so many families today feel slipping away. My earliest memories are warm ones. My dad was my best friend from the moment I opened my eyes. He was an avid skier, a community guy, someone who believed in something bigger than himself. He talked to me, even as a kid, about fairness, social issues, and how this country should treat people. And then everything changed. When I was five, my dad was diagnosed with multiple sclerosis. Our family went from living the American Dream to **living the American nightmare**. He lost the ability to work. We lost our financial stability. And the only reason we survived was because of the very things politicians in Washington love to attack: **SNAP, Medicaid, our church, and a community that refused to let us fall through the cracks**. That moment shaped my entire life.
It taught me what happens when the bottom falls out.
It taught me what real people go through when life hits hard.
And it taught me that **sometimes community, not politicians, is what saves you**. My grandfather was a farmer. I grew up around fields, tractors, early mornings, and hard work. From a young age I saw the people who feed this country, build its homes, and care for its communities. Working-class America was not a talking point to me.
**It was my entire world.** **** I carried those lessons into my own life. I worked as a machinist, a manufacturing supervisor, and now an engineer. I have spent nearly two decades supporting the industries that actually keep our nation running – the military, the medical field, aerospace, and the backbone of American manufacturing. I know what it means to work with your hands.
I know what it means to earn every dollar.
And I know what it feels like when leaders forget who they are supposed to serve. __ And this is the part of my story that matters most. **My family is everything to me.**
They are the reason I work hard, the reason I stay grounded, and the reason I refuse to look away while our country and their future crumble under the weight of broken politics and failed leadership. **I am running because they deserve a future full of possibility, not fear.**
Because every child in Eastern Colorado and every family in America deserves the same chance at a good life that my parents and grandparents fought to give me. Because hard work shaped me, and a nation as strong as ours should reward that work, not punish it. When people talk about agriculture, rural America, or working-class values, it is not an abstract concept to me. **I lived it every single day**. I grew up in it. I worked in it. I carried it into factories, machine shops, and engineering labs. And now I am carrying it into this campaign. I am running because I cannot look my kids in the eye and accept a future shaped by politicians like Lauren Boebert, corrupt presidents like Donald Trump, and a political system designed to divide us instead of serve us. I am running because **we deserve better**. And I will fight for Eastern Colorado and for every family in this country with the same determination that got me through farms, factory floors, and the hardest moments of my own life. I want to leave this country better than we found it, with more hope and more opportunity for the next generation. This campaign is not noise.
This is **a working dad, a former machinist, an engineer, and someone who lived through the collapse of his own American Dream saying enough is enough**. Our families deserve better. Our communities deserve better. Our country deserves better. If you believe in a politics that remembers the people who make America work – not the people who profit from dividing us – I am asking you to stand with us. Because real change does not start in Washington.

clean_body: I want to tell you a story that is not manufactured, not scripted, and not written by political insiders | | | Friend, I want to tell you a story that is not manufactured, not scripted, and not written by political insiders. It is the story of where I come from – and why I am in this fight. I was born in January of 1989 in Allentown, Pennsylvania, right in the heart of working-class America. My dad was a carpenter. My mom was a nurse. We did not have much, but we had everything we needed. It was simple. It was honest. It was the American Dream – the dream so many families today feel slipping away. My earliest memories are warm ones. My dad was my best friend from the moment I opened my eyes. He was an avid skier, a community guy, someone who believed in something bigger than himself. He talked to me, even as a kid, about fairness, social issues, and how this country should treat people. And then everything changed. When I was five, my dad was diagnosed with multiple sclerosis. Our family went from living the American Dream to living the American nightmare. He lost the ability to work. We lost our financial stability. And the only reason we survived was because of the very things politicians in Washington love to attack: SNAP, Medicaid, our church, and a community that refused to let us fall through the cracks. That moment shaped my entire life. It taught me what happens when the bottom falls out. It taught me what real people go through when life hits hard. And it taught me that sometimes community, not politicians, is what saves you. My grandfather was a farmer. I grew up around fields, tractors, early mornings, and hard work. From a young age I saw the people who feed this country, build its homes, and care for its communities. Working-class America was not a talking point to me. It was my entire world. ** I carried those lessons into my own life. I worked as a machinist, a manufacturing supervisor, and now an engineer. I have spent nearly two decades supporting the industries that actually keep our nation running – the military, the medical field, aerospace, and the backbone of American manufacturing. I know what it means to work with your hands. I know what it means to earn every dollar. And I know what it feels like when leaders forget who they are supposed to serve. And this is the part of my story that matters most. My family is everything to me. They are the reason I work hard, the reason I stay grounded, and the reason I refuse to look away while our country and their future crumble under the weight of broken politics and failed leadership. I am running because they deserve a future full of possibility, not fear. Because every child in Eastern Colorado and every family in America deserves the same chance at a good life that my parents and grandparents fought to give me. Because hard work shaped me, and a nation as strong as ours should reward that work, not punish it. When people talk about agriculture, rural America, or working-class values, it is not an abstract concept to me. I lived it every single day. I grew up in it. I worked in it. I carried it into factories, machine shops, and engineering labs. And now I am carrying it into this campaign. I am running because I cannot look my kids in the eye and accept a future shaped by politicians like Lauren Boebert, corrupt presidents like Donald Trump, and a political system designed to divide us instead of serve us. I am running because we deserve better. And I will fight for Eastern Colorado and for every family in this country with the same determination that got me through farms, factory floors, and the hardest moments of my own life. I want to leave this country better than we found it, with more hope and more opportunity for the next generation. This campaign is not noise. This is a working dad, a former machinist, an engineer, and someone who lived through the collapse of his own American Dream saying enough is enough. Our families deserve better. Our communities deserve better. Our country deserves better. If you believe in a politics that remembers the people who make America work – not the people who profit from dividing us – I am asking you to stand with us. Because real change does not start in Washington. It starts in families like mine – and communities like ours. ~ If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | ---|--- | ---|--- | ~~ ---|--- Let us prove that a campaign built by families, neighbors and working people can defeat the politicians who hide from their own communities. John Padora** Working dad, engineer, fighter - Candidate for US congress CO-04 | Paid for by Padora for Colorado Padora for ColoradoPO Box 116Severance, CO 80546United States "Website"•~~ "Privacy Policy"

1. Trump and Congressional Republicans threw millions off their health care and laid off thousands of public lands workers. They’re indifferent to working families and the reality they’re now forced to face.
2. We need to break the Republican trifecta of control on the House, Senate, and White House — and the only way we can do it is with a surge of grassroots support.

body:
I never thought I’d see the day.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20251128-1&t=1&akid=2891%2E587540%2ELhnLsh)
I never thought I’d see the day, Peter.
**Fox News actually said something _nice_ about me... for once.**
[****](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251128_1_fox.xgDIAH&refcode=em20251128-2891&%3Bamount=5&t=2&akid=2891%2E587540%2ELhnLsh)
I don’t care if Fox compliments me or attacks me. But they are right (and you don’t see that every day).
I _am_ celebrating Zohran’s win. He’s a young, unapologetic progressive who took down a powerful, entrenched machine in New York politics.
And he didn’t do it by playing nice — he did it by organizing, standing firm in his values, and refusing to settle for crumbs.
That’s exactly the kind of leadership we need right now.
Too many Democrats are comfortable. Too many are silent while the far right tramples our rights and sells off our future. We don’t have time for inaction. We need leaders who will meet this moment with the urgency it demands.
That’s why we founded **Leaders We Deserve:** to elect bold, young progressives like Zohran Mamdani all across the country — and not just to blue states. We're building power in places where the GOP thought they’d never be challenged.
But we need your help to keep going.
**[Will you pitch in $5 to keep fueling our movement to change the system?](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251128_1_fox.xgDIAH&refcode=em20251128-2891&amount=5&t=3&akid=2891%2E587540%2ELhnLsh)**

David

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671. | | You are receiving this newsletter from Your Capital Minds (YCM), an esteemed member of the Stark Media LLC family. name: John McGuire For Congress
subject: Reminder: Happy Thanksgiving, Praying for Our Guardsmen, More Bad Leadership in the 5th
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by McGuire for Virginia
body:
Get out the vote, Please Remind Friends to Vote
| | | | [View as Webpage](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018wA0QdHVgHfkrMbZB8iClnh1aq1nsFE0pxiyzAxQo9eQUpaVRBaNOlYDRkZXaSITk07NarI-RJRbtAHflthZ5UrRhTGT2SYDp2a0_6N71ifJf1s7PQm1RSc45WTfWC1W9wW34z2jdO-MdleiSv6l0CiiP3MEBX4A&c=W98xuednE3VOwEQBDny7BAKeiBN-pE9Pf2VaJeQUTR8X-vOrDImD-w==&ch=LSM5HEYquu_jnprKxDiVnDhCyl0UGp8Yiz0kr9gdjH5icH2DsavcYQ==)
---
| Happy Thanksgiving!
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Team,
Tracy and I want to wish you and your loved ones a Happy Thanksgiving! As Americans, we have much to be thankful for. We are blessed to live in a country where our God given rights are enshrined in the U.S. Constitution.
Please say a prayer for all our men and women in the military and our first responders who are away from home this holiday season, keeping us safe. I am thankful that fellow Americans re-elected Donald J. Trump and that we now have a majority in the House and a simple majority in the Senate. I am honored to be the first republican endorsed by President Trump for re-election in 2026.
We are praying for the families of the two National Guardsmen shot in D.C. This is a heartbreaking situation. It doesn't help when Democrats like Abigail Spanberger say things such as "Let your rage fuel you" and then Dems produce a ["seditious six"](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018wA0QdHVgHfkrMbZB8iClnh1aq1nsFE0pxiyzAxQo9eQUpaVRBaNOnwe-EbYxO6nUh4eaKeD3YQP9kVcX4yNwiNH2EYYVdk_AiylXaYoDQb9bbrPEOntIdl8OEjs6GN99iWc97Gf6eH8wEUhVY0nSFxPY0m1qckHj6_E255WMelIoMO_58xX4g==&c=W98xuednE3VOwEQBDny7BAKeiBN-pE9Pf2VaJeQUTR8X-vOrDImD-w==&ch=LSM5HEYquu_jnprKxDiVnDhCyl0UGp8Yiz0kr9gdjH5icH2DsavcYQ==) video that causes the American people to be angry at our military. Evil does exist. If you see something, say something, and do something. Let's keep an eye on each other. [Secretary of War Pete Hegseth response here.](https://eky6fg9ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018wA0QdHVgHfkrMbZB8iClnh1aq1nsFE0pxiyzAxQo9eQUpaVRBaNOnwe-EbYxO6nqcRBxwBQWdtK6BOByrrXNES-zMgdUYWLdBwKwJLhyHqdqmt4QpSxbL_oQgiyeqVbohxac4SDWywJkHGs-1qOsXTpKnMPWrgYTN3vnV_9rz4gTkpKnMIITw==&c=W98xuednE3VOwEQBDny7BAKeiBN-pE9Pf2VaJeQUTR8X-vOrDImD-w==&ch=LSM5HEYquu_jnprKxDiVnDhCyl0UGp8Yiz0kr9gdjH5icH2DsavcYQ==)
It is an honor to represent you in Virginia's 5th Congressional District. God bless you, God bless our Commonwealth, and God bless America!
---
| How To Bag a RINO
---
| |
---
| I posted this picture/ message back when I decided to primary Bob Good. I did so because I was fed up with his anti-Christian/ hateful behavior towards his republican constituents. I wrote back then:
I'm catching up on my 'Honey Do" list before I bag a RINO in the Spring.
We can do better than Good. Bob Good has a history of helping Democrats.
1\. He betrayed Trump.
2\. Bob continues to support a 3 time Democrat in Louisa County who continues to raise taxes. 3\. Bob cost us the House & the Senate by ousting the Speaker with no plan. This also prevented us from timely helping Israel.
4\. Bob bullies fellow Republicans including Senior Citizens. I have heard several people say "that's just Bob." Those who keep giving him a pass for this wrongful behavior are complicit.
"I got mine, the heck with the team". While everyone was fighting across Virginia to help fellow Republicans win the House and the Senate, Bob was helping Bob...
---
| More "I got Mine the heck with the team"
---
| |
---
| My team and I, along with thousands of volunteers, campaigned nonstop across the 5th District and the Commonwealth to elect Republicans up and down the ticket. Yet in the critical final weeks before the election, the former 5th district Congressman, who, believe it or not, has already filed to primary me in 2026, toured the district telling Republican committees and activists that he would not support one of our statewide candidates and openly disparaged our party, and President Trump. That is vote suppression, plain and simple, carried out by a so called republican (RINO) against his own side. People called us appalled after each committee meeting and gave us recorded proof.
Any fair-minded Republican has to ask: why did the 5th District Republican Committee chairman and multiple unit GOP chairs allow a bitter former elected official to campaign inside our own house against our own nominees, mere weeks and days before the election? How is that leadership? How does that help us win?
This was not an isolated incident; it is part of a continuing pattern of dysfunctional, ego-driven decisions out of the 5th committee that keep costing us winnable elections. I've been told when committee chairs dare speak up against the pettiness, they get silenced and humiliated.
I have therefore lost any and all confidence in the current 5th District GOP chairman's ability to lead anything. We deserve better. Our voters deserve better. And if we want to start winning again in Virginia, we need new leadership that puts the team first, not personal vendettas, not petty score-settling, but victory.
Folks, we have a country to save, we need all hands on deck, and we don't have time for this nonsense. The 5th District can and should be the engine to help Republican success in the district and across the Commonwealth. With the right leadership, we will turn Virginia red again. Stay tuned!
---
| For God and Country,
---
|
---
Congressman John McGuire VA 05 Soli Deo Gloria
Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL Business Owner
-Trump Endorsed -NRA Endorsed -Susan B. Anthony's List Endorsed -RJC Endorsed -Mark Levin Endorsed Pro-Life Pro-Gun Pro-Israel American Legion Member VFW (Life Member) NRA (Life Member) Highest Award for Conservatism (ACU/ CPAC) Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 (Life Member) America First The Spirit of Virginia

clean_body: Get out the vote, Please Remind Friends to Vote | | | | == | Happy Thanksgiving! | | | | | Team, Tracy and I want to wish you and your loved ones a Happy Thanksgiving! As Americans, we have much to be thankful for. We are blessed to live in a country where our God given rights are enshrined in the U.S. Constitution. Please say a prayer for all our men and women in the military and our first responders who are away from home this holiday season, keeping us safe. I am thankful that fellow Americans re-elected Donald J. Trump and that we now have a majority in the House and a simple majority in the Senate. I am honored to be the first republican endorsed by President Trump for re-election in 2026. We are praying for the families of the two National Guardsmen shot in D.C. This is a heartbreaking situation. It doesn't help when Democrats like Abigail Spanberger say things such as "Let your rage fuel you" and then Dems produce a == video that causes the American people to be angry at our military. Evil does exist. If you see something, say something, and do something. Let's keep an eye on each other. == It is an honor to represent you in Virginia's 5th Congressional District. God bless you, God bless our Commonwealth, and God bless America! | How To Bag a RINO | | | I posted this picture/ message back when I decided to primary Bob Good. I did so because I was fed up with his anti-Christian/ hateful behavior towards his republican constituents. I wrote back then: I'm catching up on my 'Honey Do" list before I bag a RINO in the Spring. We can do better than Good. Bob Good has a history of helping Democrats. 1\. He betrayed Trump. 2\. Bob continues to support a 3 time Democrat in Louisa County who continues to raise taxes. 3\. Bob cost us the House & the Senate by ousting the Speaker with no plan. This also prevented us from timely helping Israel. 4\. Bob bullies fellow Republicans including Senior Citizens. I have heard several people say "that's just Bob." Those who keep giving him a pass for this wrongful behavior are complicit. "I got mine, the heck with the team". While everyone was fighting across Virginia to help fellow Republicans win the House and the Senate, Bob was helping Bob... | More "I got Mine the heck with the team" | | | My team and I, along with thousands of volunteers, campaigned nonstop across the 5th District and the Commonwealth to elect Republicans up and down the ticket. Yet in the critical final weeks before the election, the former 5th district Congressman, who, believe it or not, has already filed to primary me in 2026, toured the district telling Republican committees and activists that he would not support one of our statewide candidates and openly disparaged our party, and President Trump. That is vote suppression, plain and simple, carried out by a so called republican (RINO) against his own side. People called us appalled after each committee meeting and gave us recorded proof. Any fair-minded Republican has to ask: why did the 5th District Republican Committee chairman and multiple unit GOP chairs allow a bitter former elected official to campaign inside our own house against our own nominees, mere weeks and days before the election? How is that leadership? How does that help us win? This was not an isolated incident; it is part of a continuing pattern of dysfunctional, ego-driven decisions out of the 5th committee that keep costing us winnable elections. I've been told when committee chairs dare speak up against the pettiness, they get silenced and humiliated. I have therefore lost any and all confidence in the current 5th District GOP chairman's ability to lead anything. We deserve better. Our voters deserve better. And if we want to start winning again in Virginia, we need new leadership that puts the team first, not personal vendettas, not petty score-settling, but victory. Folks, we have a country to save, we need all hands on deck, and we don't have time for this nonsense. The 5th District can and should be the engine to help Republican success in the district and across the Commonwealth. With the right leadership, we will turn Virginia red again. Stay tuned! | For God and Country, | Congressman John McGuire VA 05 Soli Deo Gloria Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL Business Owner -Trump Endorsed -NRA Endorsed -Susan B. Anthony's List Endorsed -RJC Endorsed -Mark Levin Endorsed Pro-Life Pro-Gun Pro-Israel American Legion Member VFW (Life Member) NRA (Life Member) Highest Award for Conservatism (ACU/ CPAC) Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 (Life Member) America First The Spirit of Virginia == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA == == john@mcguireva.com www.mcguireva.com | | | | == | | == | == | == == == | Paid for and Authorized by McGuire for Virginia | | | | McGuire for Virginia | PO Box 242 | Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 US | | | | | | |

Hey Peter, it’s Jon. I’m respectfully asking: [Can you split a donation of $10 to my reelection campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120169407/585453051/-1748950076?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_112825_OSSOFFSPLIT_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2ZmMjc2MS04YWNjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mv5vaoDfIR6d8Qf415Gd9VTiSv0TlnghFQNVJSyJdDo=) Sorry to be so direct, but winning in 2026 is our only hope to regain Congressional power and reverse our ongoing descent toward one-man rule. And I am the _only_ Democratic U.S. Senator up for reelection in a state Trump won. That makes me MAGA’s #1 target in 2026. They’re already spending MILLIONS of dollars to try to defeat me. **_There is no path back from the brink of authoritarianism without defending this seat — the very seat that secured the Democratic majority in 2021._** So I'm asking for your help. Not for me, **for all of us.** [If you’re able, please make a contribution of any amount to my campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120169409/585453053/-1748950076?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_112825_OSSOFFSPLIT_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2ZmMjc2MS04YWNjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mv5vaoDfIR6d8Qf415Gd9VTiSv0TlnghFQNVJSyJdDo=) The campaign will be brutal. _But this team wins the hardest battles._ We flipped Georgia when no one thought it was possible. Remember? We unseated an entrenched GOP incumbent to win the Senate majority. And we will win again — with your help. [Please: send $10 to my reelection campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120169411/585453055/-1748950076?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_112825_OSSOFFSPLIT_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2ZmMjc2MS04YWNjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mv5vaoDfIR6d8Qf415Gd9VTiSv0TlnghFQNVJSyJdDo=) With gratitude,

clean_body: If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Hey Peter, it’s Jon. I’m respectfully asking: = Sorry to be so direct, but winning in 2026 is our only hope to regain Congressional power and reverse our ongoing descent toward one-man rule. And I am the only Democratic U.S. Senator up for reelection in a state Trump won. That makes me MAGA’s #1 target in 2026. They’re already spending MILLIONS of dollars to try to defeat me. There is no path back from the brink of authoritarianism without defending this seat — the very seat that secured the Democratic majority in 2021. So I'm asking for your help. Not for me, for all of us. = The campaign will be brutal. But this team wins the hardest battles. We flipped Georgia when no one thought it was possible. Remember? We unseated an entrenched GOP incumbent to win the Senate majority. And we will win again — with your help. = With gratitude, Senator Jon Ossoff | | = | = Help Elect Georgia Democrats. These last several months have been tough. I’ve heard so many stories from folks back home in the district – worried about their health care, rising costs, and the future of our country.

In Congress, I’ve made it a point to demand accountability from this administration and my colleagues on the other side of the aisle. We must keep working against the MAGA agenda.

As you can imagine, national Republicans aren’t so happy with people like me who are taking a stand. It’s why the NRCC is already airing baseless attack ads against me, and why I have a challenger with the full might of the GOP machine behind him.

While the midterm elections are a year away, we’re making preparations now for the battle to come. I was one of only a handful of Democrats who flipped GOP-held seats in 2024, and that makes me one of the most at-risk incumbents in Congress.

There is hope: I’ve seen the power of this grassroots movement before. It’s how we were able to flip this seat, and why I’m able to work to get results in Washington.

**[So today, ahead of my end-of-month deadline on Sunday, I’m only asking you to chip in $1. If everyone reading this email donated $1, we’d send an unmistakable message of strength.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120170499/585455996/148511826?refcode=em-11.28.25-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjYwN2M3OS04Y2NjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tY9rxvKxvTAefw9Q-F4R5UqTlrhZdXyNkARwvzqIf7c=)**

name: The Flyover
subject: A reminder
body:
Black Friday + Reader Bonuses = Up to 25% extra shares.

---
| | |
---
| |
#
---
Dear _Flyover_ Family, A quick note this Black Friday to remind you of something special we announced earlier this week -- our **largest bonus-share offer ever** is officially live. **From today through Cyber Monday, every new investment receives:**
* +10% Black Friday/Cyber Monday Bonus
* +5% Reader Bonus
* +Up to 10% Large-Investor Bonus
* -> Up to 25% bonus shares

**Here 's what that means in real terms:
**
At $2 per share, a $1,000 investment normally buys 500 shares. During this bonus window, that same investment comes with 75 extra shares, giving you 575 shares total -- a 15% boost in value at that level. If you believe America needs a stronger, unbiased, common-sense alternative to legacy media, today is the day to become an owner. Peter,

Democrats are comparing Trump supporters to **“wannabe Hitlers”** and **“vile villains”** because a combat-decorated Navy SEAL is on the cusp of surging into the lead in the Minnesota Senate race.

They never saw this coming — and they’re panicking.

name: Ted Cruz
subject: Don’t let today slip away —
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
Our mission can’t fall behind during Thanksgiving...

| | | [](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)
---
| | Hi Fellow Conservative, As the holidays ramp up, everyone's attention starts getting pulled in a hundred different directions -- shopping, planning, travel, family, all of it. _We get it._ But our end-of-month fundraising deadline is hours away, and the reality is simple: **the work we 're doing doesn't stop just because the calendar is getting busy.** We're reaching a critical point, and falling short now would weaken the momentum we've built up all year. We can't afford to slip -- not now, not when so much is on the line. Online donations always decrease during Thanksgiving- can you please help us stay on pace? **We need extra support before 12/1 if we want keep pace with Democrats.** If you can, please take a quick minute -- before the day gets away from you -- and chip in to help us close this gap:
---
[ **Donate Now:** **_$5, $10, or $29 is a huge help >>_**](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)
---
Thank you for staying with us, we are all so THANKFUL for your support.

-- Team Cruz **PS:** Even a $1 donation would help us keep fighting! Thank you! **[Donate here>>](https://trk.email.tedcruz.-oA)**
---

name: Andrea Salinas
subject: my promise
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120171197/585458142/318555295?amount=6&refcode=email_112825_promise&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDBjNGQyYy04ZGNjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OLRFUZpGVwfN0Km46O_yZKb9eHJEuFKWH8PbVobF-Gc=) Team, When my daughter Amelia was born, I made a promise to do everything in my power to shape a stronger, more equitable future for Amelia and her generation. I’ve spent the past three years in Congress working to fulfill that promise: fighting for increased access to affordable health care, our planet and natural resources, reproductive freedoms, and working to level the playing field for EVERY American. [**But I have to be honest with you: right now, Donald Trump and his MAGA majority are making my promise harder to keep. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120171198/585458143/318555295?amount=6&refcode=email_112825_promise&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDBjNGQyYy04ZGNjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OLRFUZpGVwfN0Km46O_yZKb9eHJEuFKWH8PbVobF-Gc=)

[_**Flipping the House in 2026 is our BEST chance to rein in Donald Trump’s authoritarian administration, and start delivering real change — not just for Amelia, but for every Oregonian impacted by Republicans' attacks. That starts with defending must-hold districts like OR-06 to enable Democrats to go on the offensive. Will you chip in $6 to help Democrats take back the House, and finally put a stop to the MAGA agenda?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120171199/585458144/318555295?amount=6&refcode=email_112825_promise&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDBjNGQyYy04ZGNjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OLRFUZpGVwfN0Km46O_yZKb9eHJEuFKWH8PbVobF-Gc=) | | [Donate $6→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120171200/585458145/318555295?amount=6&refcode=email_112825_promise&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDBjNGQyYy04ZGNjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OLRFUZpGVwfN0Km46O_yZKb9eHJEuFKWH8PbVobF-Gc=)
---
I won’t lie to you: What’s happening in our country right now is terrifying.
When I decided to run for Congress, I never imagined I’d be working alongside colleagues and administration who want to move our country _backward._
They are playing political games with our rights, our freedoms, our health, and our families.
But instead of throwing my hands up — which is what Trump and Republicans want us to do — I’m turning back to my original promise: [**shaping a stronger, more equitable future for Amelia and her generation.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120171201/585458146/318555295?amount=6&refcode=email_112825_promise&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDBjNGQyYy04ZGNjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OLRFUZpGVwfN0Km46O_yZKb9eHJEuFKWH8PbVobF-Gc=)
[_**I’m fighting to defend OR-06, fight back against Trump’s MAGA majority by flipping the House for Democrats, and build a stronger, better, future for all of us. If you’re with me, I’d be honored to have your support. Pitching in today keeps our campaign strong and helps us deliver the change Amelia and future generations deserve. Can I count on you? → **_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120171202/585458147/318555295?amount=6&refcode=email_112825_promise&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDBjNGQyYy04ZGNjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OLRFUZpGVwfN0Km46O_yZKb9eHJEuFKWH8PbVobF-Gc=)
