Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

body: Defense contractors are blocking simple fixes—and taxpayers are paying the price. Here’s how Democrats are pushing back. (https://democratically.org/) Peter Sen. name: James Carville
subject: Republicans might win in New Hampshire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
If we lose New Hampshire, we lose any shot at flipping the Senate. Period.
Folks, it’s James Carville.
If I had any hair, I’d be ripping it out right now!!
Democrats’ chances of winning the New Hampshire Senate race have _officially been downgraded.**That means Republicans are in spitting distance of flipping this seat and cutting off ANY chance Democrats have of retaking control of the Senate next year._**
**[Before you read another word, chip in $5 to help Chris Pappas hold the line in New Hampshire.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/221?c0=em_ms_cp_20251128_2_carville.jeBxtC&refcode=em20251128-2&t=1&akid=3750%2E582294%2EbgxX7P)**
**[Rush $5 to Chris Pappas Right Now!](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251128_2_carville.Nl4nZ6&amount=5&refcode=em20251128-2&t=2&akid=3750%2E582294%2EbgxX7P)**
Let me be crystal clear. If Democrats blow it in New Hampshire, we have NO path to taking back the Senate. Not a snowball’s chance in hell.
Any guess who the GOP just recruited into the race? John Sununu. Yes, that same Sununu family. John’s got the famous last name, he’s got Wall Street’s money, and he’s got the full force of the national Republican establishment behind him.
Chris Pappas is the only thing standing in their way. Chris isn’t some lightweight. He’s won one of the toughest Congressional districts in the country four times running. He knows how to fight and win.
**_But — with Sununu in the race — if we don’t rally around Chris Pappas right now, we’re going to get steamrolled!_**
So here’s what I need from you: **[Chip in $5, or more if you can, to help Chris Pappas fight back and hold this seat for the Democrats.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/221?c0=em_ms_cp_20251128_2_carville.jeBxtC&refcode=em20251128-2&t=3&akid=3750%2E582294%2EbgxX7P)**
**[Rush $5 to Chris Pappas Right Now!](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251128_2_carville.Nl4nZ6&amount=5&refcode=em20251128-2&t=4&akid=3750%2E582294%2EbgxX7P)**
_This is the GOP’s dream scenario:_ an open seat in a swing state, a big-name Republican, and a whole lot of dark money to burn. I know from my years of campaigning that this is exactly what they were hoping for.
**It’s time to get off our butts and fight like hell for Chris.** Let’s show these Republican bigshots that they can’t just waltz in and buy New Hampshire. Not on our watch.
**[Give what you can right now.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/221?c0=em_ms_cp_20251128_2_carville.jeBxtC&refcode=em20251128-2&t=5&akid=3750%2E582294%2EbgxX7P)** Let’s win this damn thing and flip the Senate.
— James Carville
[](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/221?c0=em_ms_cp_20251128_2_carville.jeBxtC&refcode=em20251128-2&t=6&akid=3750%2E582294%2EbgxX7P)
**[Donate ››](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251128_2_carville.Nl4nZ6&amount=5&refcode=em20251128-2&t=7&akid=3750%2E582294%2EbgxX7P)**

# Campbells VP fired over tirade about his own company
After the shocking public leak of the audio, **[Campbell Soup fired Vice President Martin Bally](https://substack.com/redirect/86e38c9d-2504-49c7-904a-d703d0b1e65f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after he allegedly ranted in a November 2024 recording that the company's iconic foods are "s--- for f---ing poor people," sparking a wrongful termination lawsuit from the whistleblower who captured it.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/86e38c9d-2504-49c7-904a-d703d0b1e65f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Swift Internal Probe Launched** : Campbell's placed Bally on leave post-leak, verified his voice on the tape, and deemed the remarks "patently absurd" before terminating him for clashing with company values.
* **Bally 's Vulgar Rant Exposed**: During a restaurant meeting, Bally mocked Campbell's products as absurd, derided bioengineered meat as "3D-printed chicken," and admitted arriving at work high on marijuana, per the leaked audio.
* **Racial Slurs Spark Lawsuit** : Bally's tirade included anti-Indian coworker jabs like "F---ing Indians don't know a f---ing thing," fueling ex-analyst Robert Garza's Michigan suit alleging retaliation after he reported the recording.
* **Retaliation Claims Escalate Tension** : Garza, axed 20 days after flagging the audio, demands damages; Campbell's decries the comments as false while defending its "high-quality" soups and loyal customer base.

# SEC Probes Jefferies in Shocking Auto Empire Crash!
The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission has launched an early-stage **[investigation into Jefferies Financial Group](https://substack.com/redirect/43aef28a-7d4c-4677-a108-f1492b9638bb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** over its ties to the collapsed auto parts giant First Brands Group, probing whether the bank's Point Bonita fund misled investors on risky debt exposure amid Wall Street's fresh fears of hidden bad loans.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/43aef28a-7d4c-4677-a108-f1492b9638bb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Fund Exposure Scrutinized** : SEC is targeting Jefferies' Point Bonita fund for allegedly under-disclosing its heavy bets on First Brands' tangled debt stack, sparking transparency red flags.
* **Internal Controls Questioned** : Probe will delves into Jefferies' oversight mechanisms and potential conflicts, examining if bank practices enabled unchecked risks in the failed auto venture.
* **Market Shares Plunge** : Jefferies stock has tumbled 12% this quarter and 27% year-to-date, amplifying investor jitters over broader Wall Street loan vulnerabilities exposed by the collapse.
* **Outcome Remains Uncertain** : While early in process with no wrongdoing alleged yet, the inquiry could escalate to charges.

* * *
* * *
# Futures trading in turmoil as data center failure brings global trading grinding to a halt!
Chicago's CME Group **[slammed the brakes on global futures](https://substack.com/redirect/b0c29b1f-e9be-44ba-ad5c-da5584202011?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and Foreign Exchange (FX) trading after a chiller and cooling failure at a key data center plunged markets into chaos, halting billions in deals just as post-Thanksgiving sessions kicked off--leaving traders sweating over delayed reopenings.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b0c29b1f-e9be-44ba-ad5c-da5584202011?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Chiller Breakdown Sparks Halt** : CyrusOne's CHI1 facility in Chicago suffered a multi-unit cooling failure on November 27, triggering the outage across Globex platforms for ag, energy, metals, and equities.
* **Global Sessions Reel First** : Asian and European traders bore the brunt during overnight hours, stalling price action in a tight post-holiday range, while U.S. premarket stocks traded uninterrupted.
* **Erratic Pricing Hits Assets** : Gold spreads **[ballooned](https://substack.com/redirect/92c71cb1-80ff-4dc7-a373-9f8696352966?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** 20-fold, complicating delta-hedging for **[$600 billion in S&P 500 options](https://substack.com/redirect/92c71cb1-80ff-4dc7-a373-9f8696352966?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and delaying physical settlements in oil and fuels.
* **Trader Fury Echoes Globally** : Market pros vented anger over "flying dark" conditions, with EBS forex platform and Bursa Malaysia palm oil trades among the casualties.
* **Staged Reboot Underway** : Stock futures and options resumed at 8:30 a.m. ET Friday, with bonds and metals following; full restoration hinges on temporary cooling fixes amid engineering scrambles.
* **Traders Shrug Off Chaos** : Experts call it an inconvenient blip on a sleepy day, predicting minimal distortions as CME vows transparency, though lingering delays could ripple into contract pricing.

* * *
* * *
# Europe to launch it's own "Golden Dome" as global threats surge
In a bold move amid surging geopolitical threats, Italian defense giant Leonardo **[unveiled the"Michelangelo Dome" on Thursday](https://substack.com/redirect/1b0bba08-60b9-4cee-a56b-94eb68fbccda?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**--an AI-driven shield system poised to safeguard European cities from missile barrages and drone swarms, echoing Israel's Iron Dome while championing open-architecture interoperability.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1b0bba08-60b9-4cee-a56b-94eb68fbccda?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **AI Shields Urban Strongholds** : The plan is to integrate sea-to-air defenses into a unified network, prioritizing protection for critical infrastructure against asymmetric attacks where defense costs outpace attack costs.
* **Open Design Fuels Alliances** : The plan employs modular architecture for seamless compatibility with any nation's systems, fostering pan-European collaboration and countering fragmented NATO data protocols.
* **Operational Push by Decade 's End**: The aim is to achieve full deployment within five years, shifting investments from isolated hardware to AI command hubs, despite risks from procurement delays and startup rivals like Helsing.
* **Defense Stocks Surge Wildly** : Leonardo shares spiked 77% in 2025, buoyed by EU's €150B in procurement loans and NATO's 5% spending pledge, signaling a network-centric warfare boom.

* * *
* * *
# After 14 years Apple finally topples Samsung as the smartphone king
In a seismic shift for the tech titans, **[Apple is poised to dethrone Samsung](https://substack.com/redirect/410bc3a1-9077-4f3d-a418-8e4517cf5b55?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** as the world's top smartphone shipper in 2025, surging ahead with a projected 10% iPhone boom fueled by the hotly anticipated iPhone 17 series and a massive post-COVID upgrade wave.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/410bc3a1-9077-4f3d-a418-8e4517cf5b55?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Historic Market Flip** : Apple's 19.4% share edges Samsung's 18.7% in 2025, snapping the Korean giant's 14-year reign since 2011.
* **Robust Growth Surge** : iPhone shipments leapt 10% year-over-year, outpacing Samsung's 4.6% rise amid global market expansion of 3.3%.
* **Upgrade Cycle Ignites** : 358 million second-hand iPhones sold since 2023 have sparked a replacement frenzy, boosting demand through 2029.
* **Strategic Rival Plays** : Samsung targets emerging markets with affordable A-series upgrades, while Chinese firms chase premium overseas profits.

clean_body: Iconic brand cuts all ties as more outrageous details come to light | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Iconic brand cuts all ties as more outrageous details come to light | | | Nov 28 | | | | | | | | | | | | Hello Capitalists, Here is everything you should be following today: Campbells VP gets canned after wild rant The SEC investigates Jefferies over their role in First Brands implosion Futures trading has a bad morning after data center failure Europe to launch its very own "Golden Dome" After 14 years, Apple finally dethrones Samsung Today 's markets + assets: ✅ DOW: 47716.42 (⬆️ 0.61%) ✅ S&P: 6849.09 (⬆️ 0.54%) ✅ NASDAQ: 23365.68 (⬆️ 0.65%) ⚠ ️🔴CBOE VIX Volatility Index: 16.35 (⬇️ 5.00%) ✅ Gold: $4259.20 (⬆️ 1.36%) ✅ Silver: $57.13 (⬆️ 6.58%) 🔴 Bitcoin: $90,901.00 (⬇️ 0.60%) The Capitalist is a reader-supported publication Reject Corporate Left-Wing Journalism Campbells VP fired over tirade about his own company After the shocking public leak of the audio, after he allegedly ranted in a November 2024 recording that the company's iconic foods are "s--- for f---ing poor people," sparking a wrongful termination lawsuit from the whistleblower who captured it. | | ---|---|--- Swift Internal Probe Launched : Campbell's placed Bally on leave post-leak, verified his voice on the tape, and deemed the remarks "patently absurd" before terminating him for clashing with company values. Bally 's Vulgar Rant Exposed: During a restaurant meeting, Bally mocked Campbell's products as absurd, derided bioengineered meat as "3D-printed chicken," and admitted arriving at work high on marijuana, per the leaked audio. Racial Slurs Spark Lawsuit : Bally's tirade included anti-Indian coworker jabs like "F---ing Indians don't know a f---ing thing," fueling ex-analyst Robert Garza's Michigan suit alleging retaliation after he reported the recording. Retaliation Claims Escalate Tension : Garza, axed 20 days after flagging the audio, demands damages; Campbell's decries the comments as false while defending its "high-quality" soups and loyal customer base. | | ---|---|--- SEC Probes Jefferies in Shocking Auto Empire Crash! The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission has launched an early-stage over its ties to the collapsed auto parts giant First Brands Group, probing whether the bank's Point Bonita fund misled investors on risky debt exposure amid Wall Street's fresh fears of hidden bad loans. | | ---|---|--- Fund Exposure Scrutinized : SEC is targeting Jefferies' Point Bonita fund for allegedly under-disclosing its heavy bets on First Brands' tangled debt stack, sparking transparency red flags. Internal Controls Questioned : Probe will delves into Jefferies' oversight mechanisms and potential conflicts, examining if bank practices enabled unchecked risks in the failed auto venture. Market Shares Plunge : Jefferies stock has tumbled 12% this quarter and 27% year-to-date, amplifying investor jitters over broader Wall Street loan vulnerabilities exposed by the collapse. Outcome Remains Uncertain : While early in process with no wrongdoing alleged yet, the inquiry could escalate to charges. Futures trading in turmoil as data center failure brings global trading grinding to a halt! Chicago's CME Group and Foreign Exchange (FX) trading after a chiller and cooling failure at a key data center plunged markets into chaos, halting billions in deals just as post-Thanksgiving sessions kicked off--leaving traders sweating over delayed reopenings. | | ---|---|--- Chiller Breakdown Sparks Halt : CyrusOne's CHI1 facility in Chicago suffered a multi-unit cooling failure on November 27, triggering the outage across Globex platforms for ag, energy, metals, and equities. Global Sessions Reel First : Asian and European traders bore the brunt during overnight hours, stalling price action in a tight post-holiday range, while U.S. premarket stocks traded uninterrupted. Erratic Pricing Hits Assets : Gold spreads 20-fold, complicating delta-hedging for and delaying physical settlements in oil and fuels. Trader Fury Echoes Globally : Market pros vented anger over "flying dark" conditions, with EBS forex platform and Bursa Malaysia palm oil trades among the casualties. Staged Reboot Underway : Stock futures and options resumed at 8:30 a.m. ET Friday, with bonds and metals following; full restoration hinges on temporary cooling fixes amid engineering scrambles. Traders Shrug Off Chaos : Experts call it an inconvenient blip on a sleepy day, predicting minimal distortions as CME vows transparency, though lingering delays could ripple into contract pricing. Europe to launch it's own "Golden Dome" as global threats surge In a bold move amid surging geopolitical threats, Italian defense giant Leonardo AI-driven shield system poised to safeguard European cities from missile barrages and drone swarms, echoing Israel's Iron Dome while championing open-architecture interoperability. | | ---|---|--- AI Shields Urban Strongholds : The plan is to integrate sea-to-air defenses into a unified network, prioritizing protection for critical infrastructure against asymmetric attacks where defense costs outpace attack costs. Open Design Fuels Alliances : The plan employs modular architecture for seamless compatibility with any nation's systems, fostering pan-European collaboration and countering fragmented NATO data protocols. Operational Push by Decade 's End: The aim is to achieve full deployment within five years, shifting investments from isolated hardware to AI command hubs, despite risks from procurement delays and startup rivals like Helsing. Defense Stocks Surge Wildly : Leonardo shares spiked 77% in 2025, buoyed by EU's €150B in procurement loans and NATO's 5% spending pledge, signaling a network-centric warfare boom. After 14 years Apple finally topples Samsung as the smartphone king In a seismic shift for the tech titans, as the world's top smartphone shipper in 2025, surging ahead with a projected 10% iPhone boom fueled by the hotly anticipated iPhone 17 series and a massive post-COVID upgrade wave. | | ---|---|--- Historic Market Flip : Apple's 19.4% share edges Samsung's 18.7% in 2025, snapping the Korean giant's 14-year reign since 2011. Robust Growth Surge : iPhone shipments leapt 10% year-over-year, outpacing Samsung's 4.6% rise amid global market expansion of 3.3%. Upgrade Cycle Ignites : 358 million second-hand iPhones sold since 2023 have sparked a replacement frenzy, boosting demand through 2029. Strategic Rival Plays : Samsung targets emerging markets with affordable A-series upgrades, while Chinese firms chase premium overseas profits. The Capitalist is a reader-supported publication Reject Corporate Left Wing Journalism You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Matthew Miller 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120172167/585461019/470246576?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251128_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTkxMjBlZC05MGNjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VSI5xaLhtWT480LGHn8MssBuulS8wHsT0AMgIS0Qa6M=)
I got my start in politics thanks to my mom. She immigrated to this country from a growing theocratic regime in Iran and instilled a deep respect for democracy in me and my brother. Our dinner table conversations were a bit different than most families. Instead of talking about sports or about what we did in school that day, we discussed politics.
But I didn’t start my career intending to run for office, Peter — after graduation, I spent time as an advisor in the Executive Office of United Nations Secretary General Ban Ki-moon, serving on the team that helped to deliver the historic Paris Climate Agreement. Fighting for sustainable solutions to address our rapidly growing climate crisis has always been at the core of my work.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120172168/585461020/470246576?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251128_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTkxMjBlZC05MGNjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VSI5xaLhtWT480LGHn8MssBuulS8wHsT0AMgIS0Qa6M=)
During the first Trump Administration, I couldn’t just stay silent as his extremist regime attacked women, working families, our environment, and immigrants, **so I decided to fight back.** I was proud to stand with thousands of Americans in protest of the confirmation of right-wing extremist Brett Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court. But I knew that to create the change I wanted to see, I needed to do more.
**So after knocking on tens of thousands of doors with my team (and my mom) in 2020, I became the youngest woman ever elected to the Phoenix City Council.**
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120172169/585461021/470246576?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251128_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTkxMjBlZC05MGNjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VSI5xaLhtWT480LGHn8MssBuulS8wHsT0AMgIS0Qa6M=)**
And we got straight to work after Election Day. When the extreme right-wing Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ with the _Dobbs_ decision, I led and passed a resolution to ensure that patients, doctors, nurses, and pharmacists weren’t being criminalized for administering or accessing care–a huge risk in Arizona at that time.
As a Councilwoman, I was proud to pass some of the most progressive, pro-union policies in Arizona’s history, including a prevailing wage ordinance that improves the quality of life for construction workers, a Worker Heat Safety ordinance that protects thousands of outdoor workers from the extreme heat Arizonans experience due to our escalating climate crisis, as well as helped to raise wages for thousands of city workers across Phoenix.
_Everyone deserves a living wage and dignity in the workplace. Whether I’m in Phoenix or in Washington, I’ll always fight for working people._
_[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120172170/585461022/470246576?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251128_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTkxMjBlZC05MGNjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VSI5xaLhtWT480LGHn8MssBuulS8wHsT0AMgIS0Qa6M=)_
Trump’s disastrous plan for the country is already negatively impacting our progress. Cuts to Medicaid will mean hospital closures and worse outcomes for all of us. Cuts to SNAP mean fewer families will be able to put food on the table. And the rolling back of our climate goals will mean harsher, more extreme weather and more deadly outcomes.
As an expert on climate policy and the impact of our climate crisis, I know that this is the defining issue of our time–that’s why I will lead and support policies that accelerate the transition from fossil fuels to renewable energy, increase our climate resilience, and to finally declare extreme heat as a natural disaster.
Each and every person deserves a pathway to success. We deserve living wages and affordable healthcare. I’ll fight every single day in Washington for the everyday people of Arizona’s 3rd District, and I’m glad you’re in this fight with us.
[**So, I’ll ask one more time: will you make a contribution today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120172171/585461023/470246576?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251128_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTkxMjBlZC05MGNjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VSI5xaLhtWT480LGHn8MssBuulS8wHsT0AMgIS0Qa6M=)

name: Team WFP
subject: Spread the word: We Ain’t Buying It
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
From Thanksgiving through Cyber Monday, we’re taking action against corporate greed and government cruelty. Join us. | | | Peter, Quick reminder — **We Ain’t Buying It** kicks off today and we need everyone in this community with us. While Washington cuts deals that leave working people holding the bag, corporations like Target, Amazon, and Home Depot are still raking in profits from policies that hurt our families, our neighbors, and our democracy. So from now until Dec 1, we’re doing the one thing these corporations can’t ignore: withholding our money. If you haven’t already:
1. **Skip the big box stores** this weekend.
2. **Shop small & local instead.**
3. **[Share why you're not buying](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoaTg2LYD0OWFdtYXTB1-HVDDkCuSTQ6HvfAgV_bXEsxha5hh71rpSxU09obOeabgy8wE9KjVOpKY5t-OcjpZJ4-spa5Bik-hIo7t8VVY0BraE63WHDAHMk9tENoGdNXStyQMuqw6Q7CBa0ZRAsg-iXUv0HcSMRi26oYVGDWQgxQYcu9gnq11p8ChlgnB2CS6UjIjNDmbtIto9qZOFUPY8togDpMwsYMrvqFnEtVkVvlFpPOePp-ETGroZS0jVAS_-6IWdx6edOv3FsSVgSAZYsQEN1GF36Cn5CQ1hu9Nz_a6/4lz/1PlxEwnYS-KQg7xCfepU-g/h0/h001.gR3ZDQsz-4FsAO8t5hmAt44zn3g6qwWuvhpvXoJi5fE) **using #WeAintBuyingIt — and tag the corporations that need to hear it. (@Target, @HomeDepot or @Amazon).
4. And if you can, **donate what you save** to local food justice or mutual aid efforts.

Our silence isn’t for sale. clean_body: From Thanksgiving through Cyber Monday, we’re taking action against corporate greed and government cruelty. Join us. | | | Peter, Quick reminder — We Ain’t Buying It kicks off today and we need everyone in this community with us. While Washington cuts deals that leave working people holding the bag, corporations like Target, Amazon, and Home Depot are still raking in profits from policies that hurt our families, our neighbors, and our democracy. So from now until Dec 1, we’re doing the one thing these corporations can’t ignore: withholding our money. If you haven’t already: 1. Skip the big box stores this weekend. 2. Shop small & local instead. 3. using #WeAintBuyingIt — and tag the corporations that need to hear it. (@Target, @HomeDepot or @Amazon). 4. And if you can, donate what you save to local food justice or mutual aid efforts. Our silence isn’t for sale. Our solidarity isn’t either. Onwards, Team WFP Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. **null, RFK Jr. is not just a MAGA conspiracy theorist – he’s the highest-ranking public health official in the country.** And the chaos he's causing at the Department of Health and Human Services is growing increasingly dangerous. Here's the latest:
👉 He _fired the CDC director_ and replaced key health leaders with anti-vaccine extremists.

💉 He _canceled vaccine campaigns_ and downplayed deadly measles outbreaks as cases surged across the country.
🧬 He _shut down critical mRNA vaccine research_ , halting work on cancer, HIV, and public health innovation.

💊 At a cabinet meeting, _he_ _linked circumcision and autism_ – citing discredited studies and spreading dangerous misinformation.
😷 _He’s blamed childhood vaccines and prenatal Tylenol for autism_ – even as real experts call his claims junk science.

📉 And last month, _his agency laid off hundreds of CDC staffers,_ crippling our response to the respiratory illness season.
It’s no wonder Republicans and Democrats are raising the alarm and calling for accountability.

But we want to know what YOU think, null. **[That’s why we're asking 100 people from 18326 to weigh in before midnight:](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/9253?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=7&akid=1472%2E49239%2Ekjeq_q)**

**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. name: Team Heidi Hall
subject: Billionaire Black Friday Deal?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251128_em_fr_b1_THH_big [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251128_em_fr_b1_THH_big]
Friend, it's Heidi Hall's team.
We hope you had a wonderful Thanksgiving and are enjoying shopping locally in our community.
We aren't participating in Black Friday, but we know that corporate PACs and billionaires are. And one of their favorite deals? Our Congressional district.
After Prop 50 passed, this race turned into a push for the toxic DC establishment and their benefactors to dump money on the candidate they think will protect them and their investments best.
Heidi hasn't gotten a cent from them...
And she never will because she didn't join this race to continue "business as usual" politics. She joined this race because she saw the inaction from Washington and how Kevin Kiley was only making it worse.
Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, getting big money out of politics, and a tax on billionaires will never get passed if we don't elect new leaders to Congress.
We don't have the same interests as them, Friend, and quite frankly, they don't care. Let's show them that we care by supporting Heidi and raising the $8,109 we need to crush our November online Fundraising Goal today! Chip in what you can. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251128_em_fr_b1_THH_big]
If you have saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process instantly.DONATE $15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=20251128_em_fr_b1_THH_big_]

In solidarity,
Team Heidi Hall
Heidi Hall has spent her three-decade public service career working with others to solve problems, protect our land and water, improve health, and build opportunities for others, all while raising two boys primarily as a single mom.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251128_em_fr_b1_THH_big [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251128_em_fr_b1_THH_big]
Raised by parents who had persisted to make a middle-class life for their kids in Contra Costa County while lifting up others, Heidi was taught to push through and overcome challenges rather than complain about them. She learned to stick up for the vulnerable, to respect working people, and to value equal opportunity and justice.
After graduating from Pomona College and earning graduate degrees from Columbia and Rutgers, Heidi went to work for the Rockefeller Foundation promoting reproductive care and then began her career at the Environmental Protection Agency, stopping the dumping of toxic waste and holding corporate polluters accountable.
Today, Heidi chairs the Nevada County Board of Supervisors, where she’s taken on homelessness, expanded broadband access, and worked to reduce crime and illegal cannabis growth. Heidi flipped her seat from red to blue – and now she’s ready to do it again in Congress to take on toxic politics in Washington and put people first.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945

PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS

Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945
United States

The Trump Administration’s Department of Justice jhasust filed a lawsuit against me.

[ **FIGHT BACK** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120172739/585463160/-569431239?refcode=251128em&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTcwYjhkYy05NGNjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RQRV6uF6-JsLcWiBqiKX0Z53tBNHNU9DpMDmdyvoY3I=)
---
Their demand? Access to Oregon’s voter registration list — including sensitive personal data like partial Social Security numbers and date of birth.

This is unprecedented. It’s targeted. And it’s dangerous.

Let me be clear: I will not hand over Oregonians’ private data. I will stand up to the Trump administration’s DOJ, defend our elections, and protect your rights.

I have gotten the attention of the Trump Administration for standing up to them. President Trump’s allies are trying to weaponize the federal government against me — and against every voter who values free and fair elections, and privacy.

Grassroots support is our firewall. That means us. That means you.

**We aim to raise $25,000 before midnight on November 30th to demonstrate our response in the face of this abuse of power.**

**[Can you rush a donation right now to defend Oregon, protect our elections, and have my back?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120172745/585463166/-569431239?refcode=251128em&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTcwYjhkYy05NGNjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RQRV6uF6-JsLcWiBqiKX0Z53tBNHNU9DpMDmdyvoY3I=)**
---
[ **DONATE NOW** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120172749/585463172/-569431239?refcode=251128em&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTcwYjhkYy05NGNjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RQRV6uF6-JsLcWiBqiKX0Z53tBNHNU9DpMDmdyvoY3I=)
---
This is not normal. This is not safe. And we cannot let Trump and his cronies get away with it. Tobias Read

name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: I’m speaking out. But I need your support.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki for Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120172712/585463075/-2063340125?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmIzYmZkNi05NGNjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P1UaHFurtJV9NaqjGoDZs7WW6CLaZ-a5uxAAgTsRXV0=)
Friend,

As we approach the end-of-month fundraising deadline, I imagine you’re receiving a lot of messages from candidates like me. So today, I want to explain exactly what sets my race apart.
* **I flipped IL-13 from red to blue back in 2022, becoming the first woman ever to represent this district in Congress.** Since then, I’ve fought for Central and Southern Illinois in Washington – and brought back real results for farmers, veterans, local businesses, and working families.

* **National Republicans didn’t like losing this seat.** It’s why I’m facing multiple GOP challengers in this race, why I’ve been attacked by the NRCC, and why we expect an influx in billionaire donors and special interest groups to weigh in.

* **I’m not taking House Republicans’ betrayal of the American people lying down.** Their cruel agenda prioritizes billionaire donors and special interests ahead of middle class families, and I’m standing up to it every day.

**[My focus will always be doing right by Central and Southern Illinois, but if I’m going to keep this seat blue for IL-13 and the House majority, I need your support: Will you chip in $3 ahead of my end-of-month deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120172724/585463097/-2063340125?refcode=em-11.28.25-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmIzYmZkNi05NGNjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P1UaHFurtJV9NaqjGoDZs7WW6CLaZ-a5uxAAgTsRXV0=)**

clean_body: | = Friend, As we approach the end-of-month fundraising deadline, I imagine you’re receiving a lot of messages from candidates like me. So today, I want to explain exactly what sets my race apart. I flipped IL-13 from red to blue back in 2022, becoming the first woman ever to represent this district in Congress. Since then, I’ve fought for Central and Southern Illinois in Washington – and brought back real results for farmers, veterans, local businesses, and working families. National Republicans didn’t like losing this seat. It’s why I’m facing multiple GOP challengers in this race, why I’ve been attacked by the NRCC, and why we expect an influx in billionaire donors and special interest groups to weigh in. I’m not taking House Republicans’ betrayal of the American people lying down. Their cruel agenda prioritizes billionaire donors and special interests ahead of middle class families, and I’m standing up to it every day. =** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Nikki | = = = Nikki is a champion for working families – from leading the fight to pass a $15 minimum wage in Illinois, to bringing manufacturing back to America. Now, she’s delivering in Congress for the people of Illinois' 13th Congressional District. = To learn more about Nikki and her commitment to working families, please visit: = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . subject: This Democrat needs your help ⌛
body:
| | | | | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015KBNJG9qlJuXBaJs8dxTgjB_hiWEHbFihbyUdSFuM7CiYL_eeXjEvJ8AUMwIIBjoyp_9TRv1LdRkjyPeFOXz4zNt-jnntLxXVJwVfK8cMsJRzKApvQaq9j3XwBAwuOq_J3OO0AnLBUaJ2TOaHxjiPcoZZTUNnNw2i9gO_bW0nanHYlfeC47v7I94d2y0oyrzeiqebbozshSV6ZTdhNfsXSvNoXJ1SkY0&c=b5dbZQ5qe0DRiH9IYriF-koboIUwGkKTHGU-P4_VqDW_08J-eJi_wQ==&ch=T7j3ZhSUWZXJYDCB-MJBKHDD5Uj5danPpdJ5Cbpf7T3W1-6VS2zbyg==)

|
Peter,
A defining moment is unfolding in Illinois' 9th District -- and I need your help. I'm running to succeed Rep. Jan Schakowsky in one of the bluest and most diverse districts in the country.
I'm 27, an elected official, an activist, and a community organizer. I was the first woman of my generation elected to public office. With over 7 years of service, I'm ready to bring a rare combination of youth and experience to Congress.

---
| | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015KBNJG9qlJuXBaJs8dxTgjB_hiWEHbFihbyUdSFuM7CiYL_eeXjEvJ8AUMwIIBjoyp_9TRv1LdRkjyPeFOXz4zNt-jnntLxXVJwVfK8cMsJRzKApvQaq9j3XwBAwuOq_J3OO0AnLBUaJ2TOaHxjiPcoZZTUNnNw2i9gO_bW0nanHYlfeC47v7I94d2y0oyrzeiqebbozshQFzh2oYfw1foARDPsx_y9P&c=b5dbZQ5qe0DRiH9IYriF-koboIUwGkKTHGU-P4_VqDW_08J-eJi_wQ==&ch=T7j3ZhSUWZXJYDCB-MJBKHDD5Uj5danPpdJ5Cbpf7T3W1-6VS2zbyg==)
---
|
But powerful forces are trying to stop me.
MAGA billionaires and AIPAC have poured hundreds of thousands of dollars into this race to handpick their preferred candidate and buy a seat in a district they don't live in. I'm now one of the top-funded candidates and a frontrunner -- but I cannot match that kind of money without people like you standing with me.
If you believe IL-09 deserves someone homegrown, someone who knows this community, someone who will fight for everyone who calls it home -- I'm asking you to step up.
[Will you rush a donation of $50, $25, or whatever is meaningful to you to help me defeat the MAGA billionaires and AIPAC donors trying to buy this seat?](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0015KBNJG9qlJuXBaJs8dxTgjB_hiWEHbFihbyUdSFuM7CiYL_eeXjEvJ8AUMwIIBjoasAHZEpDa_BoaXPdxx7pkLJV__4FbK4BLsrgfQJhqaqs3BOVgD0ymQf_Bx6Kj6n9F_7U1XiYlBGy57vUJcklRFRg65GLYG9wCKKQlocZ_9kNtmabPse3jqEDq_Lx0z7jYpislcTGl8Cbf5EQNLlNyDIfctoGce2mK8QxXgW5R44=&c=b5dbZQ5qe0DRiH9IYriF-koboIUwGkKTHGU-P4_VqDW_08J-eJi_wQ==&ch=T7j3ZhSUWZXJYDCB-MJBKHDD5Uj5danPpdJ5Cbpf7T3W1-6VS2zbyg==)

clean_body: | | | | | == | Peter, A defining moment is unfolding in Illinois' 9th District -- and I need your help. I'm running to succeed Rep. Jan Schakowsky in one of the bluest and most diverse districts in the country. I'm 27, an elected official, an activist, and a community organizer. I was the first woman of my generation elected to public office. With over 7 years of service, I'm ready to bring a rare combination of youth and experience to Congress. | | == | But powerful forces are trying to stop me. MAGA billionaires and AIPAC have poured hundreds of thousands of dollars into this race to handpick their preferred candidate and buy a seat in a district they don't live in. I'm now one of the top-funded candidates and a frontrunner -- but I cannot match that kind of money without people like you standing with me. If you believe IL-09 deserves someone homegrown, someone who knows this community, someone who will fight for everyone who calls it home -- I'm asking you to step up. == | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | == | Thank you for being part of this movement, | | == | Bushra Amiwala Democrat for IL-09 | | == | | | | == | Mail checks to: Bushra for Congress PO Box 911 Skokie, IL 60076 | | == | | | | Bushra for Congress | PO Box 911 | Skokie, IL 60076 US | |

subject: Charlie’s Final Message: STOP, in the Name of God
body:
Offer Inside
| | | | Can't see this email? [View in Your Browser](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01KB60TG78ZEE8JTK2GY34W2AQ_0)

---
| Hi Friend, A month before Charlie Kirk’s assassination, Charlie finished what would become his final book: [STOP, in the Name of God: Why Honoring the Sabbath Will Transform Your Life](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01KB60TG78ZEE8JTK2GY34W2AQ_3).
Charlie was fiercely proud of this book and its message. And now, his wife Erika is determined to bring it into the world as a tribute to his legacy – and as a gift to everyone who is tired, overwhelmed, and desperate for true rest.[
](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01KB60TG78ZEE8JTK2GY34W2AQ_4) **Limited Time: BOGO Offer** Purchase [Stop, in the Name of God](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01KB60TG78ZEE8JTK2GY34W2AQ_5) and received a FREE copy of [Right Wing Revolution](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01KB60TG78ZEE8JTK2GY34W2AQ_6) In [STOP, in the Name of God](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01KB60TG78ZEE8JTK2GY34W2AQ_7), Charlie shows that **observing the Sabbath isn’t a rejection of modern life, but a rebellion against busyness** – and a path to real connection, peace, and presence. In these pages, bestselling author Charlie Kirk shows you on how to:
* Unplug from the grind, the outrage cycle, and the constant pressure to “do more”.

* Recharge emotionally, mentally, and spiritually in a way that actually sticks.

* Reconnect with God, your family, and your own soul – without guilt or performance.

* Rediscover the Sabbath as a radical act of resistance in a world dominated by screens and noise.

name: Ro Khanna
subject: AIPAC is targeting me with paid ads.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]
Peter,
AIPAC just launched a campaign to buy my seat.
They’re asking people to ignore months of humanitarian catastrophe in Gaza and pretend that calling for restraint, diplomacy, and human dignity is somehow a liability.
Let me be clear: Any politician who caves to special interests on Gaza will never stand up to special interests on corruption, healthcare, housing, or the economy. If we can’t speak with moral clarity when thousands of children are dying, we won’t stand for working Americans when corporate power comes knocking.
AIPAC spent over $93 million [https://www.opensecrets.org/orgs/american-israel-public-affairs-cmte/summary?id=D000046963] in 2024. Now they're trying to buy another seat. Can you rush $3 to show we won't let them? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aipac-attack-fundraiser?refcode=20251128&amount=3]
Establishment politicians and powerful special-interest groups can try to intimidate me, but I’m not backing down. I will continue to advocate for the recognition of Palestinian statehood.
That is what real leadership requires: empathy, honesty, and the courage to say what’s right even when the pressure is enormous.
But I can only keep going if you have my back.
I don’t take PAC money.
I don’t take lobbyist money.
I don’t take corporate money.
People like you fuel this campaign. You are the only reason I have the power to stand up to big-money special interests.
Will you rush a donation of $3 or more to show AIPAC and every establishment power-broker that this grassroots movement isn’t going anywhere? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aipac-attack-fundraiser?refcode=20251128&amount=3]
DONATE $3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aipac-attack-fundraiser?refcode=20251128&amount=3]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aipac-attack-fundraiser?refcode=20251128&amount=25]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aipac-attack-fundraiser?refcode=20251128&amount=100]
DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aipac-attack-fundraiser?refcode=20251128]
Thank you for your support, your activism, and all that you do.
Onward,
Ro

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: President Trump is using the FBI to target me
body:
Peter,
This week, the FBI's Counterterrorism Division appeared to open an inquiry into me in response to a video the President did not like.
In that video, I directly quoted the Uniform Code of Military Justice alongside five other Members of Congress with service and veteran backgrounds. Officers and enlisted in our military are trained to follow lawful orders, and refuse to follow illegal orders. It’s part of the training. This has been the case since World War II.
Since then, the President has misquoted me, and then called for my arrest, trial, and death by hanging. Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth has threatened my friend, Senator Mark Kelly, with court martial. And now, it appears the president has directed the FBI to target the rest of us.
**This is exactly why we made that video in the first place.**
President Trump believes in weaponizing the federal government against his perceived enemies and does not believe laws apply to him or his Cabinet. He uses legal harassment as an intimidation tactic, to scare people out of speaking up. He’s done it to law firms, universities, private sector companies and private individuals.
But these kinds of tactics won’t work on me. And neither will the total wave of death threats, bomb threats, and general harassment he has unleashed.
I have always worked to be upfront and honest in these emails. This latest news from the FBI means that I have had to start thinking through a legal defense strategy – and we do not know exactly where President Trump and his Department of Justice will take this inquiry. And for the time being, all of that planning is being paid for through campaign dollars.
**[So, your split contribution to Wes Moore and me will be put to work immediately to ensure I have the resources to fight back.](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251128-1.Aq6R6L&refcode=em-20251128-1&t=1&akid=981%2E1086043%2EVAL4We)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251128-1.Aq6R6L&amount=5&refcode=em-20251128-1&t=20&akid=981%2E1086043%2EVAL4We)**
To be frank, the whole thing isn’t about one line from one video. The events of the last week do not represent the country we know and love.
I refuse to believe that this is the new normal — where the President of the United States uses fear and intimidation against people with whom he disagrees.
But Wes Moore and I can’t do this alone.
Thank you for reading — and thank you in advance for your help.
Elissa Slotkin

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20251128-1&t=21&refcode2=981_1086043_VAL4We&akid=981%2E1086043%2EVAL4We)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=22&akid=981%2E1086043%2EVAL4We)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=23&akid=981%2E1086043%2EVAL4We)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

**TRUMP:** I’m in between meetings right now, and I wanted to take a minute to say THANK YOU FOR EVERYTHING!
**TRUMP:** I really mean that. It’s because of you and you alone that our administration is securing WIN AFTER WIN for The People.
**TRUMP:** But the fight to save this country is only just beginning, and with radical activist judges threatening us with injunctions, _I need your support now more than ever._

name: Voter Action Project
subject: "Gutting of the Justice Department unit that enforces voting laws"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
The Guardian: Trump’s justice department appointees remove leadership of voting unit [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=112825_2&amount=25]
This speaks for itself, folks. Straight from The Guardian :
" Donald Trump’s appointees at the Department of Justice have removed all of the senior civil servants working as managers in the department’s voting section and directed attorneys to dismiss all active cases, according to people familiar with the matter, part of a broader attack on the department’s civil rights division. "
This action represents a dramatic escalation in Trump's war on voting , coming after he ordered a permanent litigation freeze on voting cases back in January and then issued his suppressive, anti-voting executive order last month.
It's worth noting that the staff removed are nonpartisan civil servants -- lawyers who are career DOJ employees and serve regardless of who is president. Any partisan presidential appointees from the Biden administration ended their jobs when Trump was inaugurated and have been gone for months.
Are we surprised? No. But this action -- though expected, based on how this division was sidelined in Trump's first four years -- highlights how badly we need to fight for our fundamental rights as citizens , from the outside of government.
Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can again today to help us defend the right to vote across the country, from state legislatures to courtrooms to the ballot box? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=112825_2&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=112825_2&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=112825_2&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=112825_2&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=112825_2&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=112825_2&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=112825_2&amount=35]
The civil rights division, which was created in 1957 and is often referred to as the “crown jewel” of the justice department, has always been a cornerstone in the fight to protect our right to vote.
But when Trump campaign lawyer and election denier Harmeet Dhillon -- who has argued in court in favor of voter suppression laws -- was confirmed to lead the department last month, she sent out new “mission statements” that made it clear the civil rights division was shifting its focus from protecting the civil rights of marginalized people to supporting Trump’s priorities.
You don't have to read into that to get the message: Our fundamental rights, including voting and so much more, aren't going to be protected by this administration. In fact, they're going to be repeatedly attacked from within our government until they ensconce their control forever.
Please, folks, fuel our efforts to protect our right to vote and so much more again with $25 or more right now >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=112825_2&amount=25]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=112825_2&amount=20]

clean_body: Voter Action Project [] The Guardian: Trump’s justice department appointees remove leadership of voting unit [] This speaks for itself, folks. Straight from The Guardian : " Donald Trump’s appointees at the Department of Justice have removed all of the senior civil servants working as managers in the department’s voting section and directed attorneys to dismiss all active cases, according to people familiar with the matter, part of a broader attack on the department’s civil rights division. " This action represents a dramatic escalation in Trump's war on voting , coming after he ordered a permanent litigation freeze on voting cases back in January and then issued his suppressive, anti-voting executive order last month. It's worth noting that the staff removed are nonpartisan civil servants -- lawyers who are career DOJ employees and serve regardless of who is president. Any partisan presidential appointees from the Biden administration ended their jobs when Trump was inaugurated and have been gone for months. Are we surprised? No. But this action -- though expected, based on how this division was sidelined in Trump's first four years -- highlights how badly we need to fight for our fundamental rights as citizens , from the outside of government. Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can again today to help us defend the right to vote across the country, from state legislatures to courtrooms to the ballot box? >> [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [] OTHER AMOUNT [] The civil rights division, which was created in 1957 and is often referred to as the “crown jewel” of the justice department, has always been a cornerstone in the fight to protect our right to vote. But when Trump campaign lawyer and election denier Harmeet Dhillon -- who has argued in court in favor of voter suppression laws -- was confirmed to lead the department last month, she sent out new “mission statements” that made it clear the civil rights division was shifting its focus from protecting the civil rights of marginalized people to supporting Trump’s priorities. You don't have to read into that to get the message: Our fundamental rights, including voting and so much more, aren't going to be protected by this administration. In fact, they're going to be repeatedly attacked from within our government until they ensconce their control forever. Please, folks, fuel our efforts to protect our right to vote and so much more again with $25 or more right now >> [] [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [] Donate Now [] Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Peter,
In the months following the Charlie Kirk assassination we have seen an unprecedented power grab and wave of massive escalation from the right.
They are now using Kirk's martyrdom as a way to claim that God is granting them permission to implement theocratic fascist rule by any means necessary and with an iron fist.
And of course, Lauren Boebert is leading the charge and amplifying this rhetoric:

| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001X5PLRZjv7cAWIAFMbjvDgWq6gqsNkp1QspdHizOuWhimQdR8rWB9CkerzwXsQ2fdk2PmdC5my-js-VzV7WypQi8ePKa3O_AK2MwPaZvzYBHqHUU9sy-4XSLebGGM2yo0LizFOKdONLylIzw2BwTFOnqPLV9nAf9enTh4hpTSjveZ_jCwV-PQChwzwbak8eU8VbeND2pKvq0yDL5scLyqMx4odc5Wp4yb&c=XVnPLUJMRi1egF63p9pvcD-59RT5xHpnpPt_fKYg61PEwXeoQAxwfQ==&ch=XsVPfg_Ie0AJ-sGNmv8mLMDgY6h12YQYSzNtisr9PyiLE_IUjIybPQ==)

Boebert's retweet endorsing far-right pundit Matt Walsh's assertion that the Kirk killing has given the right divine permission to rule as they see fit.

Trump has three years left and if this is how bad things are getting we can only imagine what our nation will look like in 2028.
We need to ensure that Boebert does not get another term in Congress where she can continue to push far-right religious extremism. She wants a holy war in this country and we need to take away her platform to call for one before it is too late.
[Trisha Calvarese is the Democrat running to unseat Lauren Boebert and 2026 could be our last chance to beat her before she is able to start the holy war that she is begging for. body:
She wants a holy war in this country and we need to take away her platform to call for one before it is too late.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NotvWt3xHLoTGvAoVGu18NW6kSZIZsL3i6_ZFl3Dm2d2_otW3XV3kXoOlL7fIVplVGM-HYRNSKv4SgOl4cM2GKj5iGOabGyWuLAuNUxAOsREgOYSNnfCXddiQytL7G0R6jDLw4mw5P7HY1LWVRdbQncAx6Hz4mK6YtAEhZQ6LTvqgmclMf9GYQCaLHAAFlVJL83nxlgMzoIotdZ0GsxA22LtBoHlYVxA_AaKwUJUqeA=&c=UPHq5qoeQE1HONkXRXo8qvklOuUfwnA2w47OFmpqQ_03k5QPHtX96A==&ch=BILcJdE6EmHKhVQquD2K2YzfHXeol6i-OR8lX-VN2Y1pI5G5d32Z4w==)

Peter,
In the months following the Charlie Kirk assassination we have seen an unprecedented power grab and wave of massive escalation from the right.
They are now using Kirk's martyrdom as a way to claim that God is granting them permission to implement theocratic fascist rule by any means necessary and with an iron fist.
And of course, Lauren Boebert is leading the charge and amplifying this rhetoric:

---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NotvWt3xHLoTGvAoVGu18NW6kSZIZsL3i6_ZFl3Dm2d2_otW3XV3kXoOlL7fIVplVGM-HYRNSKv4SgOl4cM2GKj5iGOabGyWuLAuNUxAOsREgOYSNnfCXddiQytL7G0R6jDLw4mw5P7HY1LWVRdbQncAx6Hz4mK6YtAEhZQ6LTvqgmclMf9GYQCaLHAAFlVJL83nxlgMzoIotdZ0GsxA26de4G08uH5k-boLX-GO00U=&c=UPHq5qoeQE1HONkXRXo8qvklOuUfwnA2w47OFmpqQ_03k5QPHtX96A==&ch=BILcJdE6EmHKhVQquD2K2YzfHXeol6i-OR8lX-VN2Y1pI5G5d32Z4w==)
---
Boebert's retweet endorsing far-right pundit Matt Walsh's assertion that the Kirk killing has given the right divine permission to rule as they see fit.
---
Lauren Boebert is a Christian fundamentalist who in the past has said that "God is sending a holy army to save Colorado from the left" -- now her views are becoming mainstream.
Trump has three years left and if this is how bad things are getting we can only imagine what our nation will look like in 2028.
We need to ensure that Boebert does not get another term in Congress where she can continue to push far-right religious extremism. She wants a holy war in this country and we need to take away her platform to call for one before it is too late.
[Trisha Calvarese is the Democrat running to unseat Lauren Boebert and 2026 could be our last chance to beat her before she is able to start the holy war that she is begging for. clean_body: She wants a holy war in this country and we need to take away her platform to call for one before it is too late. | | | | | == | Peter, In the months following the Charlie Kirk assassination we have seen an unprecedented power grab and wave of massive escalation from the right. They are now using Kirk's martyrdom as a way to claim that God is granting them permission to implement theocratic fascist rule by any means necessary and with an iron fist. And of course, Lauren Boebert is leading the charge and amplifying this rhetoric: | == Boebert's retweet endorsing far-right pundit Matt Walsh's assertion that the Kirk killing has given the right divine permission to rule as they see fit. Lauren Boebert is a Christian fundamentalist who in the past has said that "God is sending a holy army to save Colorado from the left" -- now her views are becoming mainstream. Trump has three years left and if this is how bad things are getting we can only imagine what our nation will look like in 2028. We need to ensure that Boebert does not get another term in Congress where she can continue to push far-right religious extremism. She wants a holy war in this country and we need to take away her platform to call for one before it is too late. == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | == The time to beat Boebert is now. Team Trisha | | | | == | Mail checks to: Trisha 4 CO 9609 S University Blvd., PO Box 631322 Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 | Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado Trisha Calvarese for Congress | 9609 S University Blvd. PO Box 631322 | Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 US | |

name: Team Walz
subject: They’re on the attack, again.
disclaimer_text: paid for by Walz for Governor
body:
One of Tim’s GOP opponents just relaunched their smear campaign.
#
Peter,
Earlier this month, we reached out about one of Tim’s Republican opponents launching billboards attacking the Governor.
Initially, they were stopped because the billboard company refused to advertise lies and misinformation about Tim.
**Relentless, the far-right Republican found another company to work with and is now bragging to their supporters about relaunching their smear campaign.**
They’re once again on the attack, literally lining the streets with lies about Tim’s record. It’s the same old nasty, dishonest playbook, and it’s being funded by ultra-wealthy megadonors.
_That’s not who we are in Minnesota._ We don’t tear each other down. We roll up our sleeves, we look out for our neighbors, and we build things up together.
**[We need to fight back. With our November fundraising deadline coming up in just two days, will you rush $5 to help us drown out the GOP’s lies with the truth?](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251128_2.Ax2nj1&amount=5&refcode=em20251128-184&t=1&akid=184%2E34582%2EQpM724)**

Thanks for anything you can pitch in to support Tim at this crucial moment.
— Team Walz

The work we do to protect democracy just got so much more important.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120175009/585470977/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlkNWU2NTNjLTlkY2MtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-nLnCBfs29eMYrM1Bg1b3YM2aqkWZz7w8qAZKGXM2iA=&emci=cc253ee6-d3ca-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=9d5e653c-9dcc-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=8431045)

Peter, I want to talk to you about what’s happening in Indiana. When the Trump administration began its pressure campaign to redraw the state’s congressional map, it was met with broad opposition from voters. But like clockwork, Indiana Republicans caved to Donald Trump and special interests — moving forward with plans to consider mid-decade gerrymandering. The fair maps movement got to work immediately — educating voters about what was at stake, mobilizing volunteers to speak out, and training communities on how to contact their representatives. Eventually, Republicans hit a roadblock. Amid growing resistance from their constituents, they also didn’t have the votes to get Trump’s mid-decade push across the finish line. **I wish I could say that’s where their attacks ended, Peter. On Tuesday, Governor Braun celebrated the announcement of the Indiana House and Senate reconvening in early December to “discuss redistricting.”** **The work we’re doing together to protect democracy just got so much more important.[Make a donation today to help keep up our critical efforts to prevent a power grab in Indiana and beyond.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120175011/585470979/-1263916904?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_MoneyPouringIn_email_20251128-NDRC-Tier1-MoneyPouringIn_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251128-NDRC-Tier1-MoneyPouringIn_&utm_campaign=MoneyPouringIn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlkNWU2NTNjLTlkY2MtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-nLnCBfs29eMYrM1Bg1b3YM2aqkWZz7w8qAZKGXM2iA=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: The work we do to protect democracy just got so much more important. | Peter, I want to talk to you about what’s happening in Indiana. When the Trump administration began its pressure campaign to redraw the state’s congressional map, it was met with broad opposition from voters. But like clockwork, Indiana Republicans caved to Donald Trump and special interests — moving forward with plans to consider mid-decade gerrymandering. The fair maps movement got to work immediately — educating voters about what was at stake, mobilizing volunteers to speak out, and training communities on how to contact their representatives. Eventually, Republicans hit a roadblock. Amid growing resistance from their constituents, they also didn’t have the votes to get Trump’s mid-decade push across the finish line. I wish I could say that’s where their attacks ended, Peter. On Tuesday, Governor Braun celebrated the announcement of the Indiana House and Senate reconvening in early December to “discuss redistricting.” The work we’re doing together to protect democracy just got so much more important.= | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = This cash infusion of six figures in Indiana means we have to be able to push back in force. The NDRC will continue reminding Indiana lawmakers that voters overwhelmingly oppose map manipulation. That redrawing district lines would be the complete opposite of what their constituents are demanding. And that zero Hoosiers spoke in favor of a mid-decade redraw at a Republican-hosted listening session. But Republicans have made it clear that Indiana is one of several states where they plan to expand this national redistricting crisis. So we’ll have our work cut out for us in fighting back. I’m counting on your support to help us meet this moment with the urgency it requires.= Thank you, Claire Low, NDRC = = | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC. Text MAPS to 36787, STOP to end. Msg and Data rates may apply

name: Chris Deluzio
subject: Donald Trump called for my death and arrest
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
I will not be intimidated by Donald Trump and his calls for violence against me.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98344?refcode=em20251128-9771&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9771%2E614464%2Emhx-un)
Peter, Donald Trump just called for my death and arrest.
He not only called for my arrest—he went even further, calling for violence against me and several of my colleagues who also served the country before our time in Congress.
Why? Because we spoke a simple truth: no service member is forced to follow an illegal order. The oath to the Constitution is sacred, one that I first swore as a 17-year old at the Naval Academy, and binds us all to the rule of a law.
I will not be intimidated by Donald Trump and his calls for violence against me.
**[If you’re willing to support a Navy veteran who believes in the rule of law, in the Constitution, in the promise of democracy—then I’m asking you, right now, to step up and help me fight back by splitting a contribution between Heartland Patriots and me →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98344?refcode=em20251128-9771&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9771%2E614464%2Emhx-un)**
**[Donate →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98344?refcode=em20251128-9771&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9771%2E614464%2Emhx-un)**
I took the oath in the Navy—and I took it again when I was elected to Congress.
That oath doesn’t expire—and I’ll be damned if Donald Trump, a man who tried to overthrow our government on January 6, 2021, tells me how to serve this country.
So Trump can threaten me, call for my arrest, and even try to incite violence against me, but he can’t scare me into abandoning my oath.
**[Peter, I believe in our country and our Constitution. If you do too, chip in anything you can today to help Heartland Patriots and me defend democracy, protect our freedoms, and stand up to this insurrection president →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98344?refcode=em20251128-9771&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=9771%2E614464%2Emhx-un)**

name: Eileen Laubacher
subject: what if I told you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action
body:
Is there anything I can say to convince you to make a donation to my campaign against Lauren Boebert?
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T63d82877-ecda-422e-a961-353fa496d9af/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T40abc5fb-eaf6-4785-8f13-29fca0d9e6f8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, Is there anything I can say to convince you to make a donation to my campaign against Lauren Boebert before midnight tonight? What if I told you that I’m the Democrat and retired U.S. Navy Rear Admiral running to defeat Lauren Boebert? What if I told you that Adam Frisch only lost to Lauren Boebert by 546 votes in the closest race in the country? What if I told you that Lauren Boebert is as unpopular as ever among voters? What if I told you that winning this seat would guarantee that we take back the House for Democrats in 2026? And what if I told you that we can finally send Lauren Boebert packing – but only if grassroots donors like you chip in now to my campaign? We need to raise another $7,500 before midnight tonight if we’re going to defeat Lauren Boebert and flip this seat blue, but right now, we’re still very short. The only way I’ll be able to fight back against the GOP Super PACs and win is if you give right now: [Please, will you split a donation right now between my campaign and Blue Amp Action – every dollar you can afford before midnight – to help me defeat Lauren Boebert, flip this seat blue, and take back the House for Democrats?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8b8c695e-ea58-4e61-89b6-b4e2139e894f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I’ll never be able to thank you enough for being on this team and joining me on this journey. My deepest gratitude, Eileen Rear Admiral Eileen Laubacher (Retired)
United States Navy

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade, it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in a democracy, not a dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy.
