name: Tammy Baldwin
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=5133%2E35263%2EHA8ONB)
I want to take a moment to share a story about my very first campaign, folks. ****[But if you’re short on time, please consider making a contribution today. Your support powers my work supporting Democrats running for Senate so we can retake a majority next year.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=stb-em-nov25.xl9hz-&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20251128_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=5133%2E35263%2EHA8ONB)**** Back in 1997, when I first ran for Congress in Wisconsin, no one thought I could win. And after an extremely popular challenger entered the race, I was written off. I recall huddling with one of my staffers at the time. She said, “Well, Tammy, maybe you want to rethink what you’re doing because it’s going to be tough.” **I looked her right in the eye and asked,_“Do you think I should wait for my turn?”_** And then I said: I believe that women have to run and not wait our turn — especially when it’s hard. We can’t wait until we get a tap on our shoulder, or we’d never get anywhere. Defying the odds, I ended up winning that race. Wisconsinites elected me and sent the very first woman to the Wisconsin House of Representatives. We've defied the odds several times since then, making progress for our state and our country. Now, I need this team's help as we fight back against this extreme and corrupt administration. ****[Can I count on your support?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=stb-em-nov25.xl9hz-&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20251128_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=5133%2E35263%2EHA8ONB)**** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3664?c0=stb-em-nov25.j5UyuQ&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20251128_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=5133%2E35263%2EHA8ONB)

I didn’t plan on emailing so close to the holiday, but my team just let me know we're not where we need to be to reach our $20,000 end-of-month goal ahead of Sunday's deadline.

Every grassroots donation to our campaign adds up in a BIG way. We’re running a bigger campaign than we ever have before so that we can reach people in every town and city across IA-01.

We can win this — but only if we build early and build big.
Let's get to work.
Robert Garcia

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
**$5.**
That’s what we’re hoping you can contribute to Jon Ossoff’s reelection campaign today.
**$5** because Jon is MAGA’s #1 target in the midterms, and they are going to pull out every lie and dirty trick in the book to stop him.
**$5** because if we lose this seat to MAGA, there is virtually no chance of Democrats taking back the Senate and using congressional power to hold Trump accountable.
**$5** because we _all_ have a part to play in fighting back against the rising tide of authoritarianism in our country.
Peter, we know that $5 may not feel like the kind of money that can win an election — especially when the GOP and their Super PACs are already spending millions.
But these early $5 donations are the most important of the campaign, and they add up FAST when we’re all chipping in.
So we are asking one more time:
**[Please, contribute $5, or whatever amount feels right directly to Jon Ossoff’s campaign for Senate. We wouldn't ask if it didn't make a real difference.](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-nov25.fw0_9v&refcode=em251128-2-v2&t=29&akid=1152%2E5691347%2Ett_xnI)**

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

Something deeply troubling is unfolding in the Rust Belt’s forgotten towns—and now it’s all on camera.

Locals quietly share stories of events so strange, many once chose to look away—until this footage forced the truth into the open.

This chilling video documents what others refused to acknowledge.

I spoke with a witness whose experience is truly unforgettable.

If you think you know what’s happening in these places, prepare to see them in a whole new light.

[Click to watch the footage—see it before it disappears.](https://links.main.yourcapitalminds.com/u/click?_t=affa6bfca09a497f86454ba803e6a9a2&_m=9307a11c6a0b4f15aa66ed7a8ebfbe31&_e=s6CO4xZpr2sPRb3CeqyfMH3xIcBc9KE3XdXgHGVRNollX4_01FFGmynLGz6ONogPdesxhDKAPYyjdkCX4YGfHfvvjXMKj3puW9NTmm_urPGHcRioCcRFcN6tUqlw0uZl9R75ct-eNINj8ONCefDmS3vRpbNbJyW6gj7SHTGZQbAUZCRaCBxpXJ4LjmIY35uzKReYFIi_Qmi1gKL0T6cpN26oZmpn10enNRHkL-HcSXQrP-JJBjxpBxJd82BQhxIXFarm4DCSbXYVV-23IkGUWE6Bm5EdRgaLU8cMaZAwgI282ux24XqTwAPVdFUmZgcMqgOzGs5TIv-ltqDyEkUfRIHGJ_y5_q7w7XAGa-nC08pkzvY39Pyl5rOJ5MdEwiAA1OSJvVIjZaB6iymm167U6OXVlllOAy1WzQxGTB-gA5-46Ioklotx7h3dCrBD7dcRQx8ZAMWIrysiV4xi0Ii1xQs2FmbgP82pfiRbTof1Lz7GDiM-hdlLWxrHxO_A9M9v3PQKXHutSq6dxcBWSsd9DLRikRLS7TZLdbR2Jkgj26tm_weyLFLZ43vJQnyoyJYqiVDJMQshZeebGrFmM_j7WQ%3D%3D)
Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671. | | You are receiving this newsletter from Your Capital Minds (YCM), an esteemed member of the Stark Media LLC family. We know you get a lot of emails just like this one, asking you to pitch in. But the reality is, that donations from grassroots supporters just like you are what powers our campaign. Every dollar raised allows us to run TV and digital ads, purchase campaign materials and fund our voter outreach efforts. **[If that’s all you need to hear and you’re fully on board in our fight for NC-04, you can pitch in right here!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120176604/585476127/1751535416?amount=3&source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_112825_EOM02_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMmRkNzBkOC1hNWNjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rc4Z3rkgteFTYcBegsAJtExm8SDVViwDEhqL3qncyXg=)** But Valerie knows that it’s not an easy choice to donate your hard-earned money, so here are three good reasons to chip in to Valerie’s campaign today:
1. **Valerie is proud of her record working for North Carolina.** She’s lived in Orange County her entire life, and she understands the people who live here and works hard every day for their best interests.
2. **We can show the world that one election won’t take away our movement.** The Democratic victories we saw earlier this month prove that change is possible, and there’s still so much more ahead.
3. **Your contribution makes a real impact for a grassroots effort like this.** We don’t rely on big donors or special interests — we rely on people who believe in the work Valerie is doing in Congress. This team has shown time and again that we can match any challenge.

Every single dollar we raise goes toward voter outreach, TV and digital ads, and everything else it takes to run a successful campaign. The fact is, Peter, we need some more help getting our message out to every voter in this district. **[So what do you say, Peter? If any of these reasons above resonated with you, will you chip in $3 before our upcoming end-of-month deadline to help us win this race and take back the House?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/120176605/585476128/1751535416?amount=3&source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_112825_EOM02_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMmRkNzBkOC1hNWNjLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rc4Z3rkgteFTYcBegsAJtExm8SDVViwDEhqL3qncyXg=)** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now

Valerie is proud of her record working for North Carolina. She’s lived in Orange County her entire life, and she understands the people who live here and works hard every day for their best interests. 2. We can show the world that one election won’t take away our movement. The Democratic victories we saw earlier this month prove that change is possible, and there’s still so much more ahead. 3. Your contribution makes a real impact for a grassroots effort like this. We don’t rely on big donors or special interests — we rely on people who believe in the work Valerie is doing in Congress. I'm reaching out to you from the **Sound of Freedom Foundation** -- the organization that funds real-time rescue operations in partnership with law enforcement and former special forces to find and extract children from traffickers -- fast.When a tip comes in, the teams made up of former Navy SEALs, undercover investigators, and cyber-intelligence analysts move within hours, sometimes minutes.In partnership with local law enforcement, we pull these children out of hotels, vehicles moving across the country, and brothels.The **Sound of Freedom Foundation** team works tirelessly to protect youth from the ravages of human trafficking and exploitation. Our mission is clear - to create a world where no child ever has to live in fear of being trafficked or exploited. We don't wait.Today -- a child is waiting to be found.I'm personally asking you: will you help me rescue one before midnight?

Peter, the facts continue to haunt me and tear me apart every day:
---
* Most victims are only 12 years old
* 35-40 million suffer in sex trafficking worldwide every single day
* Less than 0.04% are ever found - but we can change that

---
We can't continue to stand by and let these children live in fear and terror.Your gift today goes straight to the next rescue:
---
* $25 keeps our 24/7 rescue hotline open one more shift
* $50 provides transportation to a safe house
* $100 gives one rescued child 72 hours in a safe house with a warm bed, food, and someone to hold them while they cry

---
I wish I could do this alone, but I can't.I need you with me today. Please don't close this email without helping. One child's future -- one little boy or girl who still believes someone is coming -- is hanging on what we do in the next few hours.Click below to give today - Every single dollar lands instantly where seconds save lives.

name: John Fetterman
subject: i'm talking about *actual* solutions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
[ https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51612?t=1001&akid=10450%2E434096%2E9KRVt9 ]John Fetterman

Folks, we need to talk about how Trump and his crew are still sneaking around trying to break Social Security.

They’re inventing new ways to kick seniors off their benefits and laying the groundwork to sell Americans’ retirements off to Wall Street. 🤬

But I’m not just watching this mess unfold. I’m fighting for **real** fixes that'll actually help working folks keep the benefits they busted their backs to earn.

I helped introduce the Boosting Benefits and COLAs for Seniors Act – so benefits finally keep up with the real cost of living. Because folks shouldn't have to choose between prescriptions, rent, or food.

And I cosponsored the Billionaires Income Tax Act – making the ultrawealthy pay their fair share. That’s money we can use to protect Social Security and keep our promises to seniors.

We need a government that works for the people who make this country run, not the few at the very top.

If you agree, I’m asking you to pitch in a few bucks before Sunday at midnight to help us hit our $50,000 end-of-month goal. Every dollar builds the movement we need to keep fighting for working families in PA and across the country. Will you chip in now to help us get there?

https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52360?t=1002&akid=10450%2E434096%2E9KRVt9

Thanks, yinz.

John ❤️

name: Mark Kelly
subject: A personal note from me:
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Sometimes I think back to the kid I was in New Jersey, way before all of this (with a lot more hair). I wonder what he’d think about where we ended up.
#

Team, I just wanted to make sure I sent a message to thank you, personally.
Honestly, when I first heard what Trump said about me and my colleagues, I wasn’t sure what was going to come next.
A lot has happened since then, but one thing’s been constant: the support I have received from you and this team.
I can’t begin to explain how much it’s meant to me.
Sometimes I think back to the kid I was in New Jersey, way before all of this (with a lot more hair). I wonder what he’d think about where we ended up.
If he knew that millions of people from around the country would have his back, I think he’d be pretty proud.
So, thank you. Really. We’re in uncharted territory here, but with you on my side, I‘m confident we’ll get through whatever comes our way.
I hope you had a great Thanksgiving.
Mark
Please, don’t skip this 30 second read.
**If you’re still here, we hope you might support Mark with a donation.** Our average contribution is about $27, but any amount helps. All that matters is you are showing up for Mark at a time when he needs you the most.
[**Please, chip in.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-nov25-dod/.t5EZ4X&refcode=em251128-1-1mil&t=1&akid=6267%2E6688874%2EpehHyH)

* * *
##### _**Cliff 's Note:** BAM crew! Wanna help **Blue Amp Media** with only a click? We have an ad below for a great product -- perfect timing for holiday shopping!_
##### _It literally helps you sniff out right-wing & Russian propaganda!_
##### _**Click on the link! We grow,** spend more time **fighting fascism & amplifying good. Y**ou get great info from an independent media literacy tool & disinfo decoder ring._
##### _**-- Cliff**_
* * *
_**By David Shuster**_
The President of the United States increasingly resembles a decaying, crotchety old man wrestling not with his grievances or enemies, but with the betrayal of time and a mental erosion preventing any impulse control.
The _New York Times_ recently reported what all of us with a functioning optic nerve have seen: Donald J. Trump, the once bombastic showman and snake oil salesman, has shrunk his public schedule and limited his appearances to a tight mid-day window.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d47a62d5-42de-47d1-8817-a723616de145?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Whereas previous U.S. Presidents embraced the burdens of office at dawn, Trump appears only after most of the nation has eaten lunch.
And when Trump does appear, reporters and staff keep seeing moments that look like fatigue overtaking leadership vigilance, the sort of slump that in most offices would prompt a supervisor to ask whether the employee needed time off or a medical check.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d47a62d5-42de-47d1-8817-a723616de145?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
But instead of addressing concerns like an adult, the President keeps raging like a tyrannical toddler. He has denounced the reporting as unfair, sneered at journalists, and bellowed about his "perfect" tests -- as if the nation were comprised only of other gullible children distracted by shiny objects.
Trump's stain on our nation is no longer just financial corruption and governing incompetence. He is now a leader who lashes out with the reflexive hostility of a man in a dementia ward, cornered by his own limitations.
Just in the past week, Trump's language has become even more venomous and feral. His vocabulary has narrowed. His speeches have devolved into loops of resentment, sputtering hyperbole, and insults borrowed from the dullest middle school hooligan.
* * *
#### BAM friends,
#### When the _Ukraine "peace"_ _plan_ came out, deceit was in the air. Half our media mirrored a Russian script, half was bloated w/ "both sides" takes.
#### **So I fired up[Ground News](https://substack.com/redirect/d47a62d5-42de-47d1-8817-a723616de145?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) -- BOOM. Instant clarity.**
#### **[Ground News](https://substack.com/redirect/d47a62d5-42de-47d1-8817-a723616de145?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) **is an independent news aggregator w/ over 50,000 sources worldwide, rating each on ownership, factuality, and bias.
#### **They are[ my must read](https://substack.com/redirect/a998d5e1-6659-4244-ba2f-a875cc7ae389?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), so I'm pumped to offer [Blue Amp readers 40% OFF a Ground News Vantage subscription w/ our link](https://substack.com/redirect/d47a62d5-42de-47d1-8817-a723616de145?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)!!**
#### If you want truth, not someone's version of it -- **[Ground News](https://substack.com/redirect/d47a62d5-42de-47d1-8817-a723616de145?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** is the way. Trust me. Once you see it, you can't go back.

[Subscribe to Ground News for 40% Off](https://substack.com/redirect/d47a62d5-42de-47d1-8817-a723616de145?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
In a Thanksgiving post on social media, Trump called a sitting governor "seriously retarded," a phrase rancid with cruelty and long rejected by civilized society.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d47a62d5-42de-47d1-8817-a723616de145?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
This was not the eruption of a sharp mind. It was the yelp of an old lunatic whose rhetorical cupboard is empty except for slurs and stale anger.
No U.S. President has ever hurled public invective with such frequency, randomness, and sheer childishness. And Trump's anti-social behavior keeps getting worse.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d47a62d5-42de-47d1-8817-a723616de145?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
This month, he called a reporter "piggy" to her face. Last week, Trump claimed six Democratic lawmakers who urged soldiers to "refuse illegal orders" had committed sedition. Trump reposted a post stating "hang them."
A few days ago, Trump ranted about Somalians after an Afghan national was arrested in connection with the shooting of West Virginia National Guard members in Washington, D.C.
When Trump was asked during a Thanksgiving press conference in Mar-a-Lago if he would attend the funeral, he responded by bragging, "I won West Virginia by one of the biggest margins of any president anywhere."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d47a62d5-42de-47d1-8817-a723616de145?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In the same news conference, Trump erupted at another female reporter who questioned his false claim that the shooter (who worked for the CIA during the U.S. occupation of Afghanistan) was an "unvetted refugee." His puerile insult, sadly, was standard issue for him these days, as he barked, "You're a stupid person."
Trump seems more reliant than ever on bravado to mask his shrinking physical stamina, and on unhinged hostility to hide his accelerating cognitive decline.
This is a civic emergency. Because the danger is not that the President is aging -- all men age. The danger is that the Presidency itself is aging under Trump and has been reduced to a twilight institution, limping through the motions, while the current occupant rants, naps, fumes, and forgets.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d47a62d5-42de-47d1-8817-a723616de145?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Our nation can withstand mismanagement and even malice. Our nation cannot withstand the normalization and sane-washing of such clear deterioration.
We have been asked and instructed by the Trump team to ignore the obvious: the dwindling public schedule, the withering attention span, the escalating verbal vitriol, the unmistakable signs of strain. We are told that any question is treason, any doubt a conspiracy, and any concern a malicious personal attack.
But what we are witnessing is not merely erratic conduct or bad temper. It is a presidency sinking under the deadweight of its lead performer, a spectacle of fatigue dressed up as defiance, and fury masquerading as vigor.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d47a62d5-42de-47d1-8817-a723616de145?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
If this is the standard most Americans now accept, then our nation's decline will not be sudden or dramatic. It will be slow, pathetic, and utterly preventable.
We are descending into a dangerous period of diminished expectations. And we are led, fittingly, by an old, demented narcissist who cannot handle his own decomposition.
25th Amendment? The Trump cabinet won't go there. But the rest of us should.
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d47a62d5-42de-47d1-8817-a723616de145?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

clean_body: David Shuster exposes the fatigue, fury, and cognitive erosion the Trump team is desperately trying to hide. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? David Shuster exposes the fatigue, fury, and cognitive erosion the Trump team is desperately trying to hide. | | and | Nov 28 | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Cliff 's Note: BAM crew! Wanna help Blue Amp Media with only a click? We have an ad below for a great product -- perfect timing for holiday shopping! It literally helps you sniff out right-wing & Russian propaganda! Click on the link! We grow, spend more time fighting fascism & amplifying good. You get great info from an independent media literacy tool & disinfo decoder ring. -- Cliff By David Shuster The President of the United States increasingly resembles a decaying, crotchety old man wrestling not with his grievances or enemies, but with the betrayal of time and a mental erosion preventing any impulse control. The New York Times recently reported what all of us with a functioning optic nerve have seen: Donald J. Trump, the once bombastic showman and snake oil salesman, has shrunk his public schedule and limited his appearances to a tight mid-day window. | | ---|---|--- Whereas previous U.S. Presidents embraced the burdens of office at dawn, Trump appears only after most of the nation has eaten lunch. And when Trump does appear, reporters and staff keep seeing moments that look like fatigue overtaking leadership vigilance, the sort of slump that in most offices would prompt a supervisor to ask whether the employee needed time off or a medical check. | | ---|---|--- But instead of addressing concerns like an adult, the President keeps raging like a tyrannical toddler. He has denounced the reporting as unfair, sneered at journalists, and bellowed about his "perfect" tests -- as if the nation were comprised only of other gullible children distracted by shiny objects. Trump's stain on our nation is no longer just financial corruption and governing incompetence. He is now a leader who lashes out with the reflexive hostility of a man in a dementia ward, cornered by his own limitations. Just in the past week, Trump's language has become even more venomous and feral. His vocabulary has narrowed. His speeches have devolved into loops of resentment, sputtering hyperbole, and insults borrowed from the dullest middle school hooligan. BAM friends, When the Ukraine "peace" plan came out, deceit was in the air. Half our media mirrored a Russian script, half was bloated w/ "both sides" takes. So I fired up -- BOOM. Instant clarity. is an independent news aggregator w/ over 50,000 sources worldwide, rating each on ownership, factuality, and bias. They are, so I'm pumped to offer !! If you want truth, not someone's version of it -- is the way. Trust me. Once you see it, you can't go back. --Cliff | | ---|---|--- helps me find a balanced and objective understanding of news because it rates publications to give readers more context about the sources of our information. In a Thanksgiving post on social media, Trump called a sitting governor "seriously retarded," a phrase rancid with cruelty and long rejected by civilized society. | | ---|---|--- This was not the eruption of a sharp mind. It was the yelp of an old lunatic whose rhetorical cupboard is empty except for slurs and stale anger. No U.S. President has ever hurled public invective with such frequency, randomness, and sheer childishness. And Trump's anti-social behavior keeps getting worse. | | ---|---|--- This month, he called a reporter "piggy" to her face. Last week, Trump claimed six Democratic lawmakers who urged soldiers to "refuse illegal orders" had committed sedition. Trump reposted a post stating "hang them." A few days ago, Trump ranted about Somalians after an Afghan national was arrested in connection with the shooting of West Virginia National Guard members in Washington, D.C. When Trump was asked during a Thanksgiving press conference in Mar-a-Lago if he would attend the funeral, he responded by bragging, "I won West Virginia by one of the biggest margins of any president anywhere." | | ---|---|--- In the same news conference, Trump erupted at another female reporter who questioned his false claim that the shooter (who worked for the CIA during the U.S. occupation of Afghanistan) was an "unvetted refugee." His puerile insult, sadly, was standard issue for him these days, as he barked, "You're a stupid person." Trump seems more reliant than ever on bravado to mask his shrinking physical stamina, and on unhinged hostility to hide his accelerating cognitive decline. This is a civic emergency. Because the danger is not that the President is aging -- all men age. The danger is that the Presidency itself is aging under Trump and has been reduced to a twilight institution, limping through the motions, while the current occupant rants, naps, fumes, and forgets. | | ---|---|--- Our nation can withstand mismanagement and even malice. Our nation cannot withstand the normalization and sane-washing of such clear deterioration. We have been asked and instructed by the Trump team to ignore the obvious: the dwindling public schedule, the withering attention span, the escalating verbal vitriol, the unmistakable signs of strain. We are told that any question is treason, any doubt a conspiracy, and any concern a malicious personal attack. But what we are witnessing is not merely erratic conduct or bad temper. It is a presidency sinking under the deadweight of its lead performer, a spectacle of fatigue dressed up as defiance, and fury masquerading as vigor. | | ---|---|--- If this is the standard most Americans now accept, then our nation's decline will not be sudden or dramatic. It will be slow, pathetic, and utterly preventable. We are descending into a dangerous period of diminished expectations. And we are led, fittingly, by an old, demented narcissist who cannot handle his own decomposition. 25th Amendment? The Trump cabinet won't go there. But the rest of us should. * | | ---|---|--- You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Cliff Schecter PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 ? ?

name: James Talarico for Senate
subject: If you knew…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Just think about this:
If you knew — and we mean really, really knew — that making a $5 contribution to James Talarico's campaign could make the difference in winning Texas’ Senate race, wouldn't it be worth it?
And what if you knew that same $5 meant this would be the deciding race that flipped the Senate in next November's elections? Wouldn't it be $5 well spent?
How about if you knew that $5 to elect James Talarico would serve as a much needed breath of fresh air in our country's politics ... wouldn't that be $5 you felt good about?
We know... it probably doesn't seem like $5 can win this seat, take back the Senate majority, and move our politics toward a better place.
But as you read this, people from all over are contributing to James Talarico's campaign as we get closer to the close of our November fundraising drive.
Now they're hoping you'll do the same. Because it all adds up fast... and the only way forward is together.

name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: Before you hit the hay…
body:
There’s something I need to tell you...

| | | | [](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.-ExIrVzikMbuSYDEujg)Hey, Peter. It’s Marsha.
I know it’s late, and you’re probably getting settled for the night, but I need to tell you something that can’t wait until the morning.
I’m just **$231** short of today's fundraising goal. I know this doesn’t seem like a lot. But trust me when I say every single dollar counts when it comes to defeating the Democrats and protecting our GOP Majority.
If we fall short of our goal tonight, it will set the stage for a complete Democrat takeover. Every GOP victory in the past few weeks will be gone overnight!
[](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.)[This is why failure is not an option here, Peter. I’m calling on every patriot reading this email to chip in $4. Nothing more. Nothing less. Just $4.](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.--BmeGi0w)[Chip In $4
](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.)If everyone reading this email contributes just $4 or more, we’ll EASILY surpass our fundraising goal and have the resources necessary to stop the Democratic takeover.
_If not, we’re doomed..._[ Chip In $4

Marsha Blackburn| | |

name: Dr. Raul Ruiz
subject: Republicans are deflecting
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
They have their eyes on CA-25.

While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=V3oA7xn5t3LJNJI8PzunI92PGkbCDfm0eHtS5ntZ9Toq2sZcO0N6Qssmax6LtuZxPJiJXo8y02T1oTdBhaEP%2BjvYvYVgmIDznulOYINGWGWItpzFdQvH4kaIV7IqQNfenzOQ7Qyi%2Fbrgx8zpn8vUAnP8TDS%2BkVHBRT09VzqM4da5U%2FdEbcV%2Bpb5A03UyYS7JKBJXNKFkr4TJhRyqXViVIVLcia8QQI4C2uRA%2F2nT1IJsgS%2B4aQh%2BHfl7ny6koWRptvAajoHyGKvUKmvpbImrvX7iLaW82Z7EpZPZaXRkW49NqbnOuAPVwjKhSwktMRU44TmSkl3Hwjacm%2B%2FgI0hWHeI3E5QrVkldNqIOmWqqFJ5WCgOXTywRAEZgoDegsA4%2Bfe0gqXFR%2FiJt1ZzB5iOPn%2FBLdNPwtleSpqzaeV61%2FxrxbNB8iYMNqgVHsJPy1QQH)
---
| |
---
It’s Raul. **Too many Californians are struggling to pay rent and buy groceries.** Many are even picking up holiday shifts just to make ends meet. That’s the reality we’re living in under Donald Trump’s corrupt administration, and people are fed up. Now, the cracks in their coalition are starting to show. But instead of taking responsibility, **Republicans are deflecting — and directing their attacks straight at me.** **That’s because the NRCC knows I represent one of the most vulnerable seats in California.** **Here’s why:** In 2024, Republicans gained significant ground in CA-25, especially among Latino men. In fact, _three of our counties flipped red._ And while Democrats won some incredible victories earlier this month, turnout in our district for Prop 50 was alarmingly low. **I’m fighting to lower the cost of goods, bring good-paying jobs to Coachella Valley, and ensure you get the support you deserve.** But this fight isn’t won overnight, and I need your help to keep pushing forward. **I've told my team we need to _increase_ our fundraising goal ahead of our public FEC report at the end of the year, which means we need to raise $10,000 before midnight this Sunday.** If we don't act now, we'll miss our opportunity to flip the House blue and take back the majority. We can't afford to let this advantage slip away. The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. **Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.**

clean_body: They have their eyes on CA-25. While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | It’s Raul. Too many Californians are struggling to pay rent and buy groceries. Many are even picking up holiday shifts just to make ends meet. That’s the reality we’re living in under Donald Trump’s corrupt administration, and people are fed up. Now, the cracks in their coalition are starting to show. But instead of taking responsibility, Republicans are deflecting — and directing their attacks straight at me. That’s because the NRCC knows I represent one of the most vulnerable seats in California. Here’s why: In 2024, Republicans gained significant ground in CA-25, especially among Latino men. In fact, three of our counties flipped red. And while Democrats won some incredible victories earlier this month, turnout in our district for Prop 50 was alarmingly low. I’m fighting to lower the cost of goods, bring good-paying jobs to Coachella Valley, and ensure you get the support you deserve. But this fight isn’t won overnight, and I need your help to keep pushing forward. I've told my team we need to increase our fundraising goal ahead of our public FEC report at the end of the year, which means we need to raise $10,000 before midnight this Sunday. If we don't act now, we'll miss our opportunity to flip the House blue and take back the majority. We can't afford to let this advantage slip away. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Raul Ruiz | | | ---|---|--- = The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.** | = = PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: You can also =. Dr. Raul Ruiz for Congress Committee P.O. Box 1566 Indio, CA 92202 United States

name: Jeff Allen, Campaign Manager (via Team Cooper)
subject: Only 2 more days
body:
We could really use your support.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1898?t=1&akid=77%2E124072%2E6XI-7T)
Peter, it’s Jeff Allen — Roy Cooper’s campaign manager. I want you to know where we stand today. Here are the toplines:
* The clock is ticking.
* We only have 48 hours to hit our $825,000 online fundraising goal for November.
* The national GOP has been pulling out _all_ the stops for this race — **experts have predicted that this will be the most expensive U.S. Senate race yet.**

**[I know you’re invested in this campaign’s success, Peter. So I have to ask: Will you rush $5, $10, or whatever you can right now to give us the resources we need to win?>>>](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2062?t=6&akid=77%2E124072%2E6XI-7T)** | [DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2062?t=7&akid=77%2E124072%2E6XI-7T)
---
Roy made the choice to run for U.S. Senate because he’s dedicated to public service. Our opponent is dedicated only to rubber-stamping Donald Trump’s agenda of giving billionaires _another_ tax break — and forcing you and me to foot the bill.
We need to make sure Roy’s got the funds to reach every voter, flip this seat blue, and take back the whole Senate. He’s won in NC before — and with your help, he can do it again.
**[Peter, it’s up to us to have Roy’s back. Can we count on you today?](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2062?t=8&akid=77%2E124072%2E6XI-7T)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[DONATE $5](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2063?t=9&akid=77%2E124072%2E6XI-7T)
---
[DONATE $10](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2064?t=10&akid=77%2E124072%2E6XI-7T)
---
[DONATE $25](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2065?t=11&akid=77%2E124072%2E6XI-7T)
---
[DONATE $50](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2066?t=12&akid=77%2E124072%2E6XI-7T)
---
[DONATE $100](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2067?t=13&akid=77%2E124072%2E6XI-7T)
---
[DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2068?t=14&akid=77%2E124072%2E6XI-7T)
---
Thanks so much,
Jeff Allen
Campaign Manager
Roy Cooper for U.S. Senate
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=2&akid=77%2E124072%2E6XI-7T)**
[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=3&akid=77%2E124072%2E6XI-7T)
---
[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1915?t=4&akid=77%2E124072%2E6XI-7T)
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=5&akid=77%2E124072%2E6XI-7T)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=77%2E124072%2E6XI-7T)
If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, [submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=15&akid=77%2E124072%2E6XI-7T)

name: Ollie (Chris' dog!)
subject: My 100% unbiased opinion
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20251128-851&t=1&akid=865%2E294397%2Eiul0g3)
Hi, it's Ollie!!
[](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251128_2_ak.94JlVl&amount=10&refcode=em20251128-851&t=3&akid=865%2E294397%2Eiul0g3)
I’m Judge Chris Taylor’s dog _and_ the campaign’s unofficial treat inspector. 🦴
Did you know the Wisconsin Supreme Court election isn’t next November, it’s actually in April? It’s coming up fast.
And this one’s really important, because the next justice will help decide the future of Wisconsin.
My 100% _unbiased_ opinion is that my mom is the best candidate for the position! She’s always believed in giving everyone a fair shot — whether it’s making sure every person is treated fairly in court or giving me a chance to chase one more tennis ball before bedtime. 🎾
**But here’s the ruff part:** Right-wing special interests are already gearing up to try and buy this seat. To protect our court and stop them, we’ve got to build up our campaign’s treat jar _now,_ not later.
[**So if you can, will you chip in $10 to help elect my mom, Judge Chris Taylor, to the Wisconsin Supreme Court?**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251128_2_ak.94JlVl&amount=10&refcode=em20251128-851&t=4&akid=865%2E294397%2Eiul0g3)
**[Donate $10 ››](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251128_2_ak.94JlVl&amount=10&refcode=em20251128-851&t=23&akid=865%2E294397%2Eiul0g3)**
Thank you!
Tail wags,
Ollie 🐾
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_footer?refcode=em20251128-851&t=24&refcode2=865_294397_iul0g3&akid=865%2E294397%2Eiul0g3)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=25&akid=865%2E294397%2Eiul0g3)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=865%2E294397%2Eiul0g3)

Madison, WI 53701

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: President Trump is using the FBI to target me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
[](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251128_3_slotkin.UNw51a&refcode=em20251128-3&t=1&akid=3696%2E582294%2E9ruTrr)
Friends,
The other night, the FBI's Counterterrorism Division appeared to open an inquiry into me in response to a video the President did not like.
In that video, I directly quoted the Uniform Code of Military Justice alongside five other Members of Congress with service and veteran backgrounds. Officers and enlisted in our military are trained to follow lawful orders, and refuse to follow illegal orders. It’s part of the training. This has been the case since World War II.
Since then, the President has misquoted me, and then called for my arrest, trial, and death by hanging. Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth has threatened my friend, Senator Mark Kelly, with court martial. And now, it appears the president has directed the FBI to target the rest of us.
**This is exactly why we made that video in the first place.**
President Trump believes in weaponizing the federal government against his perceived enemies and does not believe laws apply to him or his Cabinet. He uses legal harassment as an intimidation tactic, to scare people out of speaking up. He’s done it to law firms, universities, private sector companies and private individuals.
But these kinds of tactics won’t work on me. And neither will the total wave of death threats, bomb threats, and general harassment he has unleashed.
I have always worked to be upfront and honest in these emails. This latest news from the FBI means that I have had to start thinking through a legal defense strategy – and we do not know exactly where President Trump and his Department of Justice will take this inquiry. And for the time being, all of that planning is being paid for through campaign dollars.
**[So, your split contribution to Chris Pappas and me will be put to work immediately to ensure I have the resources to fight back.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251128_3_slotkin.UNw51a&refcode=em20251128-3&t=2&akid=3696%2E582294%2E9ruTrr)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251128_3_slotkin.UNw51a&amount=5&refcode=em20251128-3&t=21&akid=3696%2E582294%2E9ruTrr)**
To be frank, the whole thing isn’t about one line from one video. The events of the last week do not represent the country we know and love.
I refuse to believe that this is the new normal — where the President of the United States uses fear and intimidation against people with whom he disagrees.
But Chris Pappas and I can’t do this alone.
Thank you for reading — and thank you in advance for your help.
Elissa Slotkin
United States Senator, Michigan
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20251128-3&t=22&refcode2=3696_582294_9ruTrr&akid=3696%2E582294%2E9ruTrr)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=23&akid=3696%2E582294%2E9ruTrr)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=24&akid=3696%2E582294%2E9ruTrr)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=3696%2E582294%2E9ruTrr)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)
Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
Chris Pappas for Senate
PO Box 313
Manchester, NH 03105
United States

President Trump

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Happy Thanksgiving!
body:
[INSIDE JW]

HAPPY THANKSGIVING!

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78001&L=36607&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1ZMXNUOTIyck1hWSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=65ef157dd60fd06882dd032e78abfe0d3d0bba01db33d6d597e83fbb3c8f5f7c]

Our modern celebration of Thanksgiving has its roots in extreme
hardship. The Pilgrims who arrived on these shores in December of 1620
struggled mightily, as the Plimoth Plantation
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78001&L=11088&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucGxpbW90aC5vcmcvbGVhcm4vanVzdC1raWRzL2hvbWV3b3JrLWhlbHAvd2hvLXdlcmUtcGlsZ3JpbXM/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=bd7c5205e374f7719488dbb8bcbba04ccd474b586450c33aaf8821540d9a134a]
describes:

> Many of the colonists fell ill. They were probably suffering from
> scurvy and pneumonia caused by a lack of shelter in the cold, wet
> weather. Although the Pilgrims were not starving, their sea diet was
> very high in salt, which weakened their bodies on the long journey
> and during that first winter. As many as two or three people died
> each day during their first two months on land. Only 52 people
> survived the first year in Plymouth. When _Mayflower_ left Plymouth
> on April 5, 1621, she sailed back to England with only half of her
> crew.

Nevertheless, in the fall of 1621, a year after their arrival, they
sat down for a feast and a three-day celebration of Thanksgiving.
They had befriended and made a treaty of mutual protection with the
Pokanoket Wampanoag leader, Ousamequin, also known as Massasoit to the
Pilgrims. He and 90 of his men joined the celebration.

In the 1800s, this famous celebration became the basis for the story
of the First Thanksgiving.

As the Pilgrims did, we should pause to reflect on all that is good
and on the Source of this goodness. And as President Washington
reminded Americans in his 1789 first Thanksgiving Proclamation
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78001&L=21332&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9mb3VuZGVycy5hcmNoaXZlcy5nb3YvZG9jdW1lbnRzL1dhc2hpbmd0b24vMDUtMDQtMDItMDA5MT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=0ed462226438bf4f809949f46b24aadb943a08e5efcb28d81062836cab459211],
we
must also pray for good, constitutional government:

> ...beseech him to pardon our national and other transgressions—to
> enable us all, whether in public or private stations, to perform our
> several and relative duties properly and punctually—to render our
> national government a blessing to all the people, by constantly
> being a Government of wise, just, and constitutional laws,
> discreetly and faithfully executed and obeyed...

I am particularly thankful for all of you who donate to support our
just cause
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78001&L=12711&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS05ODYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=bc43d7a716486efb273b77c9505164ad25a50b75c338f13edf773f14574dcfc5]
and
for your many messages of encouragement to me and my hard-working
Judicial Watch colleagues who, in “private stations,” work for a
“wise, just, and constitutional” government. We will continue to
fight for the truth and transparency, shed light into the darkness and
be a small beacon of hope for you and of other patriots of our great
nation.

On behalf of all of us at Judicial Watch, I wish you and yours a most
blessed Thanksgiving!

Until next week,

[Contribute]
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78001&L=12711&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS05ODYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=bc43d7a716486efb273b77c9505164ad25a50b75c338f13edf773f14574dcfc5]

[32x32x1]
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78001&L=13&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL0p1ZGljaWFsV2F0Y2gvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=bb4bbb83588467f5da69fe03bd3831b0f9cf661939799cc8a525f7b41078c632]

[32x32x2]
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78001&L=14&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9qdWRpY2lhbHdhdGNoP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=6b5d0ae6d62aa483ab0e417878fc0f1366c2f4c2475fb2e727b2a546c035cf11]

[32x32x3]
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78001&L=15&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vdXNlci9KdWRpY2lhbFdhdGNoP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=cd4559b4f693e48c82d44c778eb81c3b7c4aa769fde460c8cbd107b6cbb70136]

[32x32x3]
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78001&L=1285&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaW5zdGFncmFtLmNvbS9qdWRpY2lhbHdhdGNoLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=3d7e2e92a74003c7f9bf5adeb073c75736bf6a4d44581c67d3798cd1dec7406c]

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: New polling just dropped:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Facing a real Christmas crunch
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e18125465/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvTk1TR2hKcHZydQ/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTExMjg/LbmNsTWxyU0dLWQ/qP2hpZHM9bmNHTGRTRG1CaUJLeHZscw/gaSo14w/sap8946c485)
| |
---
| |
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, It may seem a little early to talk about Christmas, but I had to make sure I got your attention. Because **BRAVE Books** is facing a real Christmas crunch. And as one of our best supporters in our mission to instill conservative values in children using high-quality, wholesome, and Godly books and entertainment... **[...I thought you’d want to be one of the first to know what’s going on.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) ** **Friend, BRAVE Books** has introduced _Mouse in the House_ as a Christian alternative to that other secular “Christmas” game where parents hide a stuffed elf around the house to “spy” on the children to make sure they behave well to earn Santa’s gifts. My friends at**BRAVE Books** knew families deserved something better to teach the true meaning of Christmas. So, they created _Mouse in the House_ to help parents emphasize the joy of _giving_ more than _getting_ in this most blessed season. And boy, did parents respond. The first year it was introduced,___Mouse in the House_ sold out in THREE HOURS! Friend, I know it’s only November, but this year we don’t want to turn any families away because of unexpectedly high demand.
---
| | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| **BRAVE Books** is ramping up production big-time and fast. **[And today I’m hoping you’ll contribute to our “More Mouse in the House!” campaign by rushing back your one-time gift in the next 24 hours.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** Friend, you’re one of our best supporters and I’m so grateful.
---
| | **BRAVE Books** is ramping up production big-time and fast. [And today I’m hoping you’ll contribute to our “More Mouse in the House!” campaign by rushing back your one-time gift in the next 24 hours. ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) Friend, you’re one of our best supporters and I’m so grateful.
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| | You understand that **BRAVE Books** is fighting to restore our culture because we can’t just give up and let the radicals erase America’s Judeo-Christian values. >>> Your support has already helped get “See You at the Library” kits to thousands of parents, grandparents, children, and concerned citizens who gathered at over 201 libraries in 46 states (including the Library of Congress!) to take back our libraries. Together, we countered the Left’s radical and ungodly “Drag Queen Story Hours” and filled children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God. >>> Your last gift helped us finish filming TWO whole seasons of our historic TV show “Iggy and Mr. Kirk.” This is the very first television show funded by everyday Americans to fight the ungodly lessons coming out of Hollywood. “Iggy and Mr. Kirk” is our modern day “Mr. Rogers’ Neighborhood” that uses humor and storytelling to reinforce the traditional biblical values that have made America great. >>> And now you are the difference between success and failure with our “More Mouse in the House!” campaign. Just look at what parents have already said about our _Mouse in the House_ Christmas bundle that comes with a beautiful book and adorable stuffed mouse:
---
_“So thankful for a thoughtful new Christmas tradition for our children. The story is sweet, the explanation of Christmas is poignant, and the mouse is so adorable. Thank you, Brave Books!!!” — Jenae K._ _“I love the Godly service ideas!” – Susan_ _“I love the Mouse in the House. The giving nature of the story reflects the theme of the Christmas season.” – Kat F._
---
**Friend, parents are hungry for Godly content that helps them counter the wicked culture.** **And your support helps BRAVE Books supply it.** **[Your gift of $35, $50 or even $100 not only helps fund our “ _More Mouse in the House_ _!_ ” campaign... ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)** Your gift helps **BRAVE Books** complete a groundbreaking comprehensive homeschool curriculum that gives parents an alternative to woke government schools. Friend, nothing we accomplish is possible without you. And that’s why as a thank you for being such a faithful and faith-filled friend, when you contribute $100 or more to our “More Mouse in the House!” campaign... ...we will send one out to you absolutely free. You can keep the _Mouse in the House_ Christmas bundle for your family, you can gift it to someone you love... ...or you can donate it to your favorite charity in the hopes of reaching a family who doesn’t have a Christian role model in their life. [**Friend, what’s most important is that you rush back your best gift of $35, $50, or even $100 in the next 24 hours.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) **BRAVE Books** is working round the clock to get enough _Mouse in the House_ Christmas bundles produced and all the orders filled in time. Friend, THANK YOU for helping. **BRAVE Books** would have no chance of beating Hollywood, giant left-leaning publishers, and big government-funded libraries and schools without you. Thank you for taking a minute to help with our “More Mouse in the House!” campaign. You’re bringing the true meaning of Christmas to families all across America. Thank you and may God bless you and God bless America,
---
| | Sincerely,
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Kirk Cameron
---
P.S. Friend, it’s only November and we’re already in a Christmas crunch! Families are clamoring for our _Mouse in the House_ Christmas bundle to counter the Left’s secular interpretation of this most blessed season. [**Your donation of $35, $50, or even $100 helps us fill all our Mouse in the House orders in time to help parents teach giving not getting this Christmas.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) And as a thank you for your gift of $100 or more we’ll send you your very own _Mouse in the House_ for your family! Thank you! -- Kirk
---
[ **DONATE** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
|
---
| | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
**Brave Books** 3528 S Loop 336 E Suite C Conroe, TX 77301
---
| [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

Alexandria, VA 22314
